
### 1.6 active live readiness blocker list

If any of the following is true, `live_order_ready=false` and `live_order_allowed=false`.

```text
LIVE_READY snapshot missing
LIVE_READY snapshot expired
LIVE_READY snapshot scope mismatch
strategy unit mismatch
parameter_hash mismatch
risk_profile mismatch
build_id mismatch
source_tree_hash mismatch
registry_hash mismatch
schema_bundle_hash mismatch
official API verification missing
official API verification stale
official API verification partial
official API verification failed
manual order test missing when required
manual order test failed
operator approval missing when required
operator approval expired
API key permission unknown
withdrawal permission detected
account snapshot stale
balance snapshot stale
position snapshot stale
open order snapshot stale
reconciliation stale
symbol rule stale
min notional unknown
tick size unknown
step size unknown
fee model unknown
slippage model unknown
impact model unknown on thin market
private websocket unhealthy when required
read-only burn-in missing
emergency flatten unavailable
manual_exit_all_positions unavailable
cancel_all_open_orders unavailable
reduce_only_path unavailable for futures
ledger writer unavailable
intent WAL unavailable
single writer unavailable
idempotency key missing
risk veto active
kill switch not ready
resource critical
memory danger
disk full
clock drift
exchange policy block
market event risk
local_state_only protection
orphan position unresolved
orphan open order unresolved
bundle hygiene fail
source or release identity mismatch
generated artifact dirty
schema validator fail
registry validator fail
live blocked validator fail
coverage index fail
HIGH contract gap open
promotion_input_type unknown
promotion_input_type invalid
exploration stage mismatch
Stage A output treated as LIVE_READY evidence
Stage B PASS treated as LIVE_READY snapshot
LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT treated as LIVE_READY snapshot
live_ready_snapshot_writer_validator missing
live_ready_snapshot_writer_validator untested
live_ready_snapshot_writer_validator failed
expanded exploration bound unverified
expanded exploration bound used as live parameter bound
variation unregistered
timeframe scope mismatch
candidate budget exceeded
duplicate candidate promoted
exploration resource critical
execution quality measurement missing
cost after edge unverified
fill quality untested
regime scope mismatch
combination complexity exceeded
unbounded candidate expansion
CRITICAL contract gap open
```

### 1.7 live order ready formula

```text
live_order_ready =
  valid_live_ready_snapshot
  and snapshot_scope_match
  and official_api_verification_pass_and_fresh
  and manual_order_test_pass_when_required
  and operator_approval_valid_when_required
  and api_key_permission_verified
  and withdrawal_permission_absent
  and account_reconciliation_fresh
  and balance_position_open_order_fresh
  and symbol_fee_slippage_rules_verified
  and risk_limits_pass
  and kill_switch_ready
  and ledger_writer_available
  and intent_wal_available
  and emergency_protection_available
  and live_final_guard_enabled
  and resource_health_pass
  and bundle_hygiene_pass_when_release_used
  and source_identity_pass_when_release_used
  and all_blocking_validators_pass
  and no_high_or_critical_contract_gap_open
```

```text
live_order_allowed = live_order_ready and exact_scope_preflight_pass and operator_scope_allows_order
```

The following values do not create live_order_ready or live_order_allowed.

```text
release_ready
bundle_ready
can_start
can_collect_data
can_paper_trade
can_shadow_evaluate
can_replay
can_live_review
```

### 1.8 active candidate parameter, promotion, parity, and execution quality defaults

This section is an active contract pack supplement. It adds conservative defaults for the areas that cannot be proven from prose alone but must be bounded so that AI compiler can start implementation without inventing unsafe live behavior.

These values are not profitability claims and are not live-optimal parameters. They are initial candidate bounds, validator defaults, and promotion gates. More conservative exchange rules, operator policy, LIVE_READY snapshot limits, validator evidence, or registry values win.

Registry integration rule:

```text
MVP-0 registry must include these groups or a stricter equivalent:
candidate_parameter_bounds
candidate_generation_limits
auto_adjustment_cooldowns
promotion_threshold_defaults
paper_live_parity_thresholds
rolling_performance_window_defaults
order_failure_type enum
realized_execution_measurement_fields
execution_quality_blockers
```

Unknown value handling:

```text
unknown parameter bound -> candidate generation BLOCKED for affected strategy family
parameter outside bound -> CANDIDATE only, never LIVE_READY without registry update and validation evidence
missing promotion threshold -> LIVE_READY candidate generation BLOCKED
missing paper/live parity threshold -> live_order_ready=false
missing realized slippage measurement -> scale-up BLOCKED and live_order_allowed=false for expansion
```

#### 1.8.1 initial candidate parameter bounds

The values below are initial exploration bounds for replay, paper, and shadow. They must not be treated as live optimum values.

| strategy_family | parameter | initial_candidate_bound |
|---|---|---|
| open_reset_micro | reset_window_candles | 3 to 12 |
| open_reset_micro | momentum_window_candles | 3 to 20 |
| open_reset_micro | signal_ttl_candles | 1 to 5 |
| open_reset_micro | fomo_distance_atr | 0.5 to 1.5 |
| open_reset_micro | stop_distance_atr | 0.6 to 1.5 |
| open_reset_micro | take_profit_r | 1.0 to 2.5 |
| open_reset_micro | time_stop_candles | 3 to 12 |
| breakout_retest | breakout_window_candles | 20 to 80 |
| breakout_retest | retest_tolerance_atr | 0.2 to 0.8 |
| breakout_retest | false_breakout_confirmation_candles | 1 to 3 |
| breakout_retest | signal_ttl_candles | 2 to 8 |
| breakout_retest | stop_distance_atr | 0.5 to 1.8 or validated invalidation level |
| breakout_retest | take_profit_r | 1.5 to 3.0 |
| trend_pullback | fast_ema_period | 10 to 30 |
| trend_pullback | slow_ema_period | 40 to 100 |
| trend_pullback | pullback_depth_atr | 0.5 to 2.5 |
| trend_pullback | stop_distance_atr | 0.8 to 2.5 |
| trend_pullback | take_profit_r | 1.5 to 3.5 |
| trend_pullback | signal_ttl_candles | 3 to 12 |
| trend_pullback | higher_timeframe_ratio | 4 to 12 base timeframe units |
| range_reversion_vwap | vwap_deviation_std | 1.0 to 2.5 |
| range_reversion_vwap | range_window_candles | 30 to 120 |
| range_reversion_vwap | reversion_trigger_candles | 1 to 4 |
| range_reversion_vwap | stop_distance_atr | 0.8 to 2.0 |
| range_reversion_vwap | take_profit_r | 1.0 to 2.0 |
| range_reversion_vwap | time_stop_candles | 10 to 40 |

Global candidate limits:

```text
max_candidates_per_strategy_build=200
max_candidates_per_generation_cycle=1000
max_entry_conditions_per_candidate=8
max_exit_conditions_per_candidate=8
parameter_complexity_exceeded -> BLOCKED or RETIRED candidate
candidate outside initial bounds -> requires explicit hypothesis, registry patch, validator update, and evidence before promotion
```

#### 1.8.2 automatic adjustment and rollover cooldowns

```text
candidate generation may run continuously only in REPLAY, PAPER, or SHADOW.
approved LIVE_READY snapshot rollover for same strategy unit -> minimum 24h cooldown unless it is a risk-reducing rollback.
live ACTIVE snapshot replacement -> only at position-free boundary, new-entry boundary, or decision-cycle boundary with replacement evidence.
risk_profile upgrade -> minimum 7d cooldown and explicit evidence pack.
parameter range expansion -> minimum 7d cooldown and explicit evidence pack.
strategy re-promotion after DEGRADED or BLOCKED -> minimum 24h cooldown plus cause-resolution evidence.
emergency downgrade, size reduction, safe mode, and stop trading actions have no cooldown.
```

Forbidden automatic adjustment:

```text
poor live performance -> immediate aggressive parameter change
loss streak -> widen stop without evidence
paper winner -> live config mutation without LIVE_READY snapshot
candidate snapshot -> ACTIVE snapshot directly
same position -> strategy hot-swap that relaxes exit or risk
```

#### 1.8.3 promotion thresholds for LIVE_READY candidate generation

The following are default minimums. Failure to meet them does not prove the strategy is bad; it only blocks promotion.

| evidence_area | minimum_default |
|---|---|
| replay closed trades | at least 100 closed trades or explicit insufficient-sample blocker |
| replay coverage | includes at least two market regimes when available |
| walk-forward or out-of-sample | at least 30 percent of evaluated period or explicit reason why not available |
| paper closed trades | at least 30 closed trades for the exact strategy unit |
| paper runtime | at least 72h for liquid short-cycle strategies; longer for low-frequency strategies by validator policy |
| shadow signal opportunities | at least 50 valid signal opportunities |
| net_ev_after_cost | positive and above profile minimum net edge buffer |
| profit_factor | greater than 1.05 by default and not achieved by one outlier trade only |
| max_drawdown | within active risk profile threshold |
| fill_quality_score | PASS according to execution quality validator |
| paper_live_gap | within parity threshold when live comparison exists |
| critical failures | zero HIGH or CRITICAL contract_gap, zero blocking validator FAIL |

LIVE_READY candidate generation is blocked when:

```text
sample_count missing
cost components missing
fee/slippage/impact underestimated beyond threshold
strategy result dominated by one symbol without concentration approval
overfit_signal suspected
regime fit unknown
entry maturity below Level 5
exit maturity below Level 5 for live new entry
```

#### 1.8.4 paper/live parity thresholds

These defaults apply to parity review and scale-up decisions. They do not permit live entry by themselves.

| metric | default_threshold |
|---|---|
| paper_live_gap_abs_net_ev_bps | <= 15 bps |
| realized_vs_expected_slippage_mean_abs_bps | <= active profile max_expected_slippage_bps |
| realized_vs_expected_slippage_p95_bps | <= 2 times active profile max_expected_slippage_bps |
| realized_vs_expected_impact_mean_abs_bps | <= active profile max_expected_impact_bps |
| fee_error_abs_bps | <= 2 bps or <= 10 percent relative error, whichever is looser |
| fill_rate_gap | <= 20 percent relative gap |
| partial_fill_model_error | no HIGH severity mismatch |
| latency_p95 | within signal TTL and live final guard TTL |

Rules:

```text
cost underestimation blocks promotion more strongly than cost overestimation.
favorable slippage must not compensate for missing hard truth or failed validator.
paper/live parity PASS is strategy-unit, exchange, market_type, risk_profile, and parameter_hash scoped.
parity from one exchange or market_type cannot transfer to another.
```

#### 1.8.5 rolling performance window defaults

| window | default_definition | promotion_use |
|---|---|---|
| short_window | 20 closed trades or 24h, whichever is later | blocks scale-up on sharp degradation |
| medium_window | 100 closed trades or 7d, whichever is later | required for promotion review when available |
| long_window | 500 closed trades or 30d, whichever is later | required for production autonomous claims |
| regime_window | 30 closed trades per regime or explicit insufficient-sample blocker | required for regime-scoped LIVE_READY |
| symbol_window | 20 closed trades per symbol or explicit insufficient-sample blocker | required for symbol-specific confidence |
| adapter_window | 100 order events or 7d | required for adapter execution quality review |
| live_burn_in_window | 20 live orders or 7d, whichever is later | required before scale-up |

Insufficient sample handling:

```text
insufficient sample -> no promotion, no scale-up, no profitability claim
insufficient sample does not require deleting the strategy
low-frequency strategy -> validator may use longer time window, not smaller evidence standard
```

#### 1.8.6 order failure taxonomy

MVP-0 registry must add a closed `order_failure_type` enum or equivalent.

```text
INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE
MIN_NOTIONAL_FAIL
PRICE_FILTER_FAIL
LOT_SIZE_FAIL
TICK_SIZE_FAIL
STEP_SIZE_FAIL
SYMBOL_RULE_MISMATCH
FEE_MODEL_MISMATCH
POST_ONLY_REJECT
IOC_PARTIAL
FOK_REJECT
MARKET_ORDER_REJECT
RATE_LIMIT_HIT
API_TIMEOUT
AUTH_FAILURE
PERMISSION_DENIED
WITHDRAWAL_PERMISSION_DETECTED
SIGNATURE_INVALID
TIMESTAMP_DRIFT
NETWORK_TIMEOUT
TRANSPORT_AMBIGUOUS
EXCHANGE_UNKNOWN_ORDER
DUPLICATE_CLIENT_ORDER_ID
ORDER_NOT_FOUND_DURING_RECONCILE
CANCEL_REJECTED_ALREADY_FILLED
PARTIAL_FILL_STALE
PRIVATE_WS_GAP
UNKNOWN_REJECT
```

Required behavior:

```text
symbol/rule failure -> block affected symbol or adapter path until rule verification and reconciliation
balance failure -> reconciliation required before new orders
rate limit hit -> throttle and block new orders when pressure persists
transport ambiguous -> same identifier reconciliation only
auth, permission, withdrawal permission, signature failure -> live BLOCKED and key review required
unknown reject -> block affected live path until normalized
```

#### 1.8.7 realized slippage and impact measurement

Every order event that reaches SENT, OPEN, PARTIAL_FILLED, FILLED, CANCELED, or RECONCILE_REQUIRED must be measurable against the decision-time expectation.

Minimum recorded fields:

```text
decision_id
intent_id
client_order_id
symbol
side
quantity
order_type
decision_time_utc
submit_time_utc
exchange_ack_time when available
first_fill_time when available
last_fill_time when available
decision_mid_price
decision_best_bid
decision_best_ask
expected_fee_bps
expected_spread_cost_bps
expected_slippage_bps
expected_impact_bps
expected_latency_cost_bps
average_fill_price when available
realized_fee_bps when available
realized_spread_cost_bps when available
realized_slippage_bps when available
realized_impact_bps when available
slippage_error_bps
impact_error_bps
latency_ms
orderbook_snapshot_id
depth_snapshot_id
fee_snapshot_id
```

Formula baseline:

```text
BUY realized_slippage_bps = ((average_fill_price - decision_mid_price) / decision_mid_price) * 10000
SELL realized_slippage_bps = ((decision_mid_price - average_fill_price) / decision_mid_price) * 10000
slippage_error_bps = realized_slippage_bps - expected_slippage_bps
impact_error_bps = realized_impact_bps - expected_impact_bps
```

If the order is partially filled, measurement must use filled quantity weighted average price and mark unfilled residual separately.

Execution quality blockers:

```text
realized_slippage_bps p95 > 2x expected threshold -> scale-up BLOCKED
realized_slippage_bps exceeds active profile max_expected_slippage_bps for 3 consecutive filled orders -> new entries BLOCKED for affected strategy unit pending review
impact_error_bps exceeds threshold on thin market -> NO_TRADE for affected symbol until liquidity review
fee_error_abs_bps exceeds threshold -> FEE_MODEL_UNVERIFIED
measurement fields missing -> execution quality UNTESTED, not READY
```

#### 1.8.8 supplemental validators

MVP-0 registry must include these validators or stricter equivalents before any LIVE_READY candidate writer is considered complete.

```text
parameter_bound_validator
candidate_cooldown_validator
promotion_threshold_validator
paper_live_parity_validator
order_failure_taxonomy_validator
realized_slippage_validator
execution_quality_measurement_validator
rolling_window_default_validator
```

Rules:

```text
validator missing -> UNTESTED
UNTESTED -> not READY
validator FAIL -> affected promotion, scale-up, or live path BLOCKED
```


## 2. JSON Schema contracts

MVP-0 must create all of the following schema files.

```text
contracts/schema/readiness_surface.schema.json
contracts/schema/live_ready_snapshot.schema.json
contracts/schema/manual_order_test_evidence.schema.json
contracts/schema/final_decision.schema.json
contracts/schema/ledger_event.schema.json
contracts/schema/summary.schema.json
contracts/schema/evidence_manifest.schema.json
contracts/schema/official_api_verification_report.schema.json
contracts/schema/validator_result.schema.json
contracts/schema/operator_action_audit.schema.json
contracts/schema/release_source_identity.schema.json
contracts/schema/contract_gap.schema.json
contracts/schema/patch_result.schema.json
contracts/schema/strategy_candidate.schema.json
contracts/schema/candidate_generation_report.schema.json
contracts/schema/live_ready_candidate_writer_input.schema.json
contracts/schema/validator_fixture_catalog.schema.json
```

Generation rules:

```text
$schema uses https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema.
$id must exactly match the registry schema_id.
Use additionalProperties=false as the default.
Unknown enum values are invalid.
Nullable fields explicitly include null in type.
required includes fields needed for live safety, ledger truth, evidence truth, and validator blocking.
schema identity mismatch makes the affected live path BLOCKED.
```

### 2.1 readiness_surface.schema.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "trader1.readiness_surface.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "generated_at_utc",
    "project_id",
    "can_start",
    "can_live_trade",
    "live_order_ready",
    "live_order_allowed",
    "live_trading_status",
    "blockers",
    "surface_hash"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {"const": "trader1.readiness_surface.v1"},
    "generated_at_utc": {"type": "string"},
    "project_id": {"const": "TRADER_1"},
    "exchange": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["UPBIT", "BINANCE", null]},
    "market_type": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["KRW_SPOT", "SPOT", "FUTURES_USDT_M", null]},
    "mode": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["REPLAY", "PAPER", "SHADOW", "LIVE", "SAFE", "READ_ONLY", null]},
    "session_id": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "build_id": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "authority_document": {"const": "TRADER_1.md"},
    "authority_sha256": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "registry_hash": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "schema_bundle_hash": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "source_tree_hash": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "release_package_status": {"enum": ["NOT_BUILT", "STAGING_READY", "BUNDLE_READY", "DIRTY", "BLOCKED"]},
    "bundle_readiness_status": {"enum": ["UNKNOWN", "PASS", "WARN", "FAIL", "BLOCKED"]},
    "can_start": {"type": "boolean"},
    "can_collect_data": {"type": "boolean"},
    "can_evaluate_candidates": {"type": "boolean"},
    "can_paper_trade": {"type": "boolean"},
    "can_shadow_evaluate": {"type": "boolean"},
    "can_replay": {"type": "boolean"},
    "can_live_review": {"type": "boolean"},
    "can_live_trade": {"type": "boolean"},
    "live_order_ready": {"type": "boolean"},
    "live_order_allowed": {"type": "boolean"},
    "start_gate_status": {"enum": ["PASS", "WARN", "FAIL", "BLOCKED", "UNTESTED"]},
    "live_trading_status": {"enum": ["NOT_APPLICABLE", "REVIEW_ONLY", "BLOCKED", "SMALL_LIVE_BURN_IN", "LIVE_ACTIVE"]},
    "primary_blocker_code": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["MIN_EDGE_FAIL","EXPECTED_SLIPPAGE_EXCEEDED","DEPTH_TOO_THIN","DEPTH_EXCHANGE_REJECT_RISK","STALE_ORDERBOOK","STALE_TICKER","STALE_TRADE_TAPE","STALE_CANDLE_15M","STALE_CANDLE_60M","STALE_BENCHMARK_CONTEXT","MARKET_CONTEXT_LOAD_TIMEOUT","API_TIMEOUT","WEBSOCKET_GAP","CLOCK_DRIFT","PRIVATE_WS_UNHEALTHY","DRIFT_UNRECOVERED","SESSION_PAUSE","TICK_SIZE_CLIFF","BALANCE_MISMATCH","MARKET_EVENT_RISK","BREADTH_OFF_BLOCKED","PENDING_CONFIRM_EXISTS","COOLDOWN","CLUSTER_RISK","UNIVERSE_FILTERED","POSITION_LIMIT","TRADE_DISABLED","COLD_START","DATA_UNAVAILABLE","HARD_TRUTH_MISSING","SOFT_TRUTH_UNREGISTERED_FALLBACK","RESOURCE_LIMIT","RESOURCE_LIMIT_BLOCK","LEDGER_INTEGRITY_FAIL","LEDGER_UNAVAILABLE","EXCHANGE_SYNC_REQUIRED","RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED","SYMBOL_RULE_BLOCK","SYMBOL_RULE_UNVERIFIED","FEE_MODEL_UNVERIFIED","FEE_EXCEEDS_EDGE","MARKET_IMPACT_EXCEEDS_EDGE","LIVE_READY_MISSING","USER_APPROVAL_MISSING","PREFLIGHT_FAILED","SNAPSHOT_SCOPE_MISMATCH","API_UNVERIFIED","RISK_VETO","REGIME_MISMATCH","EXCHANGE_POLICY_BLOCK","STRATEGY_NOT_ELIGIBLE","STRATEGY_CONFIDENCE_LOW","KILL_SWITCH_ACTIVE","LATENCY_TTL_EXPIRED","OFFICIAL_API_VERIFICATION_EXPIRED","MANUAL_ORDER_TEST_MISSING","OPERATOR_APPROVAL_MISSING","EMERGENCY_FLATTEN_UNAVAILABLE","SOURCE_IDENTITY_MISMATCH","BUNDLE_HYGIENE_FAIL","READ_ONLY_BURN_IN_MISSING","ORPHAN_POSITION_REVIEW_REQUIRED","ORPHAN_OPEN_ORDER_REVIEW_REQUIRED","LIVE_FINAL_GUARD_FAILED","SCHEMA_IDENTITY_MISMATCH","REGISTRY_DRIFT","GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIRTY","CONTRACT_GAP_HIGH","CONTRACT_GAP_CRITICAL","MEASUREMENT_MISSING","EXECUTION_QUALITY_UNTESTED","EXPANDED_BOUND_UNVERIFIED","PROMOTION_INPUT_TYPE_INVALID","EXPLORATION_STAGE_MISMATCH","VARIATION_UNREGISTERED","TIMEFRAME_SCOPE_MISMATCH","CANDIDATE_BUDGET_EXCEEDED","DUPLICATE_CANDIDATE","EXPLORATION_RESOURCE_LIMIT","LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_UNTESTED","LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_FAILED","LOW_RR_RATIO_UNVERIFIED","COST_AFTER_EDGE_UNVERIFIED","REGIME_SCOPE_MISMATCH","COMBINATION_COMPLEXITY_EXCEEDED","UNBOUNDED_CANDIDATE_EXPANSION","DATA_QUALITY_INSUFFICIENT","CANDIDATE_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN","PAPER_WINNER_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN","SNAPSHOT_WRITER_INPUT_NOT_SNAPSHOT","UNKNOWN_BLOCKED",null]},
    "primary_blocker_message": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "blockers": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "required": ["code", "category", "severity", "blocks_start", "blocks_live_order"],
        "properties": {
          "code": {"type": "string", "enum": ["MIN_EDGE_FAIL","EXPECTED_SLIPPAGE_EXCEEDED","DEPTH_TOO_THIN","DEPTH_EXCHANGE_REJECT_RISK","STALE_ORDERBOOK","STALE_TICKER","STALE_TRADE_TAPE","STALE_CANDLE_15M","STALE_CANDLE_60M","STALE_BENCHMARK_CONTEXT","MARKET_CONTEXT_LOAD_TIMEOUT","API_TIMEOUT","WEBSOCKET_GAP","CLOCK_DRIFT","PRIVATE_WS_UNHEALTHY","DRIFT_UNRECOVERED","SESSION_PAUSE","TICK_SIZE_CLIFF","BALANCE_MISMATCH","MARKET_EVENT_RISK","BREADTH_OFF_BLOCKED","PENDING_CONFIRM_EXISTS","COOLDOWN","CLUSTER_RISK","UNIVERSE_FILTERED","POSITION_LIMIT","TRADE_DISABLED","COLD_START","DATA_UNAVAILABLE","HARD_TRUTH_MISSING","SOFT_TRUTH_UNREGISTERED_FALLBACK","RESOURCE_LIMIT","RESOURCE_LIMIT_BLOCK","LEDGER_INTEGRITY_FAIL","LEDGER_UNAVAILABLE","EXCHANGE_SYNC_REQUIRED","RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED","SYMBOL_RULE_BLOCK","SYMBOL_RULE_UNVERIFIED","FEE_MODEL_UNVERIFIED","FEE_EXCEEDS_EDGE","MARKET_IMPACT_EXCEEDS_EDGE","LIVE_READY_MISSING","USER_APPROVAL_MISSING","PREFLIGHT_FAILED","SNAPSHOT_SCOPE_MISMATCH","API_UNVERIFIED","RISK_VETO","REGIME_MISMATCH","EXCHANGE_POLICY_BLOCK","STRATEGY_NOT_ELIGIBLE","STRATEGY_CONFIDENCE_LOW","KILL_SWITCH_ACTIVE","LATENCY_TTL_EXPIRED","OFFICIAL_API_VERIFICATION_EXPIRED","MANUAL_ORDER_TEST_MISSING","OPERATOR_APPROVAL_MISSING","EMERGENCY_FLATTEN_UNAVAILABLE","SOURCE_IDENTITY_MISMATCH","BUNDLE_HYGIENE_FAIL","READ_ONLY_BURN_IN_MISSING","ORPHAN_POSITION_REVIEW_REQUIRED","ORPHAN_OPEN_ORDER_REVIEW_REQUIRED","LIVE_FINAL_GUARD_FAILED","SCHEMA_IDENTITY_MISMATCH","REGISTRY_DRIFT","GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIRTY","CONTRACT_GAP_HIGH","CONTRACT_GAP_CRITICAL","MEASUREMENT_MISSING","EXECUTION_QUALITY_UNTESTED","EXPANDED_BOUND_UNVERIFIED","PROMOTION_INPUT_TYPE_INVALID","EXPLORATION_STAGE_MISMATCH","VARIATION_UNREGISTERED","TIMEFRAME_SCOPE_MISMATCH","CANDIDATE_BUDGET_EXCEEDED","DUPLICATE_CANDIDATE","EXPLORATION_RESOURCE_LIMIT","LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_UNTESTED","LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_FAILED","LOW_RR_RATIO_UNVERIFIED","COST_AFTER_EDGE_UNVERIFIED","REGIME_SCOPE_MISMATCH","COMBINATION_COMPLEXITY_EXCEEDED","UNBOUNDED_CANDIDATE_EXPANSION","DATA_QUALITY_INSUFFICIENT","CANDIDATE_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN","PAPER_WINNER_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN","SNAPSHOT_WRITER_INPUT_NOT_SNAPSHOT","UNKNOWN_BLOCKED"]},
          "category": {"enum": ["DATA", "LIQUIDITY", "REGIME", "STRATEGY", "RISK", "PORTFOLIO", "EXECUTION", "CONFIG", "READINESS", "OPERATOR", "SECURITY", "BUNDLE"]},
          "severity": {"enum": ["INFO", "LOW", "MEDIUM", "HIGH", "CRITICAL"]},
          "blocks_start": {"type": "boolean"},
          "blocks_live_order": {"type": "boolean"},
          "evidence_id": {"type": ["string", "null"]}
        },
        "additionalProperties": false
      }
    },
    "surface_hash": {"type": "string"}
  },
  "allOf": [
    {
      "if": {"properties": {"live_order_allowed": {"const": true}}, "required": ["live_order_allowed"]},
      "then": {
        "properties": {
          "live_order_ready": {"const": true},
          "can_live_trade": {"const": true},
          "live_trading_status": {"enum": ["SMALL_LIVE_BURN_IN", "LIVE_ACTIVE"]},
          "primary_blocker_code": {"type": "null"},
          "primary_blocker_message": {"type": "null"}
        },
        "not": {
          "properties": {
            "blockers": {
              "contains": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": {"blocks_live_order": {"const": true}},
                "required": ["blocks_live_order"]
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```

```json
        "max_open_orders_per_symbol": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "approved_notional_cap": {
          "type": [
            "number",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "source": {
          "enum": [
            "REGISTRY",
            "LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT",
            "OPERATOR_POLICY",
            "STRICTER_EVIDENCE"
          ]
        }
      },
      "additionalProperties": false
    }
  }
}
```

### 2.3 manual_order_test_evidence.schema.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "trader1.manual_order_test_evidence.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "test_id",
    "created_at_utc",
    "expires_at_utc",
    "exchange",
    "market_type",
    "mode",
    "api_key_id_hash",
    "symbol",
    "submit_result",
    "reconciliation_result",
    "ledger_recorded",
    "result",
    "evidence_manifest_hash"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {"const": "trader1.manual_order_test_evidence.v1"},
    "test_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "created_at_utc": {"type": "string"},
    "expires_at_utc": {"type": "string"},
    "exchange": {"enum": ["UPBIT", "BINANCE"]},
    "market_type": {"enum": ["KRW_SPOT", "SPOT", "FUTURES_USDT_M"]},
    "mode": {"const": "LIVE"},
    "api_key_id_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "symbol": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "order_type": {"enum": ["LIMIT", "MARKET", "CANCEL_ONLY", "REDUCE_ONLY", "STOP_MARKET", "TAKE_PROFIT", "TRAILING_STOP", "NOT_APPLICABLE"]},
    "notional": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "submit_result": {"enum": ["PASS", "FAIL", "SKIPPED"]},
    "cancel_result": {"enum": ["PASS", "FAIL", "NOT_APPLICABLE"]},
    "fill_result": {"enum": ["NO_FILL", "PARTIAL", "FILLED", "NOT_APPLICABLE"]},
    "ledger_recorded": {"type": "boolean"},
    "reconciliation_result": {"enum": ["PASS", "FAIL"]},
    "fee_recorded": {"type": "boolean"},
    "balance_delta_verified": {"type": "boolean"},
    "order_id_masked": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "blockers": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string", "enum": ["MIN_EDGE_FAIL","EXPECTED_SLIPPAGE_EXCEEDED","DEPTH_TOO_THIN","DEPTH_EXCHANGE_REJECT_RISK","STALE_ORDERBOOK","STALE_TICKER","STALE_TRADE_TAPE","STALE_CANDLE_15M","STALE_CANDLE_60M","STALE_BENCHMARK_CONTEXT","MARKET_CONTEXT_LOAD_TIMEOUT","API_TIMEOUT","WEBSOCKET_GAP","CLOCK_DRIFT","PRIVATE_WS_UNHEALTHY","DRIFT_UNRECOVERED","SESSION_PAUSE","TICK_SIZE_CLIFF","BALANCE_MISMATCH","MARKET_EVENT_RISK","BREADTH_OFF_BLOCKED","PENDING_CONFIRM_EXISTS","COOLDOWN","CLUSTER_RISK","UNIVERSE_FILTERED","POSITION_LIMIT","TRADE_DISABLED","COLD_START","DATA_UNAVAILABLE","HARD_TRUTH_MISSING","SOFT_TRUTH_UNREGISTERED_FALLBACK","RESOURCE_LIMIT","RESOURCE_LIMIT_BLOCK","LEDGER_INTEGRITY_FAIL","LEDGER_UNAVAILABLE","EXCHANGE_SYNC_REQUIRED","RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED","SYMBOL_RULE_BLOCK","SYMBOL_RULE_UNVERIFIED","FEE_MODEL_UNVERIFIED","FEE_EXCEEDS_EDGE","MARKET_IMPACT_EXCEEDS_EDGE","LIVE_READY_MISSING","USER_APPROVAL_MISSING","PREFLIGHT_FAILED","SNAPSHOT_SCOPE_MISMATCH","API_UNVERIFIED","RISK_VETO","REGIME_MISMATCH","EXCHANGE_POLICY_BLOCK","STRATEGY_NOT_ELIGIBLE","STRATEGY_CONFIDENCE_LOW","KILL_SWITCH_ACTIVE","LATENCY_TTL_EXPIRED","OFFICIAL_API_VERIFICATION_EXPIRED","MANUAL_ORDER_TEST_MISSING","OPERATOR_APPROVAL_MISSING","EMERGENCY_FLATTEN_UNAVAILABLE","SOURCE_IDENTITY_MISMATCH","BUNDLE_HYGIENE_FAIL","READ_ONLY_BURN_IN_MISSING","ORPHAN_POSITION_REVIEW_REQUIRED","ORPHAN_OPEN_ORDER_REVIEW_REQUIRED","LIVE_FINAL_GUARD_FAILED","SCHEMA_IDENTITY_MISMATCH","REGISTRY_DRIFT","GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIRTY","CONTRACT_GAP_HIGH","CONTRACT_GAP_CRITICAL","MEASUREMENT_MISSING","EXECUTION_QUALITY_UNTESTED","EXPANDED_BOUND_UNVERIFIED","PROMOTION_INPUT_TYPE_INVALID","EXPLORATION_STAGE_MISMATCH","VARIATION_UNREGISTERED","TIMEFRAME_SCOPE_MISMATCH","CANDIDATE_BUDGET_EXCEEDED","DUPLICATE_CANDIDATE","EXPLORATION_RESOURCE_LIMIT","LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_UNTESTED","LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_FAILED","LOW_RR_RATIO_UNVERIFIED","COST_AFTER_EDGE_UNVERIFIED","REGIME_SCOPE_MISMATCH","COMBINATION_COMPLEXITY_EXCEEDED","UNBOUNDED_CANDIDATE_EXPANSION","DATA_QUALITY_INSUFFICIENT","CANDIDATE_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN","PAPER_WINNER_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN","SNAPSHOT_WRITER_INPUT_NOT_SNAPSHOT","UNKNOWN_BLOCKED"]}},
    "evidence_manifest_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "result": {"enum": ["PASS", "FAIL", "PARTIAL"]}
  },
  "allOf": [
    {
      "if": {"properties": {"result": {"const": "PASS"}}, "required": ["result"]},
      "then": {
        "properties": {
          "submit_result": {"const": "PASS"},
          "reconciliation_result": {"const": "PASS"},
          "ledger_recorded": {"const": true},
          "blockers": {"maxItems": 0}
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```

### 2.4 final_decision.schema.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "trader1.final_decision.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "decision_id",
    "created_at_utc",
    "mode",
    "exchange",
    "market_type",
    "session_id",
    "final_decision",
    "priority_path",
    "risk_veto",
    "input_hash",
    "output_hash"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {"const": "trader1.final_decision.v1"},
    "decision_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "created_at_utc": {"type": "string"},
    "mode": {"enum": ["REPLAY", "PAPER", "SHADOW", "LIVE", "SAFE", "READ_ONLY"]},
    "exchange": {"enum": ["UPBIT", "BINANCE"]},
    "market_type": {"enum": ["KRW_SPOT", "SPOT", "FUTURES_USDT_M"]},
    "session_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "strategy_id": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "strategy_build_id": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "parameter_hash": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "symbol": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "side": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["BUY", "SELL", "LONG", "SHORT", "REDUCE", "EXIT", null]},
    "final_decision": {"enum": ["ENTER_LONG", "ENTER_SHORT", "EXIT_POSITION", "REDUCE_POSITION", "CANCEL_ORDER", "HOLD_POSITION", "NO_TRADE", "SAFE_MODE", "RECONCILE_REQUIRED", "TRADE_DISABLED", "KILL_SWITCH", "BLOCKED"]},
    "priority_path": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}, "minItems": 1},
    "blocking_reason": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["MIN_EDGE_FAIL","EXPECTED_SLIPPAGE_EXCEEDED","DEPTH_TOO_THIN","DEPTH_EXCHANGE_REJECT_RISK","STALE_ORDERBOOK","STALE_TICKER","STALE_TRADE_TAPE","STALE_CANDLE_15M","STALE_CANDLE_60M","STALE_BENCHMARK_CONTEXT","MARKET_CONTEXT_LOAD_TIMEOUT","API_TIMEOUT","WEBSOCKET_GAP","CLOCK_DRIFT","PRIVATE_WS_UNHEALTHY","DRIFT_UNRECOVERED","SESSION_PAUSE","TICK_SIZE_CLIFF","BALANCE_MISMATCH","MARKET_EVENT_RISK","BREADTH_OFF_BLOCKED","PENDING_CONFIRM_EXISTS","COOLDOWN","CLUSTER_RISK","UNIVERSE_FILTERED","POSITION_LIMIT","TRADE_DISABLED","COLD_START","DATA_UNAVAILABLE","HARD_TRUTH_MISSING","SOFT_TRUTH_UNREGISTERED_FALLBACK","RESOURCE_LIMIT","RESOURCE_LIMIT_BLOCK","LEDGER_INTEGRITY_FAIL","LEDGER_UNAVAILABLE","EXCHANGE_SYNC_REQUIRED","RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED","SYMBOL_RULE_BLOCK","SYMBOL_RULE_UNVERIFIED","FEE_MODEL_UNVERIFIED","FEE_EXCEEDS_EDGE","MARKET_IMPACT_EXCEEDS_EDGE","LIVE_READY_MISSING","USER_APPROVAL_MISSING","PREFLIGHT_FAILED","SNAPSHOT_SCOPE_MISMATCH","API_UNVERIFIED","RISK_VETO","REGIME_MISMATCH","EXCHANGE_POLICY_BLOCK","STRATEGY_NOT_ELIGIBLE","STRATEGY_CONFIDENCE_LOW","KILL_SWITCH_ACTIVE","LATENCY_TTL_EXPIRED","OFFICIAL_API_VERIFICATION_EXPIRED","MANUAL_ORDER_TEST_MISSING","OPERATOR_APPROVAL_MISSING","EMERGENCY_FLATTEN_UNAVAILABLE","SOURCE_IDENTITY_MISMATCH","BUNDLE_HYGIENE_FAIL","READ_ONLY_BURN_IN_MISSING","ORPHAN_POSITION_REVIEW_REQUIRED","ORPHAN_OPEN_ORDER_REVIEW_REQUIRED","LIVE_FINAL_GUARD_FAILED","SCHEMA_IDENTITY_MISMATCH","REGISTRY_DRIFT","GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIRTY","CONTRACT_GAP_HIGH","CONTRACT_GAP_CRITICAL","MEASUREMENT_MISSING","EXECUTION_QUALITY_UNTESTED","EXPANDED_BOUND_UNVERIFIED","PROMOTION_INPUT_TYPE_INVALID","EXPLORATION_STAGE_MISMATCH","VARIATION_UNREGISTERED","TIMEFRAME_SCOPE_MISMATCH","CANDIDATE_BUDGET_EXCEEDED","DUPLICATE_CANDIDATE","EXPLORATION_RESOURCE_LIMIT","LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_UNTESTED","LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_FAILED","LOW_RR_RATIO_UNVERIFIED","COST_AFTER_EDGE_UNVERIFIED","REGIME_SCOPE_MISMATCH","COMBINATION_COMPLEXITY_EXCEEDED","UNBOUNDED_CANDIDATE_EXPANSION","DATA_QUALITY_INSUFFICIENT","CANDIDATE_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN","PAPER_WINNER_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN","SNAPSHOT_WRITER_INPUT_NOT_SNAPSHOT","UNKNOWN_BLOCKED",null]},
    "risk_veto": {"type": "boolean"},
    "regime": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "expected_edge_bps": {"type": ["number", "null"]},
    "expected_fee_bps": {"type": ["number", "null"]},
    "expected_spread_cost_bps": {"type": ["number", "null"]},
    "expected_slippage_bps": {"type": ["number", "null"]},
    "expected_impact_bps": {"type": ["number", "null"]},
    "expected_latency_cost_bps": {"type": ["number", "null"]},
    "expected_funding_cost_bps": {"type": ["number", "null"]},
    "confidence_score": {"type": ["number", "null"]},
    "approved_notional": {"type": ["number", "null"]},
    "idempotency_key": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "input_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "output_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}
  },
  "allOf": [
    {
      "if": {"properties": {"mode": {"const": "LIVE"}, "final_decision": {"enum": ["ENTER_LONG", "ENTER_SHORT", "EXIT_POSITION", "REDUCE_POSITION", "CANCEL_ORDER"]}}, "required": ["mode", "final_decision"]},
      "then": {
        "required": ["idempotency_key", "symbol"],
        "properties": {
          "idempotency_key": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
          "symbol": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "if": {"properties": {"market_type": {"enum": ["KRW_SPOT", "SPOT"]}, "final_decision": {"const": "ENTER_SHORT"}}, "required": ["market_type", "final_decision"]},
      "then": false
    },
    {
      "if": {"properties": {"final_decision": {"enum": ["NO_TRADE", "SAFE_MODE", "RECONCILE_REQUIRED", "TRADE_DISABLED", "KILL_SWITCH", "BLOCKED"]}}, "required": ["final_decision"]},
      "then": {
        "required": ["blocking_reason"],
        "properties": {"blocking_reason": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}}
      }
    }
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```

### 2.5 ledger_event.schema.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "trader1.ledger_event.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "event_id",
    "event_time_utc",
    "mode",
    "exchange",
    "market_type",
    "session_id",
    "event_type",
    "source",
    "dedup_key",
    "event_hash"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {
      "const": "trader1.ledger_event.v1"
    },
    "event_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "event_time_utc": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "exchange_time": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "mode": {
      "enum": [
        "REPLAY",
        "PAPER",
        "SHADOW",
        "LIVE",
        "SAFE",
        "READ_ONLY"
      ]
    },
    "exchange": {
      "enum": [
        "UPBIT",
        "BINANCE"
      ]
    },
    "market_type": {
      "enum": [
        "KRW_SPOT",
        "SPOT",
        "FUTURES_USDT_M"
      ]
    },
    "session_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "event_type": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/ledger_event_type"
    },
    "order_id": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "client_order_id": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "intent_id": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "symbol": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "side": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "quantity": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "price": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "fee_amount": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "fee_asset": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "funding_fee_amount": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "realized_pnl": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "unrealized_pnl": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "balance_delta": {
      "type": [
        "object",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "position_delta": {
      "type": [
        "object",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "source": {
      "enum": [
        "LOCAL",
        "EXCHANGE_REST",
        "EXCHANGE_WS",
        "RECONCILIATION",
        "OPERATOR",
        "SYSTEM"
      ]
    },
    "dedup_key": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "previous_hash": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "event_hash": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    }
  },
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "$defs": {
    "ledger_event_type": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": [
        "ORDER_INTENT_CREATED",
        "BUDGET_RESERVED",
        "ORDER_SUBMIT_STARTED",
        "ORDER_SUBMITTED",
        "ORDER_ACK_RECEIVED",
        "ORDER_OPENED",
        "PARTIAL_FILL_RECEIVED",
        "ORDER_FILLED",
        "ORDER_CANCEL_REQUESTED",
        "ORDER_CANCELED",
        "ORDER_REJECTED",
        "ORDER_EXPIRED",
        "ORDER_RECONCILE_REQUIRED",
        "ORDER_RECONCILED",
        "RESERVATION_RELEASED",
        "LEDGER_CORRECTION_RECORDED",
        "RISK_REDUCTION_ACTION_RECORDED"
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

### 2.6 summary.schema.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "trader1.summary.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "project",
    "generated_at_utc",
    "exchange",
    "market_type",
    "mode",
    "session_id",
    "engine",
    "startup",
    "operator_status",
    "resources",
    "portfolio",
    "orders",
    "positions",
    "strategies",
    "action_queue",
    "recent_errors",
    "recent_no_trade_context",
    "live_ready",
    "final_action",
    "blocking_reason",
    "next_action"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {
      "const": "trader1.summary.v1"
    },
    "project": {
      "const": "TRADER_1"
    },
    "generated_at_utc": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "exchange": {
      "enum": [
        "UPBIT",
        "BINANCE"
      ]
    },
    "market_type": {
      "enum": [
        "KRW_SPOT",
        "SPOT",
        "FUTURES_USDT_M"
      ]
    },
    "mode": {
      "enum": [
        "REPLAY",
        "PAPER",
        "SHADOW",
        "LIVE",
        "SAFE",
        "READ_ONLY"
      ]
    },
    "session_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "engine": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/status_source_object"
    },
    "startup": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/status_source_object"
    },
    "operator_status": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/status_source_object"
    },
    "connectivity": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/status_source_object"
    },
    "caches": {
      "type": "object"
    },
    "queues": {
      "type": "object"
    },
    "rate_limits": {
      "type": "object"
    },
    "resources": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/status_source_object"
    },
    "portfolio": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/portfolio_object"
    },
    "orders": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/orders_object"
    },
    "watch_universe": {
      "type": "array"
    },
    "entry_candidates": {
      "type": "array"
    },
    "positions": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/positions_array"
    },
    "strategies": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/strategies_array"
    },
    "market_context": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/market_context_object"
    },
    "action_queue": {
      "type": "array"
    },
    "recent_errors": {
      "type": "array"
    },
    "recent_no_trade_context": {
      "type": "array"
    },
    "recent_entry_context": {
      "type": "array"
    },
    "fee_snapshot": {
      "type": [
        "object",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "live_ready": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/live_ready_object"
    },
    "applied_snapshot": {
      "type": [
        "object",
        "null"
      ],
      "oneOf": [
        {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/applied_snapshot_object"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ]
    },
    "final_action": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "blocking_reason": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ],
      "enum": [
        "MIN_EDGE_FAIL",
        "EXPECTED_SLIPPAGE_EXCEEDED",
        "DEPTH_TOO_THIN",
        "DEPTH_EXCHANGE_REJECT_RISK",
        "STALE_ORDERBOOK",
        "STALE_TICKER",
        "STALE_TRADE_TAPE",
        "STALE_CANDLE_15M",
        "STALE_CANDLE_60M",
        "STALE_BENCHMARK_CONTEXT",
        "MARKET_CONTEXT_LOAD_TIMEOUT",
        "API_TIMEOUT",
        "WEBSOCKET_GAP",
        "CLOCK_DRIFT",
        "PRIVATE_WS_UNHEALTHY",
        "DRIFT_UNRECOVERED",
        "SESSION_PAUSE",
        "TICK_SIZE_CLIFF",
        "BALANCE_MISMATCH",
        "MARKET_EVENT_RISK",
        "BREADTH_OFF_BLOCKED",
        "PENDING_CONFIRM_EXISTS",
        "COOLDOWN",
        "CLUSTER_RISK",
        "UNIVERSE_FILTERED",
        "POSITION_LIMIT",
        "TRADE_DISABLED",
        "COLD_START",
        "DATA_UNAVAILABLE",
        "HARD_TRUTH_MISSING",
        "SOFT_TRUTH_UNREGISTERED_FALLBACK",
        "RESOURCE_LIMIT",
        "RESOURCE_LIMIT_BLOCK",
        "LEDGER_INTEGRITY_FAIL",
        "LEDGER_UNAVAILABLE",

        "SYMBOL_RULE_UNVERIFIED",

        "FEE_EXCEEDS_EDGE",

        "EXCHANGE_POLICY_BLOCK",

        "OFFICIAL_API_VERIFICATION_EXPIRED",
        "MANUAL_ORDER_TEST_MISSING",
        "OPERATOR_APPROVAL_MISSING",
        "EMERGENCY_FLATTEN_UNAVAILABLE",
        "SOURCE_IDENTITY_MISMATCH",
        "BUNDLE_HYGIENE_FAIL",
        "READ_ONLY_BURN_IN_MISSING",
        "ORPHAN_POSITION_REVIEW_REQUIRED",
        "ORPHAN_OPEN_ORDER_REVIEW_REQUIRED",
        "LIVE_FINAL_GUARD_FAILED",
        "SCHEMA_IDENTITY_MISMATCH",
        "REGISTRY_DRIFT",
        "GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIRTY",
        "CONTRACT_GAP_HIGH",
        "CONTRACT_GAP_CRITICAL",

        "EXPANDED_BOUND_UNVERIFIED",
        "PROMOTION_INPUT_TYPE_INVALID",
        "EXPLORATION_STAGE_MISMATCH",
        "VARIATION_UNREGISTERED",
        "TIMEFRAME_SCOPE_MISMATCH",
        "CANDIDATE_BUDGET_EXCEEDED",
        "DUPLICATE_CANDIDATE",
        "EXPLORATION_RESOURCE_LIMIT",
        "LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_UNTESTED",

        "COMBINATION_COMPLEXITY_EXCEEDED",
        "UNBOUNDED_CANDIDATE_EXPANSION",
        "DATA_QUALITY_INSUFFICIENT",
        "CANDIDATE_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN",
        "PAPER_WINNER_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN",
        "SNAPSHOT_WRITER_INPUT_NOT_SNAPSHOT",
        "UNKNOWN_BLOCKED",
        null
      ]
    },
    "next_action": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    }
  },
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "$defs": {
    "status_source_object": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "status",
        "source",
        "freshness_status"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "status": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "source": {
          "enum": [
            "LEDGER",
            "RECONCILIATION",
            "SUMMARY_BUILDER",
            "READINESS_SURFACE",
            "HEARTBEAT",
            "STARTUP_PROBE",
            "OPERATOR",
            "SYSTEM"
          ]
        },
        "freshness_status": {
          "enum": [
            "PASS",
            "WARN",
            "FAIL",
            "STALE",
            "UNTESTED"
          ]
        },
        "evidence_id": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "message": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ]
        }
      },
      "additionalProperties": false
    },
    "portfolio_object": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "source",
        "freshness_status",
        "equity",
        "cash_available",
        "locked_balance"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "source": {
          "enum": [
            "LEDGER",
            "RECONCILIATION",
            "SUMMARY_BUILDER"
          ]
        },
        "freshness_status": {
          "enum": [
            "PASS",
            "WARN",
            "FAIL",
            "STALE",
            "UNTESTED"
          ]
        },
        "equity": {
          "type": [
            "number",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "cash_available": {
          "type": [
            "number",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "locked_balance": {
          "type": [
            "number",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "realized_pnl": {
          "type": [
            "number",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "unrealized_pnl": {
          "type": [
            "number",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "mdd": {
          "type": [
            "number",
            "null"
          ]
        }
      },
      "additionalProperties": false
    },
    "orders_object": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "source",
        "freshness_status",
        "open_order_count",
        "pending_confirm_count"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "source": {
          "enum": [
            "LEDGER",
            "RECONCILIATION",
            "SUMMARY_BUILDER"
          ]
        },
        "freshness_status": {
          "enum": [
            "PASS",
            "WARN",
            "FAIL",
            "STALE",
            "UNTESTED"
          ]
        },
        "open_order_count": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "pending_confirm_count": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "reconciliation_age_sec": {
          "type": [
            "number",
            "null"
          ]
        }
      },
      "additionalProperties": false
    },
    "live_ready_object": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "source",
        "live_order_ready",
        "live_order_allowed",
        "primary_blocker_code",
        "blocks_live_order"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "source": {
          "enum": [
            "READINESS_SURFACE",
            "SUMMARY_BUILDER"
          ]
        },
        "live_order_ready": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "live_order_allowed": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "primary_blocker_code": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "enum": [
            "MIN_EDGE_FAIL",
            "EXPECTED_SLIPPAGE_EXCEEDED",
            "DEPTH_TOO_THIN",
            "DEPTH_EXCHANGE_REJECT_RISK",
            "STALE_ORDERBOOK",
            "STALE_TICKER",
            "STALE_TRADE_TAPE",
            "STALE_CANDLE_15M",
            "STALE_CANDLE_60M",
            "STALE_BENCHMARK_CONTEXT",
            "MARKET_CONTEXT_LOAD_TIMEOUT",
            "API_TIMEOUT",
            "WEBSOCKET_GAP",
            "CLOCK_DRIFT",
            "PRIVATE_WS_UNHEALTHY",
            "DRIFT_UNRECOVERED",
            "SESSION_PAUSE",
            "TICK_SIZE_CLIFF",
            "BALANCE_MISMATCH",
            "MARKET_EVENT_RISK",
            "BREADTH_OFF_BLOCKED",
            "PENDING_CONFIRM_EXISTS",
            "COOLDOWN",
            "CLUSTER_RISK",
            "UNIVERSE_FILTERED",
            "POSITION_LIMIT",
            "TRADE_DISABLED",
            "COLD_START",
            "DATA_UNAVAILABLE",
            "HARD_TRUTH_MISSING",
            "SOFT_TRUTH_UNREGISTERED_FALLBACK",
            "RESOURCE_LIMIT",
            "RESOURCE_LIMIT_BLOCK",
            "LEDGER_INTEGRITY_FAIL",
            "LEDGER_UNAVAILABLE",
            "EXCHANGE_SYNC_REQUIRED",
            "RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED",
            "SYMBOL_RULE_BLOCK",
            "SYMBOL_RULE_UNVERIFIED",
            "FEE_MODEL_UNVERIFIED",
            "FEE_EXCEEDS_EDGE",
            "MARKET_IMPACT_EXCEEDS_EDGE",
            "LIVE_READY_MISSING",
            "USER_APPROVAL_MISSING",
            "PREFLIGHT_FAILED",
            "SNAPSHOT_SCOPE_MISMATCH",
            "API_UNVERIFIED",
            "RISK_VETO",
            "REGIME_MISMATCH",
            "EXCHANGE_POLICY_BLOCK",
            "STRATEGY_NOT_ELIGIBLE",
            "STRATEGY_CONFIDENCE_LOW",
            "KILL_SWITCH_ACTIVE",
            "LATENCY_TTL_EXPIRED",
            "OFFICIAL_API_VERIFICATION_EXPIRED",
            "MANUAL_ORDER_TEST_MISSING",
            "OPERATOR_APPROVAL_MISSING",
            "EMERGENCY_FLATTEN_UNAVAILABLE",
            "SOURCE_IDENTITY_MISMATCH",
            "BUNDLE_HYGIENE_FAIL",
            "READ_ONLY_BURN_IN_MISSING",
            "ORPHAN_POSITION_REVIEW_REQUIRED",
            "ORPHAN_OPEN_ORDER_REVIEW_REQUIRED",
            "LIVE_FINAL_GUARD_FAILED",
            "SCHEMA_IDENTITY_MISMATCH",
            "REGISTRY_DRIFT",
            "GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIRTY",
            "CONTRACT_GAP_HIGH",
            "CONTRACT_GAP_CRITICAL",
            "MEASUREMENT_MISSING",
            "EXECUTION_QUALITY_UNTESTED",
            "EXPANDED_BOUND_UNVERIFIED",
            "PROMOTION_INPUT_TYPE_INVALID",
            "EXPLORATION_STAGE_MISMATCH",
            "VARIATION_UNREGISTERED",
            "TIMEFRAME_SCOPE_MISMATCH",
            "CANDIDATE_BUDGET_EXCEEDED",
            "DUPLICATE_CANDIDATE",
            "EXPLORATION_RESOURCE_LIMIT",
            "LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_UNTESTED",
            "LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_FAILED",
            "LOW_RR_RATIO_UNVERIFIED",
            "COST_AFTER_EDGE_UNVERIFIED",
            "REGIME_SCOPE_MISMATCH",
            "COMBINATION_COMPLEXITY_EXCEEDED",
            "UNBOUNDED_CANDIDATE_EXPANSION",
            "DATA_QUALITY_INSUFFICIENT",
            "CANDIDATE_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN",
            "PAPER_WINNER_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN",
            "SNAPSHOT_WRITER_INPUT_NOT_SNAPSHOT",
            "UNKNOWN_BLOCKED",
            null
          ]
        },
        "primary_blocker_message": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "blocks_live_order": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "evidence_id": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ]
        }
      },
      "additionalProperties": false
    },
    "positions_array": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": true
      }
    },
    "strategies_array": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": true
      }
    },
    "market_context_object": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "source",
        "freshness_status"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "source": {
          "enum": [
            "SUMMARY_BUILDER",
            "MARKET_DATA",
            "READINESS_SURFACE"
          ]
        },
        "freshness_status": {
          "enum": [
            "PASS",
            "WARN",
            "FAIL",
            "STALE",
            "UNTESTED"
          ]
        },
        "regime": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "liquidity_status": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "volatility_status": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ]
        }
      },
      "additionalProperties": false
    },
    "applied_snapshot_object": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "snapshot_id",
        "source",
        "scope_hash"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "snapshot_id": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "source": {
          "enum": [
            "LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT",
            "NONE"
          ]
        },
        "scope_hash": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "freshness_status": {
          "enum": [
            "PASS",
            "WARN",
            "FAIL",
            "STALE",
            "UNTESTED"
          ]
        }
      },
      "additionalProperties": false
    }
  }
}
```

### 2.7 evidence_manifest.schema.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "trader1.evidence_manifest.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "evidence_pack_id",
    "created_at_utc",
    "stage_id",
    "authority_document",
    "registry_hash",
    "source_tree_hash",
    "items",
    "blocking_defect_count",
    "unresolved_minor_defects",
    "known_blockers",
    "next_allowed_stage",
    "pack_hash"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {"const": "trader1.evidence_manifest.v1"},
    "evidence_pack_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "created_at_utc": {"type": "string"},
    "stage_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "exchange": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["UPBIT", "BINANCE", null]},
    "market_type": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["KRW_SPOT", "SPOT", "FUTURES_USDT_M", null]},
    "mode": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["REPLAY", "PAPER", "SHADOW", "LIVE", "SAFE", "READ_ONLY", null]},
    "session_id": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "strategy_id": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "strategy_build_id": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "parameter_hash": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "authority_document": {"const": "TRADER_1.md"},
    "authority_sha256": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "registry_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "source_tree_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "validator_run_id": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "items": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "required": ["path", "role", "sha256", "size_bytes", "redaction_status", "contains_secret", "contains_account_identifier"],
        "properties": {
          "path": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
          "role": {"enum": ["VALIDATOR_LOG", "SUMMARY", "LEDGER_EXTRACT", "REPLAY_RESULT", "PAPER_RESULT", "SHADOW_RESULT", "LIVE_RESULT", "API_VERIFICATION", "OPERATOR_APPROVAL", "MANIFEST", "BUNDLE_REPORT", "SOURCE_IDENTITY", "CONTRACT_GAP"]},
          "sha256": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
          "size_bytes": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0},
          "redaction_status": {"enum": ["NOT_NEEDED", "REDACTED", "REDACTION_REQUIRED", "FAILED"]},
          "contains_secret": {"type": "boolean"},
          "contains_account_identifier": {"type": "boolean"}
        },
        "additionalProperties": false
      }
    },
    "blocking_defect_count": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0},
    "unresolved_minor_defects": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0},
    "known_blockers": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string", "pattern": "^([A-Z0-9_]+|[a-z0-9_]+_validator|contract_gap:[A-Za-z0-9_.:-]+)$", "description": "MUST be a registry-backed no_trade_reason, live_blocker_code, validator_id, or contract_gap_id."}},
    "next_allowed_stage": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "pack_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}
  },
  "allOf": [
    {
      "if": {"properties": {"blocking_defect_count": {"const": 0}}, "required": ["blocking_defect_count"]},
      "then": true
    }
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```

### 2.8 official_api_verification_report.schema.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "trader1.official_api_verification_report.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "verification_id",
    "created_at_utc",
    "verified_at_utc",
    "expires_at_utc",
    "exchange",
    "market_type",
    "verification_scope",
    "verifier",
    "official_sources",
    "facts",
    "result",
    "blockers",
    "invalidated_by",
    "evidence_manifest_hash",
    "report_hash",
    "signature"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {"const": "trader1.official_api_verification_report.v1"},
    "verification_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "created_at_utc": {"type": "string"},
    "verified_at_utc": {"type": "string"},
    "expires_at_utc": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "exchange": {"enum": ["UPBIT", "BINANCE"]},
    "market_type": {"enum": ["KRW_SPOT", "SPOT", "FUTURES_USDT_M"]},
    "verification_scope": {"type": "array", "items": {"enum": ["auth", "permissions", "symbol_rules", "fees", "rate_limits", "order_types", "websocket", "account_snapshot", "open_order_snapshot", "position_snapshot", "reconciliation", "margin", "funding", "liquidation"]}},
    "verifier": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": ["verifier_type", "verifier_id_hash", "tool_name", "tool_version"],
      "properties": {
        "verifier_type": {"enum": ["HUMAN", "AUTOMATED", "MIXED"]},
        "verifier_id_hash": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
        "tool_name": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
        "tool_version": {"type": ["string", "null"]}
      },
      "additionalProperties": false
    },
    "official_sources": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "required": ["source_name", "source_url_or_doc_id", "captured_at_utc", "content_sha256", "relevant_sections"],
        "properties": {
          "source_name": {"type": "string"},
          "source_url_or_doc_id": {"type": "string"},
          "captured_at_utc": {"type": "string"},
          "content_sha256": {"type": "string"},
          "relevant_sections": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}}
        },
        "additionalProperties": false
      }
    },
    "facts": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": ["symbol_rules", "fee_rules", "rate_limits", "auth_requirements", "permission_requirements", "order_constraints", "websocket_requirements"],
      "properties": {
        "symbol_rules": {"type": "object"},
        "fee_rules": {"type": "object"},
        "rate_limits": {"type": "object"},
        "auth_requirements": {"type": "object"},
        "permission_requirements": {"type": "object"},
        "order_constraints": {"type": "object"},
        "websocket_requirements": {"type": "object"},
        "margin_rules": {"type": ["object", "null"]},
        "funding_rules": {"type": ["object", "null"]},
        "liquidation_rules": {"type": ["object", "null"]}
      },
      "additionalProperties": false
    },
    "result": {"enum": ["PASS", "FAIL", "PARTIAL", "STALE", "UNVERIFIED"]},
    "blockers": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "required": ["code", "severity", "message"],
        "properties": {
          "code": {"type": "string", "enum": ["MIN_EDGE_FAIL","EXPECTED_SLIPPAGE_EXCEEDED","DEPTH_TOO_THIN","DEPTH_EXCHANGE_REJECT_RISK","STALE_ORDERBOOK","STALE_TICKER","STALE_TRADE_TAPE","STALE_CANDLE_15M","STALE_CANDLE_60M","STALE_BENCHMARK_CONTEXT","MARKET_CONTEXT_LOAD_TIMEOUT","API_TIMEOUT","WEBSOCKET_GAP","CLOCK_DRIFT","PRIVATE_WS_UNHEALTHY","DRIFT_UNRECOVERED","SESSION_PAUSE","TICK_SIZE_CLIFF","BALANCE_MISMATCH","MARKET_EVENT_RISK","BREADTH_OFF_BLOCKED","PENDING_CONFIRM_EXISTS","COOLDOWN","CLUSTER_RISK","UNIVERSE_FILTERED","POSITION_LIMIT","TRADE_DISABLED","COLD_START","DATA_UNAVAILABLE","HARD_TRUTH_MISSING","SOFT_TRUTH_UNREGISTERED_FALLBACK","RESOURCE_LIMIT","RESOURCE_LIMIT_BLOCK","LEDGER_INTEGRITY_FAIL","LEDGER_UNAVAILABLE","EXCHANGE_SYNC_REQUIRED","RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED","SYMBOL_RULE_BLOCK","SYMBOL_RULE_UNVERIFIED","FEE_MODEL_UNVERIFIED","FEE_EXCEEDS_EDGE","MARKET_IMPACT_EXCEEDS_EDGE","LIVE_READY_MISSING","USER_APPROVAL_MISSING","PREFLIGHT_FAILED","SNAPSHOT_SCOPE_MISMATCH","API_UNVERIFIED","RISK_VETO","REGIME_MISMATCH","EXCHANGE_POLICY_BLOCK","STRATEGY_NOT_ELIGIBLE","STRATEGY_CONFIDENCE_LOW","KILL_SWITCH_ACTIVE","LATENCY_TTL_EXPIRED","OFFICIAL_API_VERIFICATION_EXPIRED","MANUAL_ORDER_TEST_MISSING","OPERATOR_APPROVAL_MISSING","EMERGENCY_FLATTEN_UNAVAILABLE","SOURCE_IDENTITY_MISMATCH","BUNDLE_HYGIENE_FAIL","READ_ONLY_BURN_IN_MISSING","ORPHAN_POSITION_REVIEW_REQUIRED","ORPHAN_OPEN_ORDER_REVIEW_REQUIRED","LIVE_FINAL_GUARD_FAILED","SCHEMA_IDENTITY_MISMATCH","REGISTRY_DRIFT","GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIRTY","CONTRACT_GAP_HIGH","CONTRACT_GAP_CRITICAL","MEASUREMENT_MISSING","EXECUTION_QUALITY_UNTESTED","EXPANDED_BOUND_UNVERIFIED","PROMOTION_INPUT_TYPE_INVALID","EXPLORATION_STAGE_MISMATCH","VARIATION_UNREGISTERED","TIMEFRAME_SCOPE_MISMATCH","CANDIDATE_BUDGET_EXCEEDED","DUPLICATE_CANDIDATE","EXPLORATION_RESOURCE_LIMIT","LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_UNTESTED","LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_FAILED","LOW_RR_RATIO_UNVERIFIED","COST_AFTER_EDGE_UNVERIFIED","REGIME_SCOPE_MISMATCH","COMBINATION_COMPLEXITY_EXCEEDED","UNBOUNDED_CANDIDATE_EXPANSION","DATA_QUALITY_INSUFFICIENT","CANDIDATE_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN","PAPER_WINNER_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN","SNAPSHOT_WRITER_INPUT_NOT_SNAPSHOT","UNKNOWN_BLOCKED"]},
          "severity": {"enum": ["INFO", "LOW", "MEDIUM", "HIGH", "CRITICAL"]},
          "message": {"type": "string"}
        },
        "additionalProperties": false
      }
    },
    "invalidated_by": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}},
    "evidence_manifest_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "report_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "signature": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": ["signature_type", "signature_hash"],
      "properties": {
        "signature_type": {"enum": ["NONE", "LOCAL_SIGNED", "CI_SIGNED"]},
        "signature_hash": {"type": ["string", "null"]}
      },
      "additionalProperties": false
    }
  },
  "allOf": [
    {
      "if": {"properties": {"result": {"const": "PASS"}}, "required": ["result"]},
      "then": {
        "properties": {
          "expires_at_utc": {"type": "string"},
          "official_sources": {"minItems": 1},
          "blockers": {"maxItems": 0},
          "invalidated_by": {"maxItems": 0}
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```

### 2.9 validator_result.schema.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "trader1.validator_result.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "validator_id",
    "run_id",
    "started_at_utc",
    "finished_at_utc",
    "expires_at_utc",
    "scope_hash",
    "status",
    "blocking",
    "dependencies",
    "artifacts",
    "result_hash"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {"const": "trader1.validator_result.v1"},
    "validator_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "run_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "started_at_utc": {"type": "string"},
    "finished_at_utc": {"type": "string"},
    "expires_at_utc": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "exchange": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["UPBIT", "BINANCE", null]},
    "market_type": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["KRW_SPOT", "SPOT", "FUTURES_USDT_M", null]},
    "mode": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["REPLAY", "PAPER", "SHADOW", "LIVE", "SAFE", "READ_ONLY", null]},
    "scope_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "status": {"enum": ["PASS", "FAIL", "WARN", "BLOCKED", "UNTESTED", "STALE", "SKIPPED_NOT_APPLICABLE", "TIMEOUT"]},
    "blocking": {"type": "boolean"},
    "dependencies": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}},
    "artifacts": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}},
    "failure_reason": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "result_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}
  },
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```
