### 2.10 operator_action_audit.schema.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "trader1.operator_action_audit.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "action_id",
    "created_at_utc",
    "operator_id_hash",
    "action_code",
    "confirmation_required",
    "confirmation_method",
    "result",
    "event_hash"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {"const": "trader1.operator_action_audit.v1"},
    "action_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "created_at_utc": {"type": "string"},
    "operator_id_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "action_code": {"enum": ["manual_stop", "manual_resume_read_only", "manual_ack_trade_disabled", "manual_unlock_held_market_event", "manual_retry_reconcile", "manual_safe_mode", "manual_disable_strategy", "manual_reduce_position", "manual_exit_all_positions"]},
    "exchange": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["UPBIT", "BINANCE", null]},
    "market_type": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["KRW_SPOT", "SPOT", "FUTURES_USDT_M", null]},
    "mode": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["REPLAY", "PAPER", "SHADOW", "LIVE", "SAFE", "READ_ONLY", null]},
    "session_id": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "target_symbol": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "previous_state": {"type": "object"},
    "requested_state": {"type": "object"},
    "risk_veto_result": {"enum": ["PASS", "FAIL", "NOT_APPLICABLE"]},
    "reconciliation_status": {"enum": ["PASS", "FAIL", "STALE", "NOT_APPLICABLE"]},
    "final_decision_id": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "confirmation_required": {"type": "boolean"},
    "confirmation_method": {"enum": ["NONE", "LOCAL_UI", "CLI_CONFIRM_PHRASE", "TWO_STEP"]},
    "result": {"enum": ["ACCEPTED", "REJECTED", "EXECUTED", "FAILED", "BLOCKED"]},
    "result_reason": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "event_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}
  },
  "allOf": [
    {
      "if": {"properties": {"action_code": {"enum": ["manual_exit_all_positions", "manual_reduce_position", "manual_disable_strategy", "manual_safe_mode", "manual_ack_trade_disabled"]}}, "required": ["action_code"]},
      "then": {
        "properties": {
          "confirmation_required": {"const": true},
          "confirmation_method": {"enum": ["LOCAL_UI", "CLI_CONFIRM_PHRASE", "TWO_STEP"]}
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```

### 2.11 release_source_identity.schema.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "trader1.release_source_identity.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "release_id",
    "build_time_utc",
    "release_scope",
    "authority_document",
    "registry_hash",
    "root_source_tree_hash",
    "release_source_tree_hash",
    "per_file_sha256",
    "excluded_files",
    "excluded_files_reason",
    "unexplained_changed_files",
    "release_readiness_surface_hash",
    "forbidden_count",
    "secret_scan_status",
    "status"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {"const": "trader1.release_source_identity.v1"},
    "release_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "build_time_utc": {"type": "string"},
    "release_scope": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": ["exchange", "market_type", "mode"],
      "properties": {
        "exchange": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["UPBIT", "BINANCE", null]},
        "market_type": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["KRW_SPOT", "SPOT", "FUTURES_USDT_M", null]},
        "mode": {"type": ["string", "null"], "enum": ["REPLAY", "PAPER", "SHADOW", "LIVE", "SAFE", "READ_ONLY", null]}
      },
      "additionalProperties": false
    },
    "authority_document": {"const": "TRADER_1.md"},
    "authority_sha256": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "registry_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "root_source_tree_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "release_source_tree_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "per_file_sha256": {"type": "object"},
    "excluded_files": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}},
    "excluded_files_reason": {"type": "object"},
    "unexplained_changed_files": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}},
    "config_hash": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "release_readiness_surface_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "forbidden_count": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0},
    "secret_scan_status": {"enum": ["PASS", "FAIL", "UNTESTED"]},
    "status": {"enum": ["PASS", "WARN", "FAIL", "BLOCKED"]}
  },
  "allOf": [
    {
      "if": {"properties": {"status": {"const": "PASS"}}, "required": ["status"]},
      "then": {
        "properties": {
          "forbidden_count": {"const": 0},
          "secret_scan_status": {"const": "PASS"},
          "unexplained_changed_files": {"maxItems": 0}
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```

### 2.12 contract_gap.schema.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "trader1.contract_gap.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "gap_id",
    "created_at_utc",
    "source_contract_id",
    "missing_or_ambiguous_item",
    "risk_level",
    "affected_modules",
    "affected_modes",
    "affected_exchanges",
    "decision",
    "fallback_behavior",
    "validator_required",
    "evidence_required",
    "live_blocks",
    "status"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {"const": "trader1.contract_gap.v1"},
    "gap_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "created_at_utc": {"type": "string"},
    "source_contract_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "missing_or_ambiguous_item": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "risk_level": {"enum": ["INFO", "LOW", "MEDIUM", "HIGH", "CRITICAL"]},
    "affected_modules": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}},
    "affected_modes": {"type": "array", "items": {"enum": ["REPLAY", "PAPER", "SHADOW", "LIVE", "SAFE", "READ_ONLY"]}},
    "affected_exchanges": {"type": "array", "items": {"enum": ["UPBIT", "BINANCE"]}},
    "decision": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "fallback_behavior": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "validator_required": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}},
    "evidence_required": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}},
    "live_blocks": {"type": "boolean"},
    "status": {"enum": ["OPEN", "MITIGATED", "CLOSED", "SUPERSEDED"]}
  },
  "allOf": [
    {
      "if": {"properties": {"risk_level": {"enum": ["HIGH", "CRITICAL"]}, "status": {"enum": ["OPEN", "MITIGATED"]}}, "required": ["risk_level", "status"]},
      "then": {"properties": {"live_blocks": {"const": true}}}
    }
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```


### 2.13 patch_result.schema.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "trader1.patch_result.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "patch_id",
    "created_at_utc",
    "target_mvp_level",
    "patch_class",
    "input_authority_files",
    "input_authority_hash_status",
    "affected_contract_ids",
    "affected_exchange",
    "affected_market_type",
    "affected_mode",
    "removed_requirements",
    "merged_requirements",
    "new_registry_items",
    "new_or_changed_schema_ids",
    "validators_required",
    "validators_run",
    "tests_run",
    "retained_archive_preserved",
    "normalization_metadata_updated",
    "schema_enum_hardening_applied",
    "coverage_unmapped_count",
    "authority_hash_checked",
    "registry_yaml_parse_status",
    "registry_placeholders_remaining",
    "retained_archive_semantic_mapping_status",
    "source_file_matches_current_input",
    "output_file_matches_generated_output",
    "detail_reduction_allowed",
    "coverage_index_result",
    "file_split",
    "live_order_ready_before",
    "live_order_ready_after",
    "live_order_allowed_before",
    "live_order_allowed_after",
    "remaining_blockers",
    "evidence_manifest_path",
    "result_hash"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {
      "const": "trader1.patch_result.v1"
    },
    "patch_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "created_at_utc": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "target_mvp_level": {
      "enum": [
        "MVP-0",
        "MVP-1",
        "MVP-2",
        "MVP-3",
        "MVP-4",
        "MVP-5",
        "MVP-6",
        "MVP-7"
      ]
    },
    "patch_class": {
      "enum": [
        "DOC_CONTRACT_PATCH",
        "REGISTRY_PATCH",
        "SCHEMA_PATCH",
        "VALIDATOR_PATCH",
        "RUNTIME_SAFETY_PATCH",
        "PAPER_FUNCTIONAL_PATCH",
        "LIVE_BLOCKING_PATCH",
        "LIVE_ENABLING_PATCH",
        "BUNDLE_HYGIENE_PATCH",
        "DASHBOARD_UX_PATCH",
        "DOCUMENT_NORMALIZATION_PATCH"
      ]
    },
    "exploration_stage": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ],
      "enum": [
        "STAGE_A_WIDE",
        "STAGE_B_REFINEMENT",
        null
      ]
    },
    "input_authority_files": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "minItems": 1
    },
    "input_authority_hash_status": {
      "enum": [
        "MATCHED",
        "UPDATED",
        "MISMATCH",
        "UNTESTED",
        "NOT_APPLICABLE"
      ]
    },
    "affected_contract_ids": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "affected_exchange": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ],
      "enum": [
        "UPBIT",
        "BINANCE",
        null
      ]
    },
    "affected_market_type": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ],
      "enum": [
        "KRW_SPOT",
        "SPOT",
        "FUTURES_USDT_M",
        null
      ]
    },
    "affected_mode": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ],
      "enum": [
        "REPLAY",
        "PAPER",
        "SHADOW",
        "LIVE",
        "SAFE",
        "READ_ONLY",
        null
      ]
    },
    "removed_requirements": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "maxItems": 0
    },
    "merged_requirements": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "new_registry_items": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "new_or_changed_schema_ids": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "validators_required": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "validators_run": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "validator_id",
          "command",
          "status"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "validator_id": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1
          },
          "command": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1
          },
          "status": {
            "enum": [
              "PASS",
              "FAIL",
              "WARN",
              "BLOCKED",
              "UNTESTED",
              "STALE",
              "SKIPPED_NOT_APPLICABLE",
              "TIMEOUT"
            ]
          },
          "artifact": {
            "type": [
              "string",
              "null"
            ]
          }
        },
        "additionalProperties": false
      }
    },
    "tests_run": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "retained_archive_preserved": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "normalization_metadata_updated": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "schema_enum_hardening_applied": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "coverage_unmapped_count": {
      "type": "integer",
      "minimum": 0
    },
    "coverage_index_result": {
      "enum": [
        "PASS",
        "FAIL",
        "WARN",
        "BLOCKED",
        "UNTESTED",
        "STALE",
        "TIMEOUT"
      ]
    },
    "file_split": {
      "const": false
    },
    "live_order_ready_before": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "live_order_ready_after": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "live_order_allowed_before": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "live_order_allowed_after": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "remaining_blockers": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "evidence_manifest_path": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "result_hash": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "authority_hash_checked": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "registry_yaml_parse_status": {
      "enum": [
        "PASS",
        "FAIL",
        "BLOCKED",
        "UNTESTED"
      ]
    },
    "registry_placeholders_remaining": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "retained_archive_semantic_mapping_status": {
      "enum": [
        "PASS",
        "WARN",
        "PARTIAL",
        "UNMAPPED",
        "BLOCKED",
        "NOT_APPLICABLE"
      ]
    },
    "source_file_matches_current_input": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "output_file_matches_generated_output": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "detail_reduction_allowed": {
      "const": false
    }
  },
  "allOf": [
    {
      "if": {
        "properties": {
          "patch_class": {
            "enum": [
              "DOC_CONTRACT_PATCH",
              "REGISTRY_PATCH",
              "SCHEMA_PATCH",
              "VALIDATOR_PATCH",
              "RUNTIME_SAFETY_PATCH",
              "PAPER_FUNCTIONAL_PATCH",
              "LIVE_BLOCKING_PATCH",
              "BUNDLE_HYGIENE_PATCH",
              "DASHBOARD_UX_PATCH",
              "DOCUMENT_NORMALIZATION_PATCH"
            ]
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "patch_class"
        ]
      },
      "then": {
        "properties": {
          "live_order_allowed_after": {
            "const": false
          }
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "if": {
        "properties": {
          "patch_class": {
            "const": "DOCUMENT_NORMALIZATION_PATCH"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "patch_class"
        ]
      },
      "then": {
        "properties": {
          "retained_archive_preserved": {
            "const": true
          },
          "file_split": {
            "const": false
          }
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "if": {
        "properties": {
          "patch_class": {
            "const": "DOCUMENT_NORMALIZATION_PATCH"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "patch_class"
        ]
      },
      "then": {
        "properties": {
          "retained_archive_preserved": {
            "const": true
          },
          "file_split": {
            "const": false
          },
          "detail_reduction_allowed": {
            "const": false
          }
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "if": {
        "properties": {
          "registry_yaml_parse_status": {
            "const": "PASS"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "registry_yaml_parse_status"
        ]
      },
      "then": {
        "properties": {
          "registry_placeholders_remaining": {
            "maxItems": 0
          }
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```

### 2.14 strategy_candidate.schema.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "trader1.strategy_candidate.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "candidate_id",
    "created_at_utc",
    "exchange",
    "market_type",
    "mode",
    "strategy_id",
    "strategy_build_id",
    "parameter_hash",
    "promotion_input_type",
    "exploration_stage",
    "exploration_bound_type",
    "entry_variation",
    "exit_variation",
    "execution_variation",
    "regime_scope",
    "timeframe_scope",
    "candidate_risk_profile",
    "combination_dimensions",
    "experiment_scope",
    "validator_status",
    "blockers",
    "candidate_hash"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {
      "const": "trader1.strategy_candidate.v1"
    },
    "candidate_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "created_at_utc": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "exchange": {
      "enum": [
        "UPBIT",
        "BINANCE"
      ]
    },
    "market_type": {
      "enum": [
        "KRW_SPOT",
        "SPOT",
        "FUTURES_USDT_M"
      ]
    },
    "mode": {
      "enum": [
        "REPLAY",
        "PAPER",
        "SHADOW"
      ]
    },
    "strategy_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "strategy_build_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "parameter_set": {
      "type": "object"
    },
    "parameter_hash": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "promotion_input_type": {
      "enum": [
        "NOT_PROMOTION_INPUT",
        "EXPLORATION_CANDIDATE",
        "REFINEMENT_CANDIDATE",
        "LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT"
      ]
    },
    "exploration_stage": {
      "enum": [
        "STAGE_A_WIDE",
        "STAGE_B_REFINEMENT"
      ]
    },
    "exploration_bound_type": {
      "enum": [
        "INITIAL_CANDIDATE_BOUND",
        "EXPANDED_EXPLORATION_BOUND",
        "LIVE_PARAMETER_BOUND"
      ]
    },
    "variation_signature": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "entry_variation": {
      "enum": [
        "breakout",
        "retest",
        "momentum",
        "mean_reversion",
        "vwap_reversion",
        "pullback"
      ]
    },
    "exit_variation": {
      "enum": [
        "fixed_tp",
        "trailing_tp",
        "partial_exit",
        "time_exit",
        "volatility_exit",
        "invalidation_exit",
        "hard_stop"
      ]
    },
    "execution_variation": {
      "enum": [
        "market",
        "limit",
        "ioc",
        "maker",
        "split_order",
        "single_order"
      ]
    },
    "regime_scope": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "regime_family": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ],
      "enum": [
        "TRENDING",
        "RANGE",
        "RISK_OFF",
        null
      ]
    },
    "timeframe_scope": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "base_timeframe": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "holding_time_estimate": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "candidate_risk_profile": {
      "enum": [
        "CONSERVATIVE",
        "BALANCED",
        "GROWTH",
        "AGGRESSIVE_SANDBOX"
      ]
    },
    "combination_dimensions": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "enum": [
          "entry",
          "exit",
          "regime",
          "execution",
          "timeframe",
          "liquidity_tier"
        ]
      }
    },
    "experiment_scope": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "candidate_budget_id": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "duplicate_group_id": {
      "type": [
        "string",
        "null"
      ]
    },
    "validator_status": {
      "enum": [
        "PASS",
        "FAIL",
        "WARN",
        "BLOCKED",
        "UNTESTED",
        "STALE",
        "SKIPPED_NOT_APPLICABLE",
        "TIMEOUT"
      ]
    },
    "blockers": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string",
        "enum": [
          "MIN_EDGE_FAIL",
          "EXPECTED_SLIPPAGE_EXCEEDED",
          "DEPTH_TOO_THIN",
          "DEPTH_EXCHANGE_REJECT_RISK",
          "STALE_ORDERBOOK",
          "STALE_TICKER",
          "STALE_TRADE_TAPE",
          "STALE_CANDLE_15M",
          "STALE_CANDLE_60M",
          "STALE_BENCHMARK_CONTEXT",
          "MARKET_CONTEXT_LOAD_TIMEOUT",
          "API_TIMEOUT",
          "WEBSOCKET_GAP",
          "CLOCK_DRIFT",
          "PRIVATE_WS_UNHEALTHY",
          "DRIFT_UNRECOVERED",
          "SESSION_PAUSE",
          "TICK_SIZE_CLIFF",
          "BALANCE_MISMATCH",
          "MARKET_EVENT_RISK",
          "BREADTH_OFF_BLOCKED",
          "PENDING_CONFIRM_EXISTS",
          "COOLDOWN",
          "CLUSTER_RISK",
          "UNIVERSE_FILTERED",
          "POSITION_LIMIT",
          "TRADE_DISABLED",
          "COLD_START",
          "DATA_UNAVAILABLE",
          "HARD_TRUTH_MISSING",
          "SOFT_TRUTH_UNREGISTERED_FALLBACK",
          "RESOURCE_LIMIT",
          "RESOURCE_LIMIT_BLOCK",
          "LEDGER_INTEGRITY_FAIL",
          "LEDGER_UNAVAILABLE",
          "EXCHANGE_SYNC_REQUIRED",
          "RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED",
          "SYMBOL_RULE_BLOCK",
          "SYMBOL_RULE_UNVERIFIED",
          "FEE_MODEL_UNVERIFIED",
          "FEE_EXCEEDS_EDGE",
          "MARKET_IMPACT_EXCEEDS_EDGE",
          "LIVE_READY_MISSING",
          "USER_APPROVAL_MISSING",
          "PREFLIGHT_FAILED",
          "SNAPSHOT_SCOPE_MISMATCH",
          "API_UNVERIFIED",
          "RISK_VETO",
          "REGIME_MISMATCH",
          "EXCHANGE_POLICY_BLOCK",
          "STRATEGY_NOT_ELIGIBLE",
          "STRATEGY_CONFIDENCE_LOW",
          "KILL_SWITCH_ACTIVE",
          "LATENCY_TTL_EXPIRED",
          "OFFICIAL_API_VERIFICATION_EXPIRED",
          "MANUAL_ORDER_TEST_MISSING",
          "OPERATOR_APPROVAL_MISSING",
          "EMERGENCY_FLATTEN_UNAVAILABLE",
          "SOURCE_IDENTITY_MISMATCH",
          "BUNDLE_HYGIENE_FAIL",
          "READ_ONLY_BURN_IN_MISSING",
          "ORPHAN_POSITION_REVIEW_REQUIRED",
          "ORPHAN_OPEN_ORDER_REVIEW_REQUIRED",
          "LIVE_FINAL_GUARD_FAILED",
          "SCHEMA_IDENTITY_MISMATCH",
          "REGISTRY_DRIFT",
          "GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIRTY",
          "CONTRACT_GAP_HIGH",
          "CONTRACT_GAP_CRITICAL",
          "MEASUREMENT_MISSING",
          "EXECUTION_QUALITY_UNTESTED",
          "EXPANDED_BOUND_UNVERIFIED",
          "PROMOTION_INPUT_TYPE_INVALID",
          "EXPLORATION_STAGE_MISMATCH",
          "VARIATION_UNREGISTERED",
          "TIMEFRAME_SCOPE_MISMATCH",
          "CANDIDATE_BUDGET_EXCEEDED",
          "DUPLICATE_CANDIDATE",
          "EXPLORATION_RESOURCE_LIMIT",
          "LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_UNTESTED",
          "LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_FAILED",
          "LOW_RR_RATIO_UNVERIFIED",
          "COST_AFTER_EDGE_UNVERIFIED",
          "REGIME_SCOPE_MISMATCH",
          "COMBINATION_COMPLEXITY_EXCEEDED",
          "UNBOUNDED_CANDIDATE_EXPANSION",
          "DATA_QUALITY_INSUFFICIENT",
          "CANDIDATE_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN",
          "PAPER_WINNER_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN",
          "SNAPSHOT_WRITER_INPUT_NOT_SNAPSHOT",
          "UNKNOWN_BLOCKED"
        ]
      }
    },
    "candidate_hash": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    }
  },
  "allOf": [
    {
      "if": {
        "properties": {
          "exploration_stage": {
            "const": "STAGE_A_WIDE"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "exploration_stage"
        ]
      },
      "then": {
        "properties": {
          "mode": {
            "enum": [
              "REPLAY",
              "SHADOW"
            ]
          },
          "promotion_input_type": {
            "const": "EXPLORATION_CANDIDATE"
          }
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "if": {
        "properties": {
          "exploration_stage": {
            "const": "STAGE_B_REFINEMENT"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "exploration_stage"
        ]
      },
      "then": {
        "properties": {
          "mode": {
            "enum": [
              "REPLAY",
              "PAPER",
              "SHADOW"
            ]
          },
          "promotion_input_type": {
            "enum": [
              "REFINEMENT_CANDIDATE",
              "LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT"
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```

### 2.15 candidate_generation_report.schema.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "trader1.candidate_generation_report.v1",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "report_id",
    "created_at_utc",
    "exchange",
    "market_type",
    "mode",
    "exploration_stage",
    "strategy_id",
    "strategy_build_id",
    "candidate_count",
    "max_candidates_per_strategy_build",
    "max_candidates_per_generation_cycle",
    "resource_budget_status",
    "candidates",
    "pruned_candidates",
    "duplicate_groups",
    "validators_required",
    "validator_rollup_status",
    "blockers",
    "report_hash"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {"const": "trader1.candidate_generation_report.v1"},
    "report_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "created_at_utc": {"type": "string"},
    "exchange": {"enum": ["UPBIT", "BINANCE"]},
    "market_type": {"enum": ["KRW_SPOT", "SPOT", "FUTURES_USDT_M"]},
    "mode": {"enum": ["REPLAY", "PAPER", "SHADOW"]},
    "exploration_stage": {"enum": ["STAGE_A_WIDE", "STAGE_B_REFINEMENT"]},
    "strategy_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "strategy_build_id": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
    "timeframe_scope": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
    "candidate_count": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0},
    "max_candidates_per_strategy_build": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 1},
    "max_candidates_per_generation_cycle": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 1},
    "resource_budget_status": {"enum": ["PASS", "WARN", "THROTTLED", "PAUSED", "BLOCKED", "UNTESTED"]},
    "candidates": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}},
    "pruned_candidates": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}},
    "duplicate_groups": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}},
    "validators_required": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}},
    "validator_rollup_status": {"enum": ["PASS", "FAIL", "WARN", "BLOCKED", "UNTESTED", "STALE", "SKIPPED_NOT_APPLICABLE", "TIMEOUT"]},
    "blockers": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string", "enum": ["MIN_EDGE_FAIL","EXPECTED_SLIPPAGE_EXCEEDED","DEPTH_TOO_THIN","DEPTH_EXCHANGE_REJECT_RISK","STALE_ORDERBOOK","STALE_TICKER","STALE_TRADE_TAPE","STALE_CANDLE_15M","STALE_CANDLE_60M","STALE_BENCHMARK_CONTEXT","MARKET_CONTEXT_LOAD_TIMEOUT","API_TIMEOUT","WEBSOCKET_GAP","CLOCK_DRIFT","PRIVATE_WS_UNHEALTHY","DRIFT_UNRECOVERED","SESSION_PAUSE","TICK_SIZE_CLIFF","BALANCE_MISMATCH","MARKET_EVENT_RISK","BREADTH_OFF_BLOCKED","PENDING_CONFIRM_EXISTS","COOLDOWN","CLUSTER_RISK","UNIVERSE_FILTERED","POSITION_LIMIT","TRADE_DISABLED","COLD_START","DATA_UNAVAILABLE","HARD_TRUTH_MISSING","SOFT_TRUTH_UNREGISTERED_FALLBACK","RESOURCE_LIMIT","RESOURCE_LIMIT_BLOCK","LEDGER_INTEGRITY_FAIL","LEDGER_UNAVAILABLE","EXCHANGE_SYNC_REQUIRED","RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED","SYMBOL_RULE_BLOCK","SYMBOL_RULE_UNVERIFIED","FEE_MODEL_UNVERIFIED","FEE_EXCEEDS_EDGE","MARKET_IMPACT_EXCEEDS_EDGE","LIVE_READY_MISSING","USER_APPROVAL_MISSING","PREFLIGHT_FAILED","SNAPSHOT_SCOPE_MISMATCH","API_UNVERIFIED","RISK_VETO","REGIME_MISMATCH","EXCHANGE_POLICY_BLOCK","STRATEGY_NOT_ELIGIBLE","STRATEGY_CONFIDENCE_LOW","KILL_SWITCH_ACTIVE","LATENCY_TTL_EXPIRED","OFFICIAL_API_VERIFICATION_EXPIRED","MANUAL_ORDER_TEST_MISSING","OPERATOR_APPROVAL_MISSING","EMERGENCY_FLATTEN_UNAVAILABLE","SOURCE_IDENTITY_MISMATCH","BUNDLE_HYGIENE_FAIL","READ_ONLY_BURN_IN_MISSING","ORPHAN_POSITION_REVIEW_REQUIRED","ORPHAN_OPEN_ORDER_REVIEW_REQUIRED","LIVE_FINAL_GUARD_FAILED","SCHEMA_IDENTITY_MISMATCH","REGISTRY_DRIFT","GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIRTY","CONTRACT_GAP_HIGH","CONTRACT_GAP_CRITICAL","MEASUREMENT_MISSING","EXECUTION_QUALITY_UNTESTED","EXPANDED_BOUND_UNVERIFIED","PROMOTION_INPUT_TYPE_INVALID","EXPLORATION_STAGE_MISMATCH","VARIATION_UNREGISTERED","TIMEFRAME_SCOPE_MISMATCH","CANDIDATE_BUDGET_EXCEEDED","DUPLICATE_CANDIDATE","EXPLORATION_RESOURCE_LIMIT","LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_UNTESTED","LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_FAILED","LOW_RR_RATIO_UNVERIFIED","COST_AFTER_EDGE_UNVERIFIED","REGIME_SCOPE_MISMATCH","COMBINATION_COMPLEXITY_EXCEEDED","UNBOUNDED_CANDIDATE_EXPANSION","DATA_QUALITY_INSUFFICIENT","CANDIDATE_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN","PAPER_WINNER_DIRECT_LIVE_FORBIDDEN","SNAPSHOT_WRITER_INPUT_NOT_SNAPSHOT","UNKNOWN_BLOCKED"]}},
    "report_hash": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}
  },
  "allOf": [
    {
      "if": {"properties": {"resource_budget_status": {"enum": ["THROTTLED", "PAUSED", "BLOCKED"]}}, "required": ["resource_budget_status"]},
      "then": {"properties": {"validator_rollup_status": {"enum": ["WARN", "BLOCKED", "FAIL"]}}}
    }
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```

```json
{
```

```json
      "type": "integer",
      "minimum": 0
    },
    "catalog_hash": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    }
  },
  "allOf": [
    {
      "if": {
        "properties": {
          "missing_fixture_count": {
            "const": 0
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "missing_fixture_count"
        ]
      },
      "then": true
    }
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```

# ACTIVE_CONTRACT_PACK_END

## 3. MVP and stage gates

### 3.1 MVP ladder

| MVP | stage | allowed work | forbidden work | completion condition |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| MVP-0 Contract baseline | P0_A preparation | registry seed, schema seed, validator scaffold, generated marker, coverage index | order execution, live readiness claim | registry lint PASS, schema parse PASS, live_order_allowed=false |
| MVP-1 Safe boot skeleton | P0_A | root launcher separation, config validation, startup probe, heartbeat, read-only dashboard shell | live key load, live order API | live blocked negative test PASS |
| MVP-2 Upbit paper dry-run | P0_B | Upbit public data, paper broker, no-trade reason, paper ledger skeleton | live order, Binance live, strategy promotion | paper dry-run validator PASS |
| MVP-3 Operational Upbit paper | P1 | ledger/WAL, restart recovery, paper/shadow separation, cost model, basic risk | LIVE_READY auto grant, live new order | paper operation gate PASS |
| MVP-4 Upbit live review | P1_RC | read-only account snapshot, official API verification, manual approval surface, preflight report | live new order | can_live_review=true, live_order_ready=false |
| MVP-5 Upbit limited live | P1_RC plus live gate | exact-scope limited live after all evidence | broad scale-up, Binance futures live | exact scope live_order_ready=true and live_order_allowed=true |
| MVP-6 Multi-exchange paper | P2 paper/read-only | Binance spot/futures paper scaffold, futures simulator, exchange namespace split | Binance live | Binance live_order_ready=false |
| MVP-7 Binance limited live | P2 plus Binance live gate | market_type scoped Binance limited live | readiness transfer across market_type | market_type scoped limited live only |

### 3.2 stage completion rule

Code existence is not stage completion. A stage is complete only when evidence exists.

Required evidence pack fields:

```text
validator_run_log
stage_gate_rollup
manifest_hash
schema_id
test_result_summary
audit_findings
blocking_defect_count
unresolved_minor_defects
implemented_contracts
tests_executed
validator_results
known_blockers
runtime_artifacts_produced
risk_assessment
next_allowed_stage
```

Rules:

```text
validator FAIL -> affected path BLOCKED
validator not run -> UNTESTED, not READY
stage skip is forbidden when it bypasses safety, namespace separation, ledger integrity, or live blocking
paper success does not imply live readiness
live readiness requires valid LIVE_READY snapshot and preflight success
```

## 4. root launcher contract

Repository root exposes exactly four user-facing launchers.

```text
UPBIT_PAPER
UPBIT_LIVE
BINANCE_PAPER
BINANCE_LIVE
```

Forbidden root launchers:

```text
dashboard-only launcher
test launcher
debug launcher
temporary launcher
duplicate entry point
exchange-ambiguous launcher
mode-ambiguous launcher
```

Rules:

```text
Paper launchers must not load live order credentials.
Paper launchers must not call live order APIs.
Live launchers must not use a paper broker as live execution.
BINANCE launchers must select SPOT or FUTURES_USDT_M through validated config, internal UI, or explicit command option.
Futures live must never be an implicit default.
```

## 5. namespace and truth hierarchy

Every runtime artifact must be keyed or physically separated by:

```text
exchange
market_type
mode
session_id
strategy_id if applicable
symbol if applicable
```

Recommended paths:

```text
system/data/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/
system/logs/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/
system/runtime/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/
system/reports/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/
system/validation/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/
system/evidence/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/<session_id>/
system/snapshots/<exchange>/<market_type>/LIVE_READY/
system/configs/<exchange>/<market_type>/
```

Forbidden:

```text
paper/live raw data join
paper/shadow/live raw data join
upbit/binance raw data join
spot/futures raw data join
dashboard override of engine truth
summary.json as execution truth
```

Truth hierarchy:

```text
execution truth:
  ledger
  intent WAL
  order events
  fill events
  balance snapshots
  position snapshots
  exchange reconciliation snapshot
  risk decisions
  final decisions

analysis truth:
  signal outcome reports
  no-trade reviews
  score calibration reports
  shadow reports
  walk-forward reports
  replay reports
  performance summaries

dashboard serving truth:
  summary.json
  heartbeat.json
  startup_probe.json
  action_queue.json
  operator_status.json
  readiness_surface.json
  recent_no_trade_context.json
  recent_entry_context.json
```

Conflict rule:

```text
execution truth > exchange reconciliation snapshot > analysis truth > dashboard serving truth
```

## 6. hard truth and soft truth

Hard truth is required for trading decisions.

```text
engine_state
mode
exchange
market_type
session_id
config_hash
registry_hash
schema_id
ledger_write_status
startup_probe_phase
exchange_account_snapshot
balance_snapshot
position_snapshot
open_order_snapshot
pending_intent_state
orderbook_freshness
trade_stream_freshness
confirmed_candle_state
symbol_rules
min_notional_rule
tick_size_rule
step_size_rule
fee_snapshot
slippage_bound
risk_limit_state
kill_switch_state
resource_health_state
private_ws_health_if_live
reconciliation_status
LIVE_READY_snapshot_if_live
strategy_lifecycle_state
final_decision_id
```

Rules:

```text
hard truth missing -> NO_TRADE or SAFE_MODE
hard truth stale -> NO_TRADE or SAFE_MODE
hard truth contradictory -> RECONCILE_REQUIRED or BLOCKED
hard truth unverified -> NO_TRADE or BLOCKED
missing data must never increase risk, size, leverage, confidence, or live readiness
```

Soft truth may use registered neutral or conservative fallback.

```text
optional_market_breadth_metric
optional_taker_buy_ratio
optional_sentiment_metric
optional_dashboard_display_value
optional_review_score
optional_explanatory_text
optional_noncritical_backtest_tag
```

Soft truth without registered fallback becomes hard truth missing.

## 7. decision and execution contract

### 7.1 FinalDecision rule

All strategy signals must pass through a central decision path.

```text
hard truth check
resource health check
exchange health check
market data freshness check
exchange and symbol rule check
account reconciliation check
strategy signal normalization
market regime filter
risk veto
portfolio and exposure check
allocator arbitration
execution quality check
final decision
single execution path
ledger and evidence recording
```

No module may place orders directly from a strategy signal.

### 7.2 conflict priority

```text
P0 manual emergency stop, kill switch, legal or exchange-enforced block
P1 hard truth availability, schema integrity, ledger durability
P2 exchange constraints, market type constraints, API policy, symbol rules
P3 account reconciliation, balance truth, position truth, open order truth
P4 portfolio risk, strategy risk, exposure, MDD, loss limit
P5 market regime, volatility, liquidity, data quality
P6 strategy lifecycle, strategy score, LIVE_READY scope
P7 execution quality, fee, slippage, market impact, latency
P8 user dashboard display and convenience
```

Tie breaker:

```text
smaller risk
smaller exposure
higher data confidence
higher reproducibility
lower cost
better fill quality
longer validation period
more valid trade samples
lower correlation
more recent valid LIVE_READY snapshot
```

If still tied, choose NO_TRADE.

### 7.3 order path

```text
use one writer or equivalent serialized transaction path
reserve budget before external order submission
no network I/O inside database transactions
commit local reservation before external submit
use client_order_id or intent_id for idempotency
ambiguous submit result -> do not send new order with new identifier
ambiguous submit result -> reconcile using same identifier first
exchange order exists but local commit failed -> stop or reconcile before new orders
fill events must be deduplicated
ledger mismatch blocks new orders
```

Forbidden transitions:

```text
INTENT_CREATED -> SENT without PRECHECKED
PRECHECKED -> SENT without RESERVED
PENDING_CONFIRM -> SENT with new identifier
RECONCILE_REQUIRED -> SENT with new identifier
FILLED -> OPEN
CANCELED -> FILLED without reconciliation evidence
REJECTED -> FILLED
```

## 8. exchange adapter contract

Strategies must not call exchange APIs directly.

Every exchange adapter must provide or emulate:

```text
MarketDataAdapter
AccountAdapter
OrderAdapter
PositionAdapter
FeeAdapter
SlippageAdapter
SymbolRulesAdapter
RiskAdapter
WebSocketAdapter
RateLimitAdapter
ErrorNormalizer
HealthAdapter
ReconciliationAdapter
```

Upbit KRW spot:

```text
KRW spot long-oriented structure
minimum order amount validation
tick size and price normalization
fee calculation
KRW and coin free and locked balance tracking
public and private stream separation
nonce, JWT, query hash
rate limit throttling
order error normalization
candle no-trade versus missing-candle distinction
paper/live fill model parity
live blocked unless official current rules are verified
```

Binance spot:

```text
base and quote free and locked balances
min notional, tick size, step size, min quantity
maker and taker fees, VIP tier, BNB discount when applicable
timestamp, recvWindow, signature, server time drift handling
user stream reconnect and gap recovery
partial and multiple fill ledger accuracy
no futures margin, liquidation, or reduce-only logic in spot adapter
```

Binance futures:

```text
long and short position modeling
hedge mode and one-way mode distinction
isolated and cross margin distinction
leverage, margin ratio, liquidation price, mark price, and funding fee
reduce-only, stop market, take profit, and trailing stop support where used
listenKey or user data stream renewal and recovery
realized and unrealized PnL separation
ADL risk
liquidation risk reduction before expansion
no spot balance model misuse
```

If official API information is not verified, adapter state is not live-ready.

## 9. strategy and risk contract

Strategy unit:

```text
strategy_id
strategy_build_id
parameter_set
parameter_hash
exchange
market_type
regime_scope
risk_profile
```

LIVE_READY applies to the full strategy unit, not to strategy name alone.

Strategy lifecycle:

```text
CANDIDATE
REPLAY_TESTING
REPLAY_VALIDATED
PAPER_VALIDATING
PAPER_VALIDATED
SHADOW_VALIDATED
LIVE_READY
LIVE_ACTIVE
DEGRADED
RETIRED
BLOCKED
```

Allowed transitions:

```text
CANDIDATE -> REPLAY_TESTING
REPLAY_TESTING -> REPLAY_VALIDATED
REPLAY_TESTING -> BLOCKED
REPLAY_TESTING -> RETIRED
REPLAY_VALIDATED -> PAPER_VALIDATING
PAPER_VALIDATING -> PAPER_VALIDATED
PAPER_VALIDATING -> BLOCKED
PAPER_VALIDATING -> RETIRED
PAPER_VALIDATED -> SHADOW_VALIDATED
PAPER_VALIDATED -> BLOCKED
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> LIVE_READY
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> BLOCKED
LIVE_READY -> LIVE_ACTIVE
LIVE_READY -> BLOCKED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> DEGRADED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> RETIRED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> BLOCKED
DEGRADED -> PAPER_VALIDATING
DEGRADED -> RETIRED
BLOCKED -> CANDIDATE only after explicit unblock evidence
RETIRED -> CANDIDATE only as new strategy_build_id or new parameter_set
```

Forbidden transitions:

```text
CANDIDATE -> LIVE_READY
REPLAY_TESTING -> LIVE_ACTIVE
PAPER_VALIDATING -> LIVE_ACTIVE
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> LIVE_ACTIVE without LIVE_READY
BLOCKED -> LIVE_ACTIVE
RETIRED -> LIVE_ACTIVE
```

Strategy level:

```text
Level 0: signal candidate only
Level 1: input data, TTL, reason code exist
Level 2: regime, liquidity, spread, depth filter exist
Level 3: cost-adjusted edge, risk veto, sizing trace exist
Level 4: replay, paper, shadow evidence exist
Level 5: LIVE_READY snapshot scope matches
Level 6: live performance-based scale-down, degradation, retirement, candidate reevaluation possible
```

Entry and exit maturity are separate. Live new entry requires entry level 5 and exit level 5.

Risk and sizing:

```text
approved_notional = min(
  strategy_risk_budget_notional,
  profile_max_notional,
  symbol_exposure_cap,
  portfolio_exposure_cap,
  liquidity_depth_cap,
  volatility_adjusted_cap,
  stop_distance_risk_cap,
  first_order_cap when applicable,
  live_burn_in_cap when applicable
)
```

Net edge:

```text
net_edge_bps =
expected_move_bps
- expected_fee_bps
- expected_spread_cost_bps
- expected_slippage_bps
- expected_impact_bps
- expected_latency_cost_bps
- expected_funding_cost_bps when applicable
```

Rules:

```text
net_edge_bps <= minimum_required_edge_bps -> NO_TRADE
edge component missing -> NO_TRADE
fee unknown -> NO_TRADE
slippage unknown -> NO_TRADE
impact unknown on thin market -> NO_TRADE
futures funding unknown when material -> NO_TRADE
stop distance missing or invalid -> NO_TRADE
```

## 10. market regime and universe

MarketRegime:

```text
DOWNTREND
RANGE
UPTREND
BREAKDOWN
HIGH_VOLATILITY
LOW_LIQUIDITY
UNCERTAIN
```

Regime classification must not use a single indicator. Minimum inputs:

```text
trend
volatility
liquidity
spread
volume
drawdown
market breadth when available
higher timeframe context
data quality
```

Rules:

```text
DOWNTREND -> spot long entry restricted unless validated exception exists
RANGE -> mean-revert or VWAP candidates may be considered
UPTREND -> pullback, breakout, momentum candidates may be considered
BREAKDOWN -> block new entries or enter extreme conservative mode
HIGH_VOLATILITY -> reduce size, restrict entries, or block entries
LOW_LIQUIDITY -> block new entries
UNCERTAIN -> no aggressive entry
```

Universe selection considers liquidity, spread, volatility, trend, depth, execution feasibility, symbol rules, strategy fit, and market type constraints. Excluded candidates must have structured exclusion reason.

## 11. official API verification

Before marking any live adapter ready, current official exchange information must be verified.

If verification is unavailable:

```text
adapter may be implemented as contract or mock
paper and shadow may run
read-only checks may run
live readiness remains BLOCKED
```

TTL:

```text
symbol rules -> 24h
fees -> 7d
rate limits -> 7d
auth/permission policy -> 30d
order type support -> 30d
manual order-test evidence -> 30d or until key rotation
```

Immediate invalidation:

```text
exchange official source hash changed
API key rotated
permission changed
withdraw permission detected
symbol rule mismatch detected
order reject reason caused by rule mismatch
rate limit behavior changed
websocket schema mismatch
adapter response schema mismatch
```

## 12. live final guard

Every live order submit must re-check:

```text
mode == LIVE
exchange verified
market_type verified
ACTIVE snapshot valid
FinalDecision exists
FinalDecision not stale
risk veto false
hard truth complete
data freshness pass
reconciliation fresh
protection ready
emergency flatten available
watchdog active
idempotency key exists
ledger writer available
live_order_ready true
live_order_allowed true
```

If any check fails, order is not submitted.

local_state_only protection allows:

```text
existing position reduction
existing position exit
open order cancellation
reconciliation
safe mode
emergency flatten preparation
```

local_state_only protection forbids:

```text
new live entry
add position
pyramiding
size expansion
risk profile upgrade
```

## 13. operator control

Allowed operator controls:

```text
manual_stop
manual_resume_read_only
manual_ack_trade_disabled
manual_unlock_held_market_event
manual_retry_reconcile
manual_safe_mode
manual_disable_strategy
manual_reduce_position
manual_exit_all_positions
```

manual control cannot bypass:

```text
risk veto
kill switch
ledger durability
reconciliation required
hard truth missing
symbol rule
legal or exchange policy block
live readiness
```

High-risk actions require operator identity hash, explicit target scope, confirmation, audit record before and after action, dashboard display, FinalDecision when order-affecting, ledger record when order-affecting, and reconciliation after action.

## 14. dashboard and user interface

Dashboard is an operating interface, not a truth engine.

First view must answer:

```text
Is the system normal?
Is it paper or live?
Which exchange and market type?
Is live trading allowed, review-only, or blocked?
Is it making or losing money?
Why is it not entering?
Why did it enter held positions?
Should the user wait, stop, or act?
```

Required first-view fields:

```text
mode
exchange
market_type
operator badge
engine state
live readiness surface
current action
one-line blocking reason
portfolio equity
cash or available balance
locked balance
today PnL
realized PnL
unrealized PnL
MDD
positions
open orders
pending confirms
watch universe
entry candidates
last no-trade reason
recent errors
resource health
exchange health
data freshness
applied snapshot id for live
protection status
reconciliation age
next action
```

Allowed first-line display:

```text
LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - <primary_blocker_message>
LIVE TRADING: REVIEW ONLY - live orders blocked
LIVE TRADING: SMALL BURN-IN - <scope>
LIVE TRADING: ACTIVE - <scope>
PAPER TRADING: READY - live orders blocked
READ ONLY: READY - data collection only
```

Forbidden standalone display:

```text
READY
LIVE READY
release ready
start ready
```

## 15. bundle hygiene and source identity

Bundles are separated.

```text
source bundle
release bundle
evidence bundle
diagnostic bundle
```

Source bundle allowlist:

```text
src/
tests/
docs/
contracts/
config/
configs/examples/
README.md
pyproject.toml
requirements*.txt
TRADER_1.md
AGENTS.md
UPBIT_PAPER.*
UPBIT_LIVE.*
BINANCE_PAPER.*
BINANCE_LIVE.*
```

Source bundle denylist:

```text
system/
export/
release/
logs/
__pycache__/
.pytest_cache/
.mypy_cache/
.ruff_cache/
*.pyc
*.pyo
*.sqlite
*.db
*.jsonl
*.log
*.tmp
*.bak
.env
.env.*
*secret*
*token*
*private*
```

Rules:

```text
credential scan and redaction must run before bundle creation
source archive requires forbidden_count=0
release package READY never implies live_order_ready
source identity mismatch blocks release readiness and live readiness
contains_secret=true blocks release and external share
```

## 16. security, operations, backup, accounting, regulation

Security:

```text
API keys must not be committed
API keys must not appear in logs
signatures, account IDs, private payloads, and secrets must be masked
withdrawal permission must not be accepted as normal
live API key permission must be validated before live start
IP restriction and key rotation should be documented
if secret handling is unclear, block live and use paper or read-only
```

Operations monitor:

```text
CPU
memory
disk
inode
network
DB state
event latency
queue backlog
REST health
WebSocket health
private stream health
rate limit pressure
watchdog heartbeat
```

Backup targets:

```text
ledger
config
evidence
strategy state
parameter snapshot
performance records
LIVE_READY snapshot
registry
manifest
```

Accounting separation:

```text
realized PnL
unrealized PnL
fee
funding fee
slippage cost
deposit
withdrawal
transfer
foreign exchange effect
```

Deposits and withdrawals must not be counted as trading PnL. Tax rules depend on jurisdiction and date. Final filing requires professional review.

Policy blockers:

```text
API schema change
rate limit change
order policy change
symbol rule change
minimum order condition change
leverage limit change
delisting
trading halt
exchange maintenance
deposit or withdrawal halt
tax or reporting duty change
stablecoin depeg
funding spike
```

## 17. testing lanes

Required test lanes:

```text
compileall
unit
contract
config schema
integration
paper dry-run
replay
readiness
live blocked
emergency flatten dry-run
reconciliation
artifact hygiene
source identity
security scan
```

Live blocked test must verify no live order adapter call when:

```text
live_entry_enabled false
LIVE_READY missing or invalid
operator policy fail
local_state_only protection
stale data
risk blocked
reconciliation stale
artifact hygiene fail
shadow or replay incomplete
config invalid
emergency flatten unavailable
symbol rule unknown
final guard disabled
official API verification stale
source identity mismatch
manual order test missing
operator approval missing
entry maturity below Level 5
exit maturity below Level 5
edge model incomplete
sizing trace missing
regime confidence too low
strategy unit scope mismatch
ACTIVE snapshot invalid
strategy threshold not validated
HIGH contract gap open
CRITICAL contract gap open
```

## 18. implementation completion criteria

TRADER_1 is implementation-complete only when all are true.

```text
root launchers are exactly four
paper and live are physically separated
live cannot order without valid LIVE_READY and preflight
all orders pass FinalDecision
all orders have idempotency key
ledger write failure blocks live
hard truth missing blocks new entry
all no-trade records have closed reason code
all entries have structured entry evidence
summary.json is dashboard source only
exchange, market_type, mode data are separated
adapter interfaces and exchange-specific constraints are implemented
Binance futures liquidation risk is modeled
risk veto cannot be bypassed
kill switch works
private stream failure has conservative policy
ambiguous order outcome uses same identifier reconciliation
stage gates and validators are connected to execution blocking
dashboard shows status, PnL, MDD, no-trade reason, entry reason, live readiness
user does not choose parameters or evidence files manually
full audit has zero blocking defects
source, release, evidence, and diagnostic bundles are separated and hygienic
all live blockers have validator coverage
all HIGH or CRITICAL contract gaps are closed before live
```

## 19. final operating rule

```text
AI compiler fills document gaps with safe implementation, but never interprets uncertainty as a trading opportunity. When uncertain, choose no trade, safe mode, reconciliation, read-only, paper, shadow, or blocked status. Every blocker must be explainable, every stage claim must be evidence-backed, and every live order must pass the live final guard.
```


---

## 20. Document cleanliness and consistency hardening contract

document status: active design authority hardening supplement

This chapter is an active contract for reducing document cleanliness risk, consistency risk, machine-readability risk, and duplicate risk while preserving the single-file structure. It does not delete existing requirements and prevents lower retained source text from being reinterpreted as execution authority.

### 20.1 Single-file preservation rule

```text
file_split=false
removed_requirements=[]
existing_user_requirements_preserved=true
detailed_requirements_preserved=true
retained_archive_preserved=true
```

Rules:

```text
document cleanup is not requirement deletion.
Existing requirements, user requirements, detailed details, and hardening appendices are not deleted.
Duplicate body text is preserved in the retained archive, and execution authority remains in the top active contract.
Repeated wording in the retained archive does not create new authority or looser exceptions.
Additional requirements found only in the retained archive remain final scope unless they weaken safety, namespace separation, fail-closed behavior, validation, or user-simple UX.
```

### 20.2 Reading boundary between active region and retained archive

```text
primary_active_authority_region = file start through the last active hardening supplement before normalization layer
normalization_region = document normalization metadata and coverage index
retained_source_archive_region = English-equivalent preservation archive after retained source archive marker
```

Machine read order:

```text
1. active contract pack
2. execution contract body
3. active hardening supplement
4. normalization metadata and coverage index
5. retained archive only for coverage, traceability, backlog, or omitted-detail lookup
```

Rules:

```text
If the active region and retained archive conflict, the active region and the more conservative fail-closed rule take priority.
Archive wording alone cannot create live_order_ready or live_order_allowed.
Archive wording may be used as validator candidates, coverage candidates, or backlog candidates.
```

### 20.3 Closed enum and schema consistency hardening

The following fields must be generated as registry-backed closed codes, not free strings.

```text
final_decision.blocking_reason -> no_trade_reason or live_blocker code
summary.blocking_reason -> no_trade_reason or live_blocker code
readiness_surface.primary_blocker_code -> no_trade_reason or live_blocker code
readiness_surface.blockers[].code -> no_trade_reason or live_blocker code
manual_order_test_evidence.blockers[] -> no_trade_reason or live_blocker code
official_api_verification_report.blockers[].code -> no_trade_reason or live_blocker code
evidence_manifest.known_blockers[] -> no_trade_reason, live_blocker, validator_id, or contract_gap_id
order failure classification -> order_failure_type enum
```

Rules:

```text
even if an existing schema block represents a field as string, generated schema must use the registry-backed enum when the registry defines a closed enum.
free text is allowed only in message or detail.
code must be a closed enum.
UNKNOWN_BLOCKED is a last-resort fallback code and must have detail.
Unknown critical code is handled as BLOCKED or SAFE_MODE.
```

### 20.4 Blocker object normalization

Operator-facing, validator-facing, evidence-facing, and readiness-facing blockers use the following shape or a stricter shape.

```text
code
category
severity
message
detail when needed
evidence_id when available
blocks_start
blocks_live_order
source_contract_id when available
```

Rules:

```text
code is a closed code.
message is user-facing text.
detail is explanatory text.
severity does not replace code.
category does not replace code.
If blocks_live_order=true, then live_order_ready=false and live_order_allowed=false.
```

### 20.5 Canonical registry projection hardening

The MVP-0 registry must project the following values as a single source.

```text
no_trade_reason enum
live_blocker code registry
order_failure_type enum
blocker_category enum
severity enum
readiness vocabulary
validator id registry
stage gate id registry
risk profile id registry
path slug registry
operator action enum
schema id registry
```

Rules:

```text
Duplicate prose lists are replaced by registry projection.
If prose lists and registry differ, registry takes priority in generated sections.
If the registry was not generated from active authority or the hash does not match, the affected path is BLOCKED.
```

### 20.6 Coverage index and non-deletion validation

Coverage status values:

```text
ACTIVE_MAPPED
RETAINED_MAPPED
BACKLOG_CANDIDATE
VALIDATOR_CANDIDATE
SUPERSEDED_BY_ACTIVE
BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY
UNMAPPED
```

Rules:

```text
UNMAPPED does not mean requirement deletion.
An UNMAPPED live-affecting requirement creates a contract_gap.
coverage_index_validator FAIL blocks live readiness claims.
removed_requirements must be [].
```

### 20.7 Document metadata consistency rules

Normalization metadata must be updated based on the current input file.

```text
source_file must match the current input file name
output_file must match the generated output file name
input_sha256 must refer to the current input file
active_payload_sha256 must refer to the active region before normalization
retained_archive_sha256 must refer to the retained archive region only
line counts must be regenerated after active supplement insertion
```

Self-hash rule:

```text
output_file_sha256 is calculated after write and must not be embedded as an authority value inside the same file.
```

### 20.8 live safety invariant after cleanup

```text
document_cleanup_patch -> live_order_ready remains false unless independent live evidence exists
document_cleanup_patch -> live_order_allowed remains false unless LIVE_ENABLING evidence exists
metadata_update -> never opens live
coverage_index_update -> never opens live
schema_enum_hardening -> can only preserve or reduce live permission
```


## 21. Integrated hardening contract for exploration, promotion, LIVE_READY writer, resources, and data quality

document status: active design authority hardening supplement

This chapter integrates the uploaded final patch proposal improvement version into the TRADER_1 active design authority. It does not delete or relax existing requirements; it allows broader exploration while closing promotion and live application more strictly.

Application invariants:

```text
No requirement removal
No requirement reduction
No detail loss
No file splitting
No semantic weakening
No live safety weakening
No promotion threshold weakening
No active contract weakening
```

### 21.1 Patch class and exploration stage registry integration

The MVP-0 registry must include the following closed enums.

```text
exploration_stage:
  STAGE_A_WIDE
  STAGE_B_REFINEMENT

promotion_input_type:
  NOT_PROMOTION_INPUT
  EXPLORATION_CANDIDATE
  REFINEMENT_CANDIDATE
  LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT
```

Rules:

```text
STAGE_A_WIDE:
  allowed_modes = REPLAY, SHADOW
  expanded_bounds_allowed = true
  expanded_bounds_validator_required = true
  output = EXPLORATION_CANDIDATE only
  direct_live_promotion = forbidden
  live_ready_evidence = forbidden

STAGE_B_REFINEMENT:
  allowed_modes = REPLAY, PAPER, SHADOW
  expanded_bounds_allowed = true
  expanded_bounds_validator_required = true
  output = LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT only
  not LIVE_READY snapshot
  not ACTIVE snapshot
```

### 21.2 Separation invariants between exploration and execution

```text
exploration_candidate != ACTIVE_snapshot
paper_winner != live_config
candidate_snapshot != LIVE_READY_snapshot
expanded_exploration_bound != live_parameter_bound
LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT != LIVE_READY snapshot
Stage_A_output != LIVE_READY evidence
Stage_B_output != LIVE_READY snapshot
candidate -> LIVE direct path forbidden
candidate_snapshot -> ACTIVE snapshot direct transition forbidden
LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT -> LIVE_READY direct interpretation forbidden
Stage_B PASS -> LIVE_READY direct interpretation forbidden
LIVE uses only a valid LIVE_READY snapshot
live_order_ready=true and live_order_allowed=true are both required
```

### 21.3 promotion input type rules

```text
NOT_PROMOTION_INPUT -> promotion forbidden
EXPLORATION_CANDIDATE -> promotion forbidden
REFINEMENT_CANDIDATE -> may become writer input only after Stage B validator PASS
LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT -> input to LIVE_READY snapshot generation only, not LIVE_READY itself
unknown promotion_input_type -> BLOCKED
```

### 21.4 LIVE_READY snapshot writer guard

New mandatory validator:

```text
live_ready_snapshot_writer_validator
```

Rules:

```text
LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT -> LIVE_READY snapshot generation requires separate live_ready_snapshot_writer_validator PASS
writer input treated as snapshot -> BLOCKED
Stage B PASS treated as LIVE_READY -> BLOCKED
snapshot generated with stale validator result -> BLOCKED
snapshot generated with UNTESTED validator result -> BLOCKED
snapshot generated with missing evidence manifest -> BLOCKED
snapshot generated with scope mismatch -> BLOCKED
```

Required validation:

```text
promotion_input_type == LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT
all promotion thresholds PASS
all blocking validators PASS
zero HIGH contract_gap
zero CRITICAL contract_gap
registry_hash match
schema_bundle_hash match
source_tree_hash match
strategy_unit scope match
exchange scope match
market_type scope match
risk_profile scope match
parameter_hash match
paper/live parity PASS when applicable
execution quality PASS
cost_after_edge PASS
evidence_manifest present and fresh
validator results fresh
manual or operator requirements preserved
```

### 21.5 exploration parameter bounds

The MVP-0 registry must include the following groups or stricter equivalents.

```yaml
exploration_parameter_bounds:
  initial_candidate_bound:
  expanded_exploration_bound:
  allowed_stage:
  allowed_mode:
  expanded_bounds_allowed:
  expanded_bounds_validator_required:
  validator_required:
  promotion_allowed:
```

Example defaults:

```text
ATR:
  initial = 0.5 ~ 2.5
  expanded = 0.2 ~ 4.0

take_profit_r:
  initial = 1.0 ~ 3.5
  expanded = 0.5 ~ 5.0

EMA:
  initial = 10 ~ 100
  expanded = 5 ~ 200

signal_ttl_candles:
  initial = 1 ~ 12
  expanded = 1 ~ 30

time_stop_candles:
  initial = 3 ~ 40
  expanded = 1 ~ 100
```

Rules:

```text
expanded_exploration_bound is REPLAY/SHADOW only by default
PAPER use requires validator PASS
PAPER use requires explicit_experiment_scope
PAPER use requires candidate_risk_profile = CONSERVATIVE
PAPER use may use a registry-defined stricter-than-CONSERVATIVE profile if added later
LIVE_READY promotion requires Stage B validation
expanded bound itself is not profitability evidence
expanded bound itself is not live_parameter_bound
```

### 21.6 promotion threshold non-weakening rule

```text
exploration expansion does not weaken promotion
expanded exploration bound does not lower LIVE_READY requirements
promotion threshold relaxation is forbidden
Stage A success is not LIVE_READY evidence by itself
Stage B PASS is required before LIVE_READY candidate generation
LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT is not LIVE_READY
LIVE_READY snapshot generation still requires all promotion thresholds and all blocking validators PASS
LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT -> LIVE_READY snapshot generation requires live_ready_snapshot_writer_validator PASS
```

Existing promotion criteria are preserved.

```text
replay closed trades >= 100
paper closed trades >= 30
paper runtime >= 72h
shadow signal opportunities >= 50
walk-forward or out-of-sample >= 30%
net_ev_after_cost positive
profit_factor > 1.05
fill_quality_score PASS
paper_live_gap within threshold
zero HIGH or CRITICAL contract_gap
zero blocking validator FAIL
```

### 21.7 new blocker codes

The following codes must be registered as no_trade_reason or live_blocker closed registry codes.

```text
MEASUREMENT_MISSING
EXECUTION_QUALITY_UNTESTED
EXPANDED_BOUND_UNVERIFIED
PROMOTION_INPUT_TYPE_INVALID
EXPLORATION_STAGE_MISMATCH
VARIATION_UNREGISTERED
TIMEFRAME_SCOPE_MISMATCH
CANDIDATE_BUDGET_EXCEEDED
DUPLICATE_CANDIDATE
EXPLORATION_RESOURCE_LIMIT
LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_UNTESTED
LIVE_READY_SNAPSHOT_WRITER_FAILED
```

Rules:

```text
All new codes must be registered as closed registry codes
Free-text-only reason is forbidden
Dashboard display text mapping is required
Validator result and readiness blocker must use the same code
```

### 21.8 risk parameter conditional allowance

new validators:

```text
low_rr_ratio_validator
cost_after_edge_validator
expanded_bound_validator
timeframe_scope_validator
```

Rules:

```text
take_profit_r < 1.0:
  high_winrate_hypothesis required
  cost_after_edge_validator PASS required
  sufficient_sample_required
  overfit_signal_check required
  LIVE_READY direct promotion forbidden

TTL/time_stop expansion:
  base_timeframe required
  timeframe_scope required
  holding_time_estimate required
```

### 21.9 structural variation registry

The MVP-0 registry must include the following groups.

```yaml
entry_variation:
exit_variation:
execution_variation:
```

Allowed defaults:

```text
entry_variation:
  breakout
  retest
  momentum
  mean_reversion
  vwap_reversion
  pullback

exit_variation:
  fixed_tp
  trailing_tp
  partial_exit
  time_exit
  volatility_exit
  invalidation_exit
  hard_stop

execution_variation:
  market
  limit
  ioc
  maker
  split_order
  single_order
```

Rules:

```text
unregistered variation -> BLOCKED
variation combination must affect strategy_build_id and parameter_hash
variation change is a new candidate
execution variation cannot become LIVE_READY without exchange rule verification
```

### 21.10 execution variation live restriction

new validators:

```text
execution_realism_validator
execution_quality_measurement_validator
realized_slippage_validator
fill_quality_validator
```

Rules:

```text
slippage unknown -> promotion BLOCKED
impact unknown -> promotion BLOCKED
fill_quality missing -> promotion BLOCKED
measurement missing -> execution quality UNTESTED
fee model unknown -> FEE_MODEL_UNVERIFIED
execution variation cannot become LIVE_READY without exchange rule verification
```

### 21.11 regime grouping and regime scope

The canonical MarketRegime enum is preserved.

```text
DOWNTREND
RANGE
UPTREND
BREAKDOWN
HIGH_VOLATILITY
LOW_LIQUIDITY
UNCERTAIN
```

Convenience grouping:

```yaml
regime_family:
  TRENDING:
    - UPTREND
    - DOWNTREND
  RANGE:
    - RANGE
  RISK_OFF:
    - BREAKDOWN
    - HIGH_VOLATILITY
    - LOW_LIQUIDITY
    - UNCERTAIN
```

Rules:

```text
regime_family is a convenience grouping and does not replace canonical MarketRegime enum
DOWNTREND spot long -> restricted unless validated exception exists
regime_scope is part of strategy_unit
regime mismatch -> promotion BLOCKED
insufficient regime evidence -> LIVE_READY forbidden
regime evidence is separated by strategy_unit, exchange, market_type, and timeframe_scope
```

### 21.12 timeframe scope

Candidate mandatory fields:

```text
timeframe_scope
base_timeframe
holding_time_estimate
```

Rules:

```text
timeframe_scope mismatch -> BLOCKED
TTL/time_stop expansion requires timeframe_scope
timeframe_scope must be included in candidate identity when it changes signal or holding behavior
```

### 21.13 combination dimensions and complexity limits

New registry group:

```yaml
combination_dimensions:
  - entry
  - exit
  - regime
  - execution
  - timeframe
  - liquidity_tier
```

Rules:

```text
combination exploration prioritizes REPLAY/SHADOW
PAPER application is allowed only in Stage B
LIVE_READY candidate requires complexity validator PASS
combination_dimension change must affect parameter_hash or strategy_build_id
unregistered combination_dimension -> BLOCKED
```

new validators:

```text
combination_complexity_validator
structural_variation_validator
timeframe_scope_validator
candidate_complexity_validator
```

Conditions:

```text
max_entry_conditions_per_candidate exceeded -> BLOCKED
max_exit_conditions_per_candidate exceeded -> BLOCKED
timeframe_scope mismatch -> BLOCKED
unregistered variation -> BLOCKED
complexity score exceeded -> BLOCKED or RETIRED
```

### 21.14 exploration resource limits and duplicate pruning

The MVP-0 registry must include the following groups.

```yaml
exploration_limits:
  max_parallel_shadow_builds
  max_generation_cycles_per_day
  max_replay_cpu_budget
  max_candidate_family_share
  max_storage_growth_per_day
  max_unreviewed_candidate_age
```

new validators:

```text
candidate_budget_validator
exploration_resource_validator
duplicate_candidate_pruning_validator
```

Rules:

```text
resource budget exceeded -> exploration throttled
resource critical -> exploration paused
exploration path cannot outrank live path
exploration cannot outrank ledger, reconciliation, live blocker, or dashboard health
exploration_resource_limit cannot weaken live safety blocker
same exchange + same market_type + same strategy_id + same strategy_build_id + same parameter_hash + same regime_scope + same timeframe_scope -> exact duplicate
exact duplicate -> prune
near duplicate -> merge or lower priority
duplicate candidate is excluded from promotion
pruned candidate keeps audit record
Unbounded candidate expansion is forbidden
Increase exploration density through build iteration, shadow parallelism, and pruning
Keep max_candidates_per_strategy_build
Keep max_candidates_per_generation_cycle
Candidate growth is allowed only within resource budget
```

### 21.15 data quality and automatic adjustment safety

Data quality enforcement:

```text
fee missing -> FEE_MODEL_UNVERIFIED
slippage missing -> MEASUREMENT_MISSING
impact missing -> MEASUREMENT_MISSING
fill_quality missing -> EXECUTION_QUALITY_UNTESTED
cost components missing -> promotion BLOCKED
```

Mode handling:

```text
REPLAY/SHADOW:
  candidate may remain
  promotion forbidden

PAPER:
  Stage B promotion BLOCKED

LIVE_READY:
  BLOCKED

LIVE:
  NO_TRADE
```

Forbidden automatic adjustment:

```text
stop widening after loss is forbidden
paper winner immediate live application is forbidden
candidate snapshot -> ACTIVE snapshot direct transition is forbidden
same-position hot-swap without risk reduction is forbidden
aggressive parameter change after poor live performance is forbidden
live parameter change based on Stage A result is forbidden
```

Allowed exceptions:

```text
risk-reducing rollback may bypass cooldown
emergency downgrade is immediate
safe mode is immediate
size reduction is immediate
```

### 21.16 schema field integration candidates

The following fields must be included in the relevant schema or a stricter equivalent.

```text
exploration_stage
exploration_bound_type
variation_signature
timeframe_scope
base_timeframe
holding_time_estimate
regime_family
combination_dimensions
experiment_scope
candidate_risk_profile
candidate_budget_id
duplicate_group_id
promotion_input_type
live_ready_snapshot_writer_status
live_ready_snapshot_writer_validator_id
```

Application targets:

```text
strategy_candidate
candidate_generation_report
evidence_manifest
live_ready_candidate_writer_input
validator_result
readiness_surface
live_ready_snapshot
```

### 21.17 Final list of new validators

```text
exploration_stage_validator
expanded_bound_validator
low_rr_ratio_validator
structural_variation_validator
execution_realism_validator
regime_scope_validator
combination_complexity_validator
candidate_budget_validator
duplicate_candidate_pruning_validator
timeframe_scope_validator
cost_after_edge_validator
fill_quality_validator
exploration_resource_validator
candidate_complexity_validator
promotion_input_type_validator
live_ready_snapshot_writer_validator
```

MVP application rules:

```text
MVP-0:
  registry entry + schema placeholder + validator scaffold allowed
  missing implementation -> UNTESTED
  UNTESTED -> not READY
  live_order_allowed=false

MVP-2~MVP-3:
  actual validator logic should be implemented for paper, replay, shadow candidate paths

MVP-4~MVP-5:
  all promotion and live writer validators must PASS before live readiness claim
```

### 21.18 Full English Replacement separation

Full English Replacement is a separate follow-up patch.

```text
PATCH_CLASS:
  DOCUMENT_NORMALIZATION_PATCH
  DOC_CONTRACT_PATCH

active contract pack, registry, schema, validator semantics are frozen
MVP-0 through MVP-3 implementation must not be blocked by English replacement
English normalization is optional unless Korean prose causes actual implementation ambiguity
```

Rules:

```text
Replace 100% of Korean prose with English
Do not summarize Korean sections
Do not delete Korean sections
Do not move details into separate files
Do not reduce retained archive content
Do not collapse detailed lists into shorter summaries
Do not convert exact contract terms into softer language
Do not change enum names unless they are explicitly Korean-only prose labels
Do not change schema IDs unless required by registry policy
Do not change project identity
Do not change file structure
```

Additional validators:

```text
document_no_korean_text_validator
requirement_preservation_validator
heading_coverage_validator
retained_archive_coverage_validator
contract_semantics_equivalence_validator
no_file_split_validator
```

Acceptance condition:

```text
removed_requirements = []
file_split = false
all prior headings preserved or English-equivalent heading preserved
all contract lists preserved
all tables preserved
all active and retained archive sections preserved
all Korean prose replaced with English
no live safety weakening
no promotion threshold weakening
```

### 21.19 Final structure

```text
Stage A:
wide exploration
REPLAY/SHADOW centered
extreme values allowed
generates EXPLORATION_CANDIDATE only
direct live promotion forbidden
cannot be LIVE_READY evidence by itself

Stage B:
refinement validation
REPLAY/PAPER/SHADOW evidence consolidation
cost, slippage, impact, fill quality validation
generates LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT
not LIVE_READY snapshot itself
snapshot generation requires live_ready_snapshot_writer_validator PASS

LIVE:
uses only valid LIVE_READY snapshot
snapshot scope match required
live_order_ready=true required
live_order_allowed=true required
live final guard PASS required
```

### 21.20 Uploaded patch source preservation

The source below is preserved to keep the uploaded final patch proposal improvement version without requirement loss. Sections 21.1 through 21.19 above are execution authority; the source below preserves the same requirements for traceability.

~~~text
# Final patch proposal improvement version

## 0. Application principles

```text
No requirement removal
No requirement reduction
No detail loss
No file splitting
No semantic weakening
No live safety weakening
No promotion threshold weakening
No active contract weakening
```

English normalization is separated as a follow-up patch.

```text
Full English Replacement is separated as DOCUMENT_NORMALIZATION_PATCH, not as an immediate implementation patch.
Do not block MVP-0 through MVP-3 implementation.
Apply it after active contract, registry, schema, and validator semantics are frozen.
```

---

# 1. Priority 1: recommended for immediate application

## 1.1 Separate exploration stages

PATCH_CLASS:

```text
REGISTRY_PATCH
DOC_CONTRACT_PATCH
SCHEMA_PATCH
VALIDATOR_PATCH
```

Add:

```text
exploration_stage:
  STAGE_A_WIDE
  STAGE_B_REFINEMENT
```

Rules:

```text
STAGE_A_WIDE:
  allowed_modes = REPLAY, SHADOW
  expanded_bounds_allowed = true
  expanded_bounds_validator_required = true
  output = EXPLORATION_CANDIDATE only
  direct_live_promotion = forbidden
  live_ready_evidence = forbidden

STAGE_B_REFINEMENT:
  allowed_modes = REPLAY, PAPER, SHADOW
  expanded_bounds_allowed = true
  expanded_bounds_validator_required = true
  output = LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT only
  not LIVE_READY snapshot
  not ACTIVE snapshot
```

---

## 1.2 Strengthen separation between exploration and execution

PATCH_CLASS:

```text
DOC_CONTRACT_PATCH
SCHEMA_PATCH
VALIDATOR_PATCH
```

additional rule:

```text
exploration_candidate != ACTIVE_snapshot
paper_winner != live_config
candidate_snapshot != LIVE_READY_snapshot
expanded_exploration_bound != live_parameter_bound
LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT != LIVE_READY snapshot
Stage_A_output != LIVE_READY evidence
Stage_B_output != LIVE_READY snapshot
```

Enforce:

```text
candidate -> LIVE direct path forbidden
candidate_snapshot -> ACTIVE snapshot direct transition forbidden
LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT -> LIVE_READY direct interpretation forbidden
Stage_B PASS -> LIVE_READY direct interpretation forbidden
LIVE uses only a valid LIVE_READY snapshot
live_order_ready=true and live_order_allowed=true are both required
```

---

## 1.3 promotion input type closed enum

PATCH_CLASS:

```text
REGISTRY_PATCH
SCHEMA_PATCH
VALIDATOR_PATCH
```

new enum:

```text
promotion_input_type:
  NOT_PROMOTION_INPUT
  EXPLORATION_CANDIDATE
  REFINEMENT_CANDIDATE
  LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT
```

Rules:

```text
NOT_PROMOTION_INPUT -> promotion forbidden
EXPLORATION_CANDIDATE -> promotion forbidden
REFINEMENT_CANDIDATE -> may become writer input only after Stage B validator PASS
LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT -> input to LIVE_READY snapshot generation only, not LIVE_READY itself
unknown promotion_input_type -> BLOCKED
```

---

## 1.4 LIVE_READY snapshot writer guard

PATCH_CLASS:

```text
REGISTRY_PATCH
SCHEMA_PATCH
VALIDATOR_PATCH
```

Additional validators:

```text
live_ready_snapshot_writer_validator
```

Rules:

```text
LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT -> LIVE_READY snapshot generation requires separate live_ready_snapshot_writer_validator PASS
```

Required validation:

```text
promotion_input_type == LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT
all promotion thresholds PASS
all blocking validators PASS
zero HIGH contract_gap
zero CRITICAL contract_gap
registry_hash match
schema_bundle_hash match
source_tree_hash match
strategy_unit scope match
exchange scope match
market_type scope match
risk_profile scope match
parameter_hash match
paper/live parity PASS when applicable
execution quality PASS
cost_after_edge PASS
evidence_manifest present and fresh
validator results fresh
manual or operator requirements preserved
```

Forbidden:

```text
writer input treated as snapshot
Stage B PASS treated as LIVE_READY
snapshot generated with stale validator result
snapshot generated with UNTESTED validator result
snapshot generated with missing evidence manifest
snapshot generated with scope mismatch
```

---

## 1.5 Exploration-only parameter bounds

PATCH_CLASS:

```text
REGISTRY_PATCH
SCHEMA_PATCH
VALIDATOR_PATCH
```

new registry group:

```yaml
exploration_parameter_bounds:
  initial_candidate_bound:
  expanded_exploration_bound:
  allowed_stage:
  allowed_mode:
  expanded_bounds_allowed:
  expanded_bounds_validator_required:
  validator_required:
  promotion_allowed:
```

Example:

```text

  initial = 0.5 ~ 2.5
  expanded = 0.2 ~ 4.0

take_profit_r:
  initial = 1.0 ~ 3.5
  expanded = 0.5 ~ 5.0

EMA:
  initial = 10 ~ 100
  expanded = 5 ~ 200

signal_ttl_candles:
  initial = 1 ~ 12
  expanded = 1 ~ 30

time_stop_candles:
  initial = 3 ~ 40
  expanded = 1 ~ 100
```

Rules:

```text
expanded_exploration_bound is REPLAY/SHADOW only by default
PAPER use requires validator PASS
PAPER use requires explicit_experiment_scope
PAPER use requires candidate_risk_profile = CONSERVATIVE
PAPER use may use a registry-defined stricter-than-CONSERVATIVE profile if added later
LIVE_READY promotion requires Stage B validation
expanded bound itself is not profitability evidence
expanded bound itself is not live_parameter_bound
```
~~~
