~~~text
Increase exploration density through build iteration, shadow parallelism, and pruning
Keep max_candidates_per_strategy_build
Keep max_candidates_per_generation_cycle
Candidate growth is allowed only within resource budget
```

---

# 4. Priority 4: data quality and automatic-adjustment safety

## 4.1 Make data quality mandatory

PATCH_CLASS:

```text
VALIDATOR_PATCH
SCHEMA_PATCH
```

Enforce:

```text
fee missing -> FEE_MODEL_UNVERIFIED
slippage missing -> MEASUREMENT_MISSING
impact missing -> MEASUREMENT_MISSING
fill_quality missing -> EXECUTION_QUALITY_UNTESTED
cost components missing -> promotion BLOCKED
```

Mode-specific handling:

```text
REPLAY/SHADOW:
  candidate may remain
  promotion forbidden

PAPER:
  Stage B promotion BLOCKED

LIVE_READY:
  BLOCKED

LIVE:
  NO_TRADE
```

---

## 4.2 Harden automatic-adjustment safety

PATCH_CLASS:

```text
DOC_CONTRACT_PATCH
VALIDATOR_PATCH
```

Additional prohibitions:

```text
stop widening after loss is forbidden
paper winner immediate live application is forbidden
candidate snapshot -> ACTIVE snapshot direct transition is forbidden
same-position hot-swap without risk reduction is forbidden
aggressive parameter change after poor live performance is forbidden
live parameter change based on Stage A result is forbidden
```

Exceptions:

```text
risk-reducing rollback may bypass cooldown
emergency downgrade is immediate
safe mode is immediate
size reduction is immediate
```

---

# 5. New schema field candidates

PATCH_CLASS:

```text
SCHEMA_PATCH
```

candidate field:

```text
exploration_stage
exploration_bound_type
variation_signature
timeframe_scope
base_timeframe
holding_time_estimate
regime_family
combination_dimensions
experiment_scope
candidate_risk_profile
candidate_budget_id
duplicate_group_id
promotion_input_type
live_ready_snapshot_writer_status
live_ready_snapshot_writer_validator_id
```

Application targets:

```text
strategy_candidate
candidate_generation_report
evidence_manifest
live_ready_candidate_writer_input
validator_result
readiness_surface
live_ready_snapshot
```

---

# 6. Final list of new validators

```text
exploration_stage_validator
expanded_bound_validator
low_rr_ratio_validator
structural_variation_validator
execution_realism_validator
regime_scope_validator
combination_complexity_validator
candidate_budget_validator
duplicate_candidate_pruning_validator
timeframe_scope_validator
cost_after_edge_validator
fill_quality_validator
exploration_resource_validator
candidate_complexity_validator
promotion_input_type_validator
live_ready_snapshot_writer_validator
```

MVP application rules:

```text
MVP-0:
  registry entry + schema placeholder + validator scaffold allowed
  missing implementation -> UNTESTED
  UNTESTED -> not READY
  live_order_allowed=false

MVP-2~MVP-3:
  actual validator logic should be implemented for paper, replay, shadow candidate paths

MVP-4~MVP-5:
  all promotion and live writer validators must PASS before live readiness claim
```

---

# 7. Separate follow-up patch: Full English Replacement

PATCH_CLASS:

```text
DOCUMENT_NORMALIZATION_PATCH
DOC_CONTRACT_PATCH
```

apply condition:

```text
active contract pack, registry, schema, validator semantics are frozen
MVP-0 through MVP-3 implementation must not be blocked by English replacement
English normalization is optional unless Korean prose causes actual implementation ambiguity
```

Scope:

```text
TRADER_1.md
AGENTS.md
active contract sections
generated section descriptions
normalization layers
retained source archive content
tables
validator descriptions
schema comments or prose
dashboard display mapping prose
patch workflow prose
evidence and audit prose
```

Rules:

```text
Replace 100% of Korean prose with English
Do not summarize Korean sections
Do not delete Korean sections
Do not move details into separate files
Do not reduce retained archive content
Do not collapse detailed lists into shorter summaries
Do not convert exact contract terms into softer language
Do not change enum names unless they are explicitly Korean-only prose labels
Do not change schema IDs unless required by registry policy
Do not change project identity
Do not change file structure
```

Additional validators:

```text
document_no_korean_text_validator
requirement_preservation_validator
heading_coverage_validator
retained_archive_coverage_validator
contract_semantics_equivalence_validator
no_file_split_validator
```

Acceptance condition:

```text
removed_requirements = []
file_split = false
all prior headings preserved or English-equivalent heading preserved
all contract lists preserved
all tables preserved
all active and retained archive sections preserved
all Korean prose replaced with English
no live safety weakening
no promotion threshold weakening
```

---

# 8. Final structure

```text
Stage A:
wide exploration
REPLAY/SHADOW centered
extreme values allowed
generates EXPLORATION_CANDIDATE only
direct live promotion forbidden
cannot be LIVE_READY evidence by itself

Stage B:
refinement validation
REPLAY/PAPER/SHADOW evidence consolidation
cost, slippage, impact, fill quality validation
generates LIVE_READY_CANDIDATE_WRITER_INPUT
not LIVE_READY snapshot itself
snapshot generation requires live_ready_snapshot_writer_validator PASS

LIVE:
uses only valid LIVE_READY snapshot
snapshot scope match required
live_order_ready=true required
live_order_allowed=true required
live final guard PASS required
```

# 9. Core conclusion

```text
Exploration becomes more aggressive.
Validation becomes stricter.
Promotion is never weakened.
LIVE remains more conservative than before.
Exploration candidates are not live candidates.
Only a valid LIVE_READY snapshot can be an input to live execution.
Full English Replacement is useful, but should remain a separate normalization patch.
```

~~~

# document cleanliness, duplicate-risk, and machine-readability improvement layer

document status: normalized single-file authority view

Layered source requirements must not be deleted. Lower retained or duplicated body text must not be reinterpreted as execution authority. The AI compiler must read the active area first and use the retained archive only for preservation, traceability, coverage, and backlog mapping.

## normalization application rules

```yaml
normalization_schema_id: trader1.document_normalization.v4_current_source_hardened
generated_at_utc: 2026-04-27T00:00:00Z
source_file: TRADER_1(105).md
output_file: TRADER_1.md
document_kind: active design authority
file_split: false
removed_requirements: []
content_preservation_mode: additive_patch_with_no_requirement_removal
full_english_replacement: true
korean_codepoint_count_after_write: 0
semantic_reduction_allowed: false
detail_reduction_allowed: false
input_sha256: 08429c55f822cac66368730ac8107d7441c62c2265b55c28ff0705ea0d995867
input_line_count: 30731
output_file_sha256_policy: calculate_after_write_do_not_embed_self_hash
authority_sha256_recording_policy: record_final_TRADER_1_sha256_in_AGENTS_or_external_manifest
retained_archive_language_quality: machine_normalized_archive_requires_semantic_mapping
retained_archive_execution_authority: false
retained_archive_can_weaken_active_contract: false
canonical_read_order:
  - active contract or implementation section above
  - normalization and hardening supplement
  - retained archive for coverage and traceability only
live_effect:
  live_order_ready_after: false
  live_order_allowed_after: false
validator_expectations:
  - no_file_split_validator
  - requirement_preservation_validator
  - contract_semantics_equivalence_validator
  - document_no_korean_text_validator
  - coverage_index_validator
  - registry_validator
  - schema_validator
```

## machine reading priority

```text
1. apply the top active contract or active implementation guide in this file first.
2. if an active hardening supplement exists, apply it as part of the active region.
3. duplicated or older lower-body text is for requirement preservation and traceability.
4. lower retained source text does not weaken the active contract.
5. Additional functional requirements that exist only in the lower retained source text remain in final scope as long as they do not weaken safety, namespace separation, fail-closed behavior, validation, or user-simple UX.
6. no requirements were deleted during cleanup; they were preserved in the retained source archive instead.
```

## duplicate-risk handling rules

```text
when the same requirement appears in the active region and retained archive, use the active region as execution authority.
Repeated wording in the retained archive does not create new authority or looser exceptions.
additional retained archive details are used as backlog, coverage, or validator candidates.
retained archive and active area if conflict existing authority order and more conservative fail-closed rule follows.
```

## consistency hardening application result

```text
metadata_source_file_updated=true
metadata_hash_policy_updated=true
active_retained_boundary_strengthened=true
schema_enum_hardening_rule_added=true
blocker_object_normalization_rule_added=true
coverage_status_values_added=true
removed_requirements=[]
file_split=false
```

## schema enum hardening summary

```text
blocking_reason, primary_blocker_code, blockers[].code, known_blockers[], and order failure classification must be registry-backed closed values.
Free-text is allowed only in message or detail fields.
If an older schema block uses plain string for a closed-code field, generated schema must use the stricter registry-backed enum.
UNKNOWN_BLOCKED is a last-resort closed code, not a replacement for detailed mapping.
```

## coverage status policy

```text
ACTIVE_MAPPED: requirement is represented in active authority.
RETAINED_MAPPED: requirement is preserved in retained archive and compatible with active authority.
BACKLOG_CANDIDATE: requirement is preserved and should become implementation backlog.
VALIDATOR_CANDIDATE: requirement is preserved and should become validator coverage.
SUPERSEDED_BY_ACTIVE: retained wording is replaced by stricter active rule.
BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY: retained wording is preserved but cannot be implemented as written because it weakens safety.
UNMAPPED: mapping is unresolved; requirement is not deleted.
```

# retained source archive

document status: lower-authority English-equivalent preservation archive

This area is for source preservation. It is not execution authority; it is for coverage, traceability, backlog review, and verification. Repeated headings, enums, schemas, or rules in this archive do not weaken the top active region or the existing authority order.

````````````````text
# Detailed requirements body

## 0. document purpose and non-deletion principle

### 0.1 purpose

TRADER_1 is a validation-oriented automated trading infrastructure in which the user operates simply and the system automatically validates, adapts, operates, improves, reduces, and stops.

final user experience is as follows.

```text
user turn on, observe, ggeunda.
system validate and, improve and, order and, reduce, scale up, stop.
```

The purpose of this document is as follows.

```text
Core requirements are not omitted.
The AI compiler must be able to infer the document intent correctly.
execution when all input, status, conflict, failure single decision as resolves.
Even when detailed implementation specifications are missing, safe defaults and blocking rules must allow implementation to continue.
Uncertainty must not be interpreted as live order permission.
```

### 0.2 existing requirements preservation

following scope preservationbecomes.

```text
Upbit KRW spot
Binance spot
Binance USD-M futures
replay
paper
shadow
live
LIVE_READY snapshot basis live transition
small live live burn-in
gradual capital expansion
automatic reduction, degradation, and retirement
strategy candidate generation and automatic validation loop
dashboard UX
security, backup, accounting, tax, regulation, operation monitoring
repeated full audit and validator basis block
```

MVP stage wi scope must not be deleted. MVP final scope stagehwaha operational boundaryda.

### 0.3 meaning of document completion

Document completion does not mean profit guarantee or defect-free guarantee.

document completion following must mean be performed.

```text
Execution paths are closed.
The system does not trade in undefined states.
all conflict single decision as ends.
The same input produces the same result.
Failures and omissions are recorded and blocked.
user turn on, observe, turn off flowman ddarado becomes.
The AI compiler can fill gaps with safe implementation.
```

---

## 1. authority order and interpretation contract

### 1.1 authority order

conflict when following sequence must apply be done.

Higher-level intent, safety, state consistency, exchange reality, and verifiability take priority over detailed document wording.
```

document internal mosun -> current upper contract priority
upper contract conflict -> safety, consistency, and fail closed take priority
external API fact conflict -> official current information priority

judgment if impossible default decision is as follows.

```text

existing position: risk reduction, protection, exit, reconciliationman allowed
order result unclear: same identifier basis reconciliation priority
data unclear: hard truth missing
user screen: one-line reason and block status display
record: audit or evidence as preservation

## 4. top-level immutable principle

### SAFE-01. safety principle

```text
Do not trade when unknown.
Do not trade without hard truth.
If state is unclear, go to safe mode.
If the ledger cannot be recorded, live orders must not be submitted.
If exchange state and internal state disagree, new entry is forbidden.
kill switch failurehageona inactive statusif live blockbecomes.
risk veto strategy, user convenience, profit opportunityboda always must have priority be done.
manual gaeibdo risk veto cannot bypass.
```

### STATE-01. consistency principle

```text
order, fill, balance, position, PnL of execution truth hanayeoya must be performed.
strategy order and does not proposal only must be performed.
order single FinalDecision PASS is required.
FinalDecision none OrderIntent invalid.
same order retry same idempotency key or client_order_idroman must perform be done.
ambiguous transport in outcome new order create and does not reconciliation must have priority be done.
summary.json dashboard serving truthiji ledger truth is not.
reportna dashboard data runtime ledger substitute cannot.
```

### PATH-01. separation principle

```text
Paper and live must be physically separated.
The paper launcher cannot call the live order API.
LIVE launcher paper broker usehal cannot.
shadow for research data cugjeog juceimyeo fill juce is not.
Upbit, Binance spot, and Binance futures data must be separated.
mode, exchange, market_type, session_id none record invalid.
paper, shadow, live raw data directly joindoes not.
comparison if required comparison evidence pack must use be done.
```

### UX-01. user experience principle

```text
user paper launcher, LIVE launcher, dashboardman concern sseunda.
user parameter, hash, evidence file, adapter state directly selects not.
LIVE launcher final valid LIVE_READY snapshot automatic must apply be done.
LIVE execution if impossible one-line reason first boyeojunda.
dashboard first screen core statusman boyeojunda.
detail parameter and raw log jeobhin area at set.
no-entry reason and entry reason always display must-be-possible.
```

## 6. canonical registry and manifest contract

### REG-01. purpose

The canonical registry is the single contract source that prevents documents, schemas, validators, dashboards, and execution code from being interpreted differently.

registry exists sungan following item manual duplicate is defined not.

```text
closed enum
schema id
required schema field
validator id
stage gate id
no-trade reason code
operator action code
readiness vocabulary
live readiness blocker
path slug
risk profile id
strategy lifecycle id
strategy maturity level
```

### REG-02. default registry file

```text
contracts/registry.yaml
contracts/schema/*.schema.json
contracts/generated/TRADER_1.generated.md
contracts/generated/AGENTS.generated.md
```

`contracts/registry.yaml` of minimum structure:

```yaml
registry_schema_id: trader1.registry.v1
project_id: TRADER_1
authority:
  document: TRADER_1.md
  authority_sha256: "__TRADER_1_SHA256_MUST_BE_FILLED_BY_GENERATOR__"
enums: {}
schemas: {}
hard_truth_fields: []
soft_truth_fields: []
no_trade_reasons: {}
operator_actions: {}
readiness_vocabulary: {}
stage_gates: {}
validators: {}
path_slugs: {}
risk_profiles: {}
strategy_levels: {}
live_readiness_blockers: {}
bundle_rules: {}
api_verification: {}
```

### REG-03. generated section rule

Generated section marker:

```text
GENERATED_FROM: contracts/registry.yaml
DO_NOT_EDIT_MANUALLY
```

manual modify if required following sequence must proceed be done.

```text
registry_update
schema_update_if_needed
validator_update_if_needed
regenerate_generated_sections
manifest_hash_update
stage_gate_revalidation
```

### REG-04. registry mismatch handling

```text
registry missing -> PAPER/READ_ONLY scaffold possible, live readiness claim forbidden
registry hash missing -> AUTHORITY_HASH_UNVERIFIED record, live-affecting change block
registry/document mismatch -> CONTRACT_DRIFT, affected path BLOCKED
unknown enum in critical path -> BLOCKED or SAFE_MODE
unknown schema field in live path -> BLOCKED
generated section modified manually -> GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIRTY, release BLOCKED
```

## 8. truth hierarchy and hard truth

### STATE-TRUTH-01. truth hierarchy

Execution truth:

```text
ledger
intent WAL
order events
fill events
exchange reconciliation snapshot
```

Analysis truth:

```text
signal outcome reports
no-trade reviews
score calibration reports
shadow reports
performance summaries
```

Dashboard serving truth:

```text
summary.json
heartbeat.json
startup_probe.json
action_queue.json
operator_status.json
recent_no_trade_context.json
recent_entry_context.json
```

priority:

```text
execution truth > exchange reconciliation snapshot > analysis truth > dashboard serving truth
```

Dashboard trading truth can create none.

### STATE-TRUTH-02. hard truth fields

```text
engine_state
mode
exchange
market_type
session_id
config_hash
registry_hash
schema_id
ledger_write_status
startup_probe_phase
exchange_account_snapshot
balance_snapshot
position_snapshot
open_order_snapshot
pending_intent_state
orderbook_freshness
trade_stream_freshness
confirmed_candle_state
symbol_rules
min_notional_rule
tick_size_rule
step_size_rule
fee_snapshot
slippage_bound
risk_limit_state
kill_switch_state
resource_health_state
private_ws_health_if_live
reconciliation_status
LIVE_READY_snapshot_if_live
strategy_lifecycle_state
final_decision_id
```

hard truth missing or stale, contradictory, unverifiedif new entry is forbidden.

### STATE-TRUTH-03. soft truth fields

```text
optional_market_breadth_metric
optional_taker_buy_ratio
optional_sentiment_metric
optional_dashboard_display_value
optional_review_score
optional_explanatory_text
optional_noncritical_backtest_tag
```

soft truth registered neutral or conservative fallback exists only when daece possible.

Fallback rule:

```text
hard truth missing -> NO_TRADE or SAFE_MODE
soft truth missing with registered fallback -> neutral_or_conservative_value
soft truth missing without registered fallback -> hard missing as promotion
unknown field classification -> hard missing
missing data must never increase risk, size, leverage, confidence, or live readiness
```

---

## 9. decision arbiter and conflict priority

all trading input one of FinalDecision as ggeutnaya must be performed.

FinalDecision none the following is is forbidden.

```text
order generation
order jeonsong
order retry
position expansion
strategy live activation
capital expansion
```

Global conflict priority:

```text
P0 manual emergency stop, kill switch, legal or exchange-enforced block
P1 hard truth availability, schema integrity, ledger durability
P2 exchange constraints, market type constraints, API policy, symbol rules
P3 account reconciliation, balance truth, position truth, open order truth
P4 portfolio risk, strategy risk, exposure, MDD, loss limit
P5 market regime, volatility, liquidity, data quality
P6 strategy lifecycle, strategy score, LIVE_READY scope
P7 execution quality, fee, slippage, market impact, latency
P8 user dashboard display and convenience
```

Required decision path:

```text
hard truth check
resource health check
exchange health check
market data freshness check
exchange and symbol rule check
account reconciliation check
strategy signal normalization
market regime filter
risk veto
portfolio and exposure check
allocator arbitration
execution quality check
final decision
single execution path
ledger and evidence recording
```

Conflict rules:

```text
higher priority beats lower priority
risk veto beats market regime, strategy, allocator, execution preference, UX convenience
exchange and symbol constraints beat market regime and strategy intent
market regime beats strategy signal
portfolio exposure constraints beat individual strategy score
allocator decides equal-ranked capital competition
allocator uncertainty -> NO_TRADE
opposing signals for same symbol or contract -> one final decision only
state inconsistency -> RECONCILE_REQUIRED or SAFE_MODE
stale or partial data -> NO_TRADE or BLOCKED
uncertain live permission -> BLOCKED
```

---

## 10. execution and idempotent order path

### EXEC-01. single writer

order intent, balance reservation, external submit result, fill application, position update single writer or equivalent atomic event reducer through handle as.

Rules:

```text
use one writer or equivalent serialized transaction path
reserve budget before external order submission
no network I/O inside database transactions
commit local reservation before external submit
external submit result uses separate transaction
exchange order exists but local commit failed -> stop or reconcile before new orders
fill events deduplicated
ledger mismatch blocks new orders
```

### EXEC-02. idempotent submit

```text
use client_order_id or intent_id for idempotency
transport timeout -> same identifier status query
exchange unknown -> same identifier reconciliation
local pending confirm -> new order forbidden
ambiguous submit result -> do not send new order with new identifier
PENDING_CONFIRM stuck -> action queue and reconciliation
```

### EXEC-03. order lifecycle forbidden transitions

```text
INTENT_CREATED -> SENT without PRECHECKED
PRECHECKED -> SENT without RESERVED
PENDING_CONFIRM -> SENT with new identifier
RECONCILE_REQUIRED -> SENT with new identifier
FILLED -> OPEN
CANCELED -> FILLED without reconciliation evidence
REJECTED -> FILLED
```

---

## 11. namespace and artifact path

Every runtime artifact must be keyed or physically separated by:

```text
exchange
market_type
mode
session_id
strategy_id if applicable
symbol if applicable
```

Recommended path slugs:

```text
upbit
binance
krw_spot
spot
futures_usdt_m
paper
live
shadow
replay
read_only
safe
```

Recommended path format:

```text
system/data/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/
system/logs/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/
system/runtime/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/
system/reports/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/
system/validation/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/
system/evidence/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/<session_id>/
system/snapshots/<exchange>/<market_type>/LIVE_READY/
system/configs/<exchange>/<market_type>/
```

Forbidden paths:

```text
system/data/live_and_paper_shared
system/data/binance_mixed
system/data/upbit_binance_shared
system/reports/all_modes_raw_join
system/runtime/dashboard_overrides_engine_truth
```

### STATE-STRATEGY-01. Strategy unit

strategy name only as sigseparatees not.

strategy_id

parameter_set

LIVE_READY wi jeonce combinationeman jeogyongbecomes.

### STATE-STRATEGY-02. default strategy family

```text
open_reset_micro
breakout_retest
trend_pullback
range_reversion_vwap
```

strategy DecisionArbiter at proposal only must be performed. Risk veto, hard truth gate, exchange rule, reconciliation, live final guard cannot bypass.

### STATE-STRATEGY-03. Strategy lifecycle transitions

Allowed:

```text
CANDIDATE -> REPLAY_TESTING
REPLAY_TESTING -> REPLAY_VALIDATED
REPLAY_TESTING -> BLOCKED
REPLAY_TESTING -> RETIRED
REPLAY_VALIDATED -> PAPER_VALIDATING
PAPER_VALIDATING -> PAPER_VALIDATED
PAPER_VALIDATING -> BLOCKED
PAPER_VALIDATING -> RETIRED
PAPER_VALIDATED -> SHADOW_VALIDATED
PAPER_VALIDATED -> BLOCKED
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> LIVE_READY
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> BLOCKED
LIVE_READY -> LIVE_ACTIVE
LIVE_READY -> BLOCKED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> DEGRADED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> RETIRED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> BLOCKED
DEGRADED -> PAPER_VALIDATING
DEGRADED -> RETIRED
BLOCKED -> CANDIDATE only after explicit unblock evidence
RETIRED -> CANDIDATE only as new strategy_build_id or new parameter_set
```

Forbidden:

```text
CANDIDATE -> LIVE_READY
REPLAY_TESTING -> LIVE_ACTIVE
PAPER_VALIDATING -> LIVE_ACTIVE
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> LIVE_ACTIVE without LIVE_READY
BLOCKED -> LIVE_ACTIVE
RETIRED -> LIVE_ACTIVE
```

### STATE-STRATEGY-MAP. lifecycle, level, maturity mapping

StrategyLifecycle, System Level, Strategy Level seo as dareun cugida. LIVE_READY judgment se cug of only by the intersection possible.

| allowed action | required lifecycle | entry level | exit level | system level | additional condition |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---|
| signal candidate generation | CANDIDATE | 0 | 0 | 0 | live forbidden |
| paper candidate | CANDIDATE or REPLAY_TESTING | 1 | 1 | 1 | reason code, TTL |
| operational form paper | PAPER_VALIDATING | 2 | 2 | 2 | cost model, regime/liquidity filter |
| LIVE_READY candidate | SHADOW_VALIDATED | 4 | 4 | 3 | replay/paper/shadow evidence |
| live new entry | LIVE_READY | 5 | 5 | 4 | valid snapshot, preflight, approval |
| production autonomous live | LIVE_ACTIVE | 6 | 6 | 6 | long-run evidence, auto degrade |

Rules:

```text
entry level > exit levelif live new entry forbidden
exit level < 5if live new entry forbidden
lifecycle LIVE_READYman as live_order_ready does not become not satisfied
System Level 4 anomalyieodo snapshot scope mismatchmyeon live_order_ready=false
Strategy Level 6 Level 5boda safety rule relaxationdo not satisfied
```

LIVE_READY eligibility formula:

```text
live_ready_eligible =
  lifecycle == SHADOW_VALIDATED or LIVE_READY
  and entry_level >= 5
  and exit_level >= 5
  and edge_model_level >= 4
  and sizing_model_level >= 4
  and replay_evidence_pass
  and paper_evidence_pass
  and shadow_evidence_pass
  and strategy_unit_scope_match
```

`live_ready_eligible=true` snapshot candidate generation condition. live order condition is not.

## 14. risk, sizing, return target

### RISK-01. profit goal restatement

TRADER_1 high jathis hyoyul and long-term yang of expected value research goal as sam can exist.

yeon 100% anomaly of expected return research targetil may exist but acceptance criterion animyeo, live readinessna risk profile upgrade of basis becomes cannot.

operation approval standard following sequence as must judge.

```text
1. account survival possibility
2. MDD and loss limit junsu
3. cost deducted after yang of expected value
4. replay/walk-forward/out-of-sample reproducibility
5. paper/shadow/live burn-in parity
6. capacity and liquidity suitability
7. risk-adjusted return
8. jathis expansion possibility
```

Profit objectives do not weaken fail-closed behavior, risk veto, live readiness, first-order caps, burn-in caps, or kill switches.

### RISK-02. risk profile

```text
CONSERVATIVE
BALANCED
GROWTH
AGGRESSIVE_SANDBOX
```

Profile intent:

```text
CONSERVATIVE -> new strategy, new adapter, new exchange, early paper, early live burn-in
BALANCED -> default operation profile for validated production-like use
GROWTH -> verified strategy units with stable live evidence and healthy risk state
AGGRESSIVE_SANDBOX -> isolated small-capital experiment bucket only
```

Rules:

```text
risk_profile strategy unit of ilbuda.
LIVE_READY same risk_profile at aboutseoman yuhyohada.
risk_profile upgrade related revalidation and evidence is required.
AGGRESSIVE_SANDBOX default operation mode becomes cannot.
AGGRESSIVE_SANDBOX core operation capital and loss limit if shared must not.
all profile hard truth, risk veto, ledger, reconciliation, kill switch, live readiness cannot bypass.
If risk_profile is unclear, select a more conservative profile or NO_TRADE.
```

### RISK-03. default threshold

The top active risk default table is the single standard. Lower tables are explanatory detailed requirements; if a conflict exists, the top active table is followed.

arae value implementation determinism and safety baseline for conservative default. exchange official rule, strategy evidence, account condition, LIVE_READY snapshot more conservative value if required more conservative value must have priority be done.

| item | CONSERVATIVE | BALANCED | GROWTH | AGGRESSIVE_SANDBOX |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| first_order_cap_pct_of_equity | 0.10% | 0.25% | 0.50% | 0.05% |
| live_burn_in_cap_pct_of_equity | 0.25% | 0.50% | 1.00% | 0.10% |
| max_symbol_exposure_pct | 1.00% | 3.00% | 5.00% | 0.50% |
| max_strategy_exposure_pct | 2.00% | 5.00% | 10.00% | 1.00% |
| max_exchange_exposure_pct | 10.00% | 25.00% | 50.00% | 2.00% |
| max_daily_loss_pct | 0.50% | 1.00% | 2.00% | 0.50% |
| max_weekly_loss_pct | 1.50% | 3.00% | 5.00% | 1.00% |
| max_monthly_loss_pct | 3.00% | 6.00% | 10.00% | 2.00% |
| max_mdd_freeze_pct | 5.00% | 10.00% | 15.00% | 3.00% |
| max_open_orders_per_symbol | 1 | 2 | 3 | 1 |
| max_leverage_futures | 1x until verified | 2x | 3x | 1x isolated only |
| min_net_edge_buffer_bps_above_cost | 20 | 15 | 10 | 25 |
| max_expected_slippage_bps | 5 | 10 | 15 | 5 |
| max_expected_impact_bps | 5 | 10 | 15 | 5 |
| orderbook_freshness_ttl_sec | 3 | 3 | 2 | 3 |
| trade_tape_freshness_ttl_sec | 5 | 5 | 3 | 5 |
| private_ws_stale_sec_if_live | 10 | 10 | 5 | 10 |
| reconciliation_max_age_sec_if_live | 30 | 20 | 10 | 30 |

Rules:

```text
missing risk profile -> CONSERVATIVE
profile unclear in live path -> live new entry forbidden
minimum order size > first_order_cap -> automatic cap expansion forbidden, NO_TRADE
slippage unknown -> NO_TRADE
fee unknown -> NO_TRADE
impact unknown on thin market -> NO_TRADE
futures liquidation model incomplete -> live_order_ready=false
AGGRESSIVE_SANDBOX cannot share capital with core profiles
```

### RISK-04. edge calculation

```text
net_edge_bps =
expected_move_bps
- expected_fee_bps
- expected_spread_cost_bps
- expected_slippage_bps
- expected_impact_bps
- expected_latency_cost_bps
- expected_funding_cost_bps when applicable
```

```text
net_edge_bps <= minimum_required_edge_bps -> NO_TRADE
edge component missing -> NO_TRADE
fee unknown -> NO_TRADE
slippage unknown -> NO_TRADE
impact unknown on thin market -> NO_TRADE
futures funding unknown when material -> NO_TRADE
```

### RISK-05. sizing formula

```text
approved_notional =
min(
  strategy_risk_budget_notional,
  profile_max_notional,
  symbol_exposure_cap,
  portfolio_exposure_cap,
  liquidity_depth_cap,
  volatility_adjusted_cap,
  stop_distance_risk_cap,
  first_order_cap when applicable,
  live_burn_in_cap when applicable
)
```

minimum order condition satisfy if not order does not. stop distance missing or if invalid new entry is forbidden.

### READY-04. live final guard

Before submitting any live order, the following items must be checked again.

```text
mode == LIVE
exchange verified
market_type verified
ACTIVE snapshot valid
FinalDecision exists
FinalDecision not stale
risk veto false
hard truth complete
data freshness pass
reconciliation fresh
protection ready
emergency flatten available
watchdog active
idempotency key exists
ledger writer available
```

If any item fails, the order must not be submitted.

### READY-05. local_state_only protection

local_state_only protectioneseo live new entry is allowed not.

allowed:

```text
existing position reduction
existing position exit
open order cancel
reconciliation
safe mode
emergency flatten preparation
```

Forbidden:

```text
new live entry
add position
pyramiding
size expansion
risk profile upgrade
```

## 16. live transition and user approval

user flow:

```text
PAPER execution
-> dashboard check
-> LIVE_READY check
-> PAPER end or preservation
-> same exchange LIVE execution
-> LIVE dashboard check
-> required when end
```

Live launcher must:

```text
load latest valid LIVE_READY snapshot for correct exchange and market_type
run preflight automatically
verify user approval if required by implementation stage
verify API permissions
verify exchange sync
verify symbol rules and fee model
verify risk limits and kill switch
verify ledger and resource health
start with small order sizing if all checks pass
block live new orders with one clear reason if any check fails
```

Bot must not:

```text
user approval none live turn on
user approval none live capital limit expansion
is validated not parameter live at aggressive as application
preflight failure status in live order jeonsong
LIVE_READY none strategy live order candidate as use
```

## 17. exchange adapter contract

strategy exchange API directly calls not.

all adapter following responsibility jegonghageona emulationmust.

```text
MarketDataAdapter
AccountAdapter
OrderAdapter
PositionAdapter
FeeAdapter
SlippageAdapter
SymbolRulesAdapter
RiskAdapter
WebSocketAdapter
RateLimitAdapter
ErrorNormalizer
HealthAdapter
ReconciliationAdapter
```

### API-ADAPTER-01. Upbit KRW spot

```text
KRW spot long-oriented structure
minimum order amount validation
tick size and price normalization
fee calculation
KRW and coin free and locked balance tracking
public and private stream separation
rate limit throttling
order error normalization
candle no-trade versus missing-candle distinction
paper/live fill model parity
live blocked unless official current rules are verified
```

### API-ADAPTER-02. Binance spot

```text
base and quote free and locked balances
min notional, tick size, step size, min quantity
maker and taker fees, VIP tier, BNB discount when applicable
timestamp, recvWindow, signature, server time drift handling
user stream reconnect and gap recovery
partial and multiple fill ledger accuracy
no futures margin, liquidation, or reduce-only logic in spot adapter
```

### API-ADAPTER-03. Binance futures

```text
long and short position modeling
hedge mode and one-way mode distinction
isolated and cross margin distinction
leverage, margin ratio, liquidation price, mark price, and funding fee
reduce-only, stop market, take profit, and trailing stop support where used
listenKey or user data stream renewal and recovery
realized and unrealized PnL separation
ADL risk
liquidation risk reduction before expansion
no spot balance model misuse
```

Immediate invalidation:

```text
exchange official source hash changed
API key rotated
permission changed
withdraw permission detected
symbol rule mismatch detected
order reject reason caused by rule mismatch
rate limit behavior changed
websocket schema mismatch
adapter response schema mismatch

reconciliation validator -> live mode max age apply
live final guard validator -> per order cycle
bundle hygiene validator -> bundle buildmada
stage gate validator -> evidence packmada
```

Expired result STALEimyeo live readiness at usehal cannot.

### EVID-01. evidence pack rule

Stage completion, LIVE_READY, live handoff, release readiness evidence pack none injeongmust not become.

### EVID-02. evidence manifest schema

```json
{
  "schema_id": "trader1.evidence_manifest.v1",
  "evidence_pack_id": "string",
  "created_at_utc": "string",
  "stage_id": "string",
  "exchange": "Exchange|null",
  "market_type": "MarketType|null",
  "mode": "Mode|null",
  "session_id": "string|null",
  "strategy_id": "string|null",
  "strategy_build_id": "string|null",
  "parameter_hash": "string|null",
  "authority_document": "TRADER_1.md",
  "authority_sha256": "string|null",
  "registry_hash": "string|null",
  "source_tree_hash": "string|null",
  "validator_run_id": "string|null",
  "items": [
    {
      "path": "string",
      "role": "VALIDATOR_LOG|SUMMARY|LEDGER_EXTRACT|REPLAY_RESULT|PAPER_RESULT|SHADOW_RESULT|LIVE_RESULT|API_VERIFICATION|OPERATOR_APPROVAL|MANIFEST",
      "sha256": "string",
      "size_bytes": "integer",
      "redaction_status": "NOT_NEEDED|REDACTED|REDACTION_REQUIRED|FAILED",
      "contains_secret": "boolean",
      "contains_account_identifier": "boolean"
    }
  ],
  "blocking_defect_count": "integer",
  "unresolved_minor_defects": "integer",
  "known_blockers": ["string"],
  "next_allowed_stage": "string|null",
  "pack_hash": "string"
}
```

Validation rules:

```text
missing evidence manifest -> stage UNTESTED
manifest hash mismatch -> stage BLOCKED
redaction_status=FAILED in share bundle -> external share BLOCKED
contains_secret=true -> release BLOCKED and security incident
blocking_defect_count > 0 -> affected path BLOCKED
validator not run -> status UNTESTED, not READY
```

manual metadata generation is forbidden be done.

## 21. dashboard and user interface

Dashboard is an operating interface, not a research notebook and not a truth engine.

first screen following jilmun at must answer.

```text
current normalinga
paperin liveinga
which exchange and market_typeinga
live order possibility issneunga, animyeon blockinga
don beolgo issneunga
why an deuleoeacho issneunga
why holding position at deuleogassneunga
user to wait for haneunga, must stop haneunga, should act haneunga
```

Required first-view fields:

```text
mode
exchange
market_type
operator badge
engine state
live readiness surface
current action
one-line blocking reason
portfolio equity
cash or available balance
locked balance
today PnL
realized PnL
unrealized PnL
MDD
positions
open orders
pending confirms
watch universe
entry candidates
last no-trade reason
recent errors
resource health
exchange health
data freshness
applied snapshot id for live
```

Rules:

```text
basic screen simple
details collapsible
no-trade reason visible
entry reason for held positions visible
dashboard must not reinterpret ledger or report truth into trading truth
dashboard failure must not stop engine unless resource or state safety is affected
if dashboard and engine disagree, engine truth wins and dashboard shows mismatch warning
```

## 22. operator control

Allowed operator controls:

```text
manual_stop
manual_resume_read_only
manual_ack_trade_disabled
manual_unlock_held_market_event
manual_retry_reconcile
manual_safe_mode
manual_disable_strategy
manual_reduce_position
manual_exit_all_positions
```

manual control cannot bypass:

```text
risk veto
kill switch
ledger durability
reconciliation required
hard truth missing
symbol rule
legal or exchange policy block
live readiness
```

### OPS-OPERATOR-02. audit schema

```json
{
  "schema_id": "trader1.operator_action_audit.v1",
  "action_id": "string",
  "created_at_utc": "string",
  "operator_id_hash": "string",
  "action_code": "OperatorAction",
  "exchange": "Exchange|null",
  "market_type": "MarketType|null",
  "mode": "Mode|null",
  "session_id": "string|null",
  "target_symbol": "string|null",
  "previous_state": "object",
  "requested_state": "object",
  "risk_veto_result": "PASS|FAIL|NOT_APPLICABLE",
  "reconciliation_status": "PASS|FAIL|STALE|NOT_APPLICABLE",
  "final_decision_id": "string|null",
  "confirmation_required": "boolean",
  "confirmation_method": "NONE|LOCAL_UI|CLI_CONFIRM_PHRASE|TWO_STEP",
  "result": "ACCEPTED|REJECTED|EXECUTED|FAILED|BLOCKED",
  "result_reason": "string|null",
  "event_hash": "string"
}
```

High-risk actions:

```text
manual_exit_all_positions
manual_reduce_position
manual_disable_strategy
manual_safe_mode
manual_ack_trade_disabled
```

High-risk action requirements:

```text
operator_id_hash
explicit target scope
confirmation phrase
audit record before and after action
dashboard display
no live expansion
FinalDecision when order-affecting
ledger record when order-affecting
```

Forbidden operator behavior:

```text
manual action cannot create live_order_ready=true
manual action cannot bypass preflight
manual action cannot override risk veto for new risk
manual action cannot change candidate snapshot into ACTIVE snapshot
manual action cannot raise risk profile without evidence
manual_exit_all_positions cannot submit entry or add-position order
```

---

## 23. operations, security, backup, accounting, regulation

### OPS-SEC-01. security

```text
API keys must not be committed
API keys must not appear in logs
signatures, account IDs, private payloads, secrets must be masked
withdraw permission must not be accepted as normal
live API key permission must be validated before live start
IP restriction and key rotation should be documented
if secret handling is unclear, block live and use paper or read-only
```

### OPS-RES-01. resource management

```text
all in-memory buffers must have maxlen or TTL
memory danger -> block new orders
disk full or ledger write failure -> block live orders
queue pressure -> slow dashboard, stop report jobs, limit signals, stop new order requests, safe mode
trading critical event must not be delayed by dashboard or analysis work
```

Required stress tests:

```text
24h
7d
30d
```

### OPS-ACC-01. accounting

Separate records:

```text
realized PnL
unrealized PnL
fee
funding fee
slippage cost
deposit
withdrawal
transfer
foreign exchange effect
```

Deposits and withdrawals must not be counted as trading PnL.

Tax rules depend on jurisdiction and time. Final filing requires professional review.

### OPS-POLICY-01. policy and market events

Breaking changes block affected live path:

```text
API schema
rate limit
order policy
symbol rule
minimum order condition
leverage limit
delisting
trading halt
exchange maintenance
deposit/withdrawal halt
tax or reporting duty change
stablecoin depeg
funding spike
```

---

### MVP-02. table

| MVP | name | allowed scope | forbidden scope | completion judgment |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| MVP-0 | Contract baseline | document, registry, schema coan, launcher contract | paper/live trade | registry lint PASS |
| MVP-1 | Safe boot skeleton | root launcher 4gae, config validation, read-only dashboard, heartbeat | live key load, live order API | live_order_allowed=false fix |
| MVP-2 | Upbit paper dry-run | Upbit public data, paper broker, no-trade reason, summary | live order, Binance live, strategy promotion | paper dry-run validator PASS |
| MVP-3 | Operational Upbit paper | ledger/WAL, restart recovery, paper/shadow separation, cost model | LIVE_READY automatic granting | paper operation gate PASS |
| MVP-4 | Upbit live review | live preflight read-only, account/open-order snapshot, manual approval surface | live new order | can_live_review=true, live_order_ready=false |
| MVP-5 | Upbit limited live | valid LIVE_READY, approval, preflight, first-order cap, manual order-test evidence | capital automatic expansion, Binance futures live | live_order_ready=true for exact scope |
| MVP-6 | Multi-exchange paper | Binance spot/futures paper scaffold, exchange namespace separation | Binance live | Binance live_order_ready=false |
| MVP-7 | Binance limited live | Binance spot or per-futures-scope separate LIVE_READY, official API verification, futures risk model | dareun market_type as readiness before | market_type scoped live only |

following function MVP-0from MVP-3ggaji completion before implementationhaedo live readiness at giyeodoes not.

automatic strategy generation
automatic scale up
Binance futures live

### MVP-04. completion language

Allowed:

```text
MVP-1 complete: safe boot and live blocked scaffold
MVP-2 complete: Upbit paper dry-run path ready
MVP-3 complete: operational Upbit paper candidate
MVP-4 complete: Upbit live review only, no live orders
MVP-5 complete: limited live allowed for exact snapshot scope
```

Forbidden:

```text
production ready
fully safe
profitable
all exchange ready
live ready without scope
```

## 25. implementation order

P0. Safety and state foundation:

```text
mode and namespace separation
root launcher separation
config validation
ledger or equivalent execution truth
intent WAL or equivalent journal
single writer order state path
startup probe
safe mode
kill switch
basic resource guard
```

P1. Paper and dashboard foundation:

```text
paper execution model
shadow separation
runtime summary
heartbeat
dashboard first view
no-trade reason enum
entry reason logging
basic strategy fixtures
basic risk and sizing
```

P2. Validation foundation:

```text
schema validators
strategy decision validator
risk sizing validator
adapter contract validator
numeric determinism validator
replay consistency test
paper and shadow separation test
ledger reconciliation test
```

P3. Upbit readiness:

```text
upbit adapter official rule verification
upbit paper realism
upbit private stream or reconciliation path
upbit live preflight
upbit live blocked until evidence
```

P4. Binance readiness:

```text
binance spot adapter
binance futures adapter
futures risk model
funding, liquidation, margin, reduce-only handling
binance live blocked until evidence
```

P5. Automatic improvement:

```text
strategy scoring
candidate pool
promotion and degradation
parameter candidate generation
walk-forward and out-of-sample checks
LIVE_READY snapshot creation
```

Do not implement advanced profitability optimization before P0 through P2 safety and validation paths are stable.

---

## 26. testing lanes and live blocked tests

Required test lanes:

```text
compileall
unit
contract
config schema
integration
paper dry-run
replay
readiness
live blocked
emergency flatten dry-run
reconciliation
artifact hygiene
```

Live blocked test must verify no live order adapter call when:

```text
live_entry_enabled false
LIVE_READY missing/invalid
operator policy fail
local_state_only protection
stale data
risk blocked
reconciliation stale
artifact hygiene fail
shadow/replay incomplete
config invalid
emergency flatten unavailable
symbol rule unknown
final guard disabled
entry maturity below Level 5
exit maturity below Level 5
edge model incomplete
sizing trace missing
regime confidence too low
strategy unit scope mismatch
ACTIVE snapshot invalid
strategy threshold not validated
```

---

## 27. scenario rulebook

```text
hard truth missing -> NO_TRADE or SAFE_MODE
strategy conflict -> central arbiter creates one FinalDecision
risk conflict -> risk veto wins
market regime mismatch -> no aggressive entry, show REGIME_MISMATCH
exchange state mismatch -> stop new orders and reconcile
ambiguous order result -> same identifier reconciliation only
dashboard and ledger conflict -> ledger wins, dashboard shows mismatch
disk full or ledger write failure -> block live new orders
private websocket unhealthy -> block live if required, otherwise defined reconciliation fallback
futures liquidation risk high -> reduce, close, or block expansion
unknown API rule -> paper/read-only only, live blocked
unknown strategy profitability -> candidate/paper/shadow only
unknown risk profile -> CONSERVATIVE or NO_TRADE
unknown readiness scope -> live_order_ready=false
```

---

## 28. completion and claim language

Do not claim without evidence:

```text
profitable
live ready
fully safe
production ready
API verified
READY without scope
validated without scope
complete without scope
```

Allowed scoped forms:

```text
source bundle hygiene PASS
Upbit paper dry-run READY
live review READY, live orders BLOCKED
release package BUNDLE_READY, live_order_ready=false
LIVE_READY snapshot candidate generated, not approved
limited live order ready for exact snapshot scope
```

Every readiness claim must include:

```text
exchange
market_type
mode
scope
blocking status
live_order_allowed
evidence id if applicable
```

---

## 29. patch acceptance checks

The document set is acceptable for AI compiler use when the following checks pass.

```text
DOC-001 heading numbering does not determine authority
DOC-002 detail requirements requirements are mapped to lower-authority detailed requirements body
REG-001 canonical registry requirement exists
REG-002 generated section policy exists
MVP-001 MVP table exists and defines allowed/forbidden scope
READY-001 READY standalone is forbidden on operator-facing surface
READY-002 release_ready does not imply live_order_ready
API-001 official API verification report schema exists
RISK-001 risk profile default thresholds exist
STRAT-001 lifecycle/level/maturity mapping exists
EVID-001 evidence manifest schema exists
BUNDLE-001 source allowlist and forbidden list exist
AGENT-001 AGENTS requires registry-first edits
AGENT-002 AGENTS requires target_mvp_level on patches
```

---

## 30. final operating rule

```text
The AI compiler fills document gaps with safe implementation and must not interpret uncertainty as a profit opportunity. It must resolve uncertainty through validation, blocking, deferral, or safe mode.
```

## 4. canonical registry and generated contract

The canonical registry is the single contract source that prevents documents, schemas, validators, dashboards, and execution code from being interpreted differently.

default wici is as follows.

```text
contracts/registry.yaml
contracts/schema/*.schema.json
contracts/generated/TRADER_1.generated.md
contracts/generated/AGENTS.generated.md
```

registry scope is as follows.

```text
closed enums
schema identifiers
required schema fields
hard truth fields
soft truth fields
no-trade reason codes
operator action codes
readiness vocabulary
stage gate ids
validator ids
path slugs
risk profiles
strategy lifecycle states
strategy levels
live readiness blockers
bundle rules
official API verification rules
```

Generated section registry in generationhamyeo human must not be edited directly. contract value changes use this sequence.

```text
registry_update
schema_update_if_needed
validator_update_if_needed
dashboard_wording_update_if_needed
regenerate_generated_sections
manifest_hash_update
stage_gate_revalidation
```

registry mismatch handling is as follows.

```text
registry missing -> PAPER/READ_ONLY scaffold possible, live readiness claim forbidden
registry hash missing -> AUTHORITY_HASH_UNVERIFIED record, live-affecting change block
registry/document mismatch -> CONTRACT_DRIFT, affected path BLOCKED
unknown enum in critical path -> BLOCKED or SAFE_MODE
unknown schema field in live path -> BLOCKED
generated section modified manually -> GENERATED_ARTIFACT_DIRTY, release BLOCKED
```

## 5. MVP and stage boundary

MVP function delete not implementation boundary.

```text
MVP-0 Contract baseline
MVP-1 Safe boot skeleton
MVP-2 Upbit paper dry-run
MVP-3 Operational Upbit paper
MVP-4 Upbit live review
MVP-5 Upbit limited live
MVP-6 Multi-exchange paper
MVP-7 Binance limited live
```

MVP-0 stable contract id, canonical registry seed, closed enum seed, schema id seed, path namespace rule, root launcher rule, readiness vocabulary, bundle hygiene rule must include be done.

MVP-1 root launcher 4gae, config schema, registry loader, manifest verifier, path namespace manager, engine state enum, startup probe, summary.json emitter, heartbeat emitter, read-only dashboard shell, live path hard-block must include be done.

MVP-2 Upbit paper adapter, fee and slippage model baseline, symbol rule validator, no-trade reason logging, entry reason logging, paper ledger, restart recovery skeleton must include be done.

MVP-3 Upbit operational paper, basic strategy fixtures, decision arbiter, risk veto, sizing min-of-caps, paper dashboard, replay consistency baseline, stage evidence pack must include be done.

MVP-4 Upbit live review, official API verification report, read-only account snapshot, private stream or reconciliation path, LIVE_READY snapshot validation, manual order-test evidence schema, live preflight, live review dashboard must include be done.

MVP-5 Upbit limited live, operator approval, manual order test PASS, small live burn-in, first_order_cap, emergency flatten dry-run, same identifier reconciliation, live final guard must include be done.

MVP-6 Binance spot paper, Binance futures paper, futures margin and liquidation simulator, exchange and market_type namespace split, cross-exchange dashboard summary must include be done.

MVP-7 Binance spot and futures limited live readiness must include be done. Spot and futures separate live readiness requiredhamyeo, futures leverage expansion futures burn-in evidence until is forbidden.

## 7. truth hierarchy

Execution truth:

```text
ledger
intent WAL
order events
fill events
balance snapshots
position snapshots
exchange reconciliation snapshot
risk decisions
final decisions
```

Analysis truth:

```text
signal outcome reports
no-trade reviews
score calibration reports
shadow reports
walk-forward reports
replay reports
performance summaries
```

Dashboard serving truth:

```text
summary.json
heartbeat.json
startup_probe.json
action_queue.json
operator_status.json
recent_no_trade_context.json
recent_entry_context.json
readiness_surface.json
```

Conflict rule:

```text
execution truth > exchange reconciliation snapshot > analysis truth > dashboard serving truth
```

Dashboard ledger directly reinterprets not. Dashboard normalieodo ledger or reconciliation binormalif trade blockbecomes.

## 8. namespace and artifact path

All runtime artifacts must be separated along the following dimensions.

```text
exchange
market_type
mode
session_id

symbol if applicable

Path slug mapper baseline:

```text
UPBIT -> upbit
BINANCE -> binance
KRW_SPOT -> krw_spot
SPOT -> spot
FUTURES_USDT_M -> futures_usdt_m
PAPER -> paper
LIVE -> live
SHADOW -> shadow
REPLAY -> replay
READ_ONLY -> read_only
SAFE -> safe
```

default path is as follows.

```text
system/data/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/
system/logs/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/
system/runtime/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/
system/reports/<exchange>/<market_type>/<mode>/

forbidden path:

system/data/live_and_paper_shared
system/data/binance_mixed
system/data/upbit_binance_shared
system/reports/all_modes_raw_join
system/runtime/dashboard_overrides_engine_truth

```text

soft truth missing with registered fallback -> neutral_or_conservative_value
soft truth missing without registered fallback -> hard truth missing
unknown field classification -> hard truth missing
missing data must never increase risk, size, leverage, confidence, or live readiness
```

## 11. state machine baseline

Strategy lifecycle allowed jeoni:

```text
CANDIDATE -> REPLAY_TESTING
REPLAY_TESTING -> REPLAY_VALIDATED
REPLAY_TESTING -> BLOCKED
REPLAY_TESTING -> RETIRED
REPLAY_VALIDATED -> PAPER_VALIDATING
PAPER_VALIDATING -> PAPER_VALIDATED
PAPER_VALIDATING -> BLOCKED
PAPER_VALIDATING -> RETIRED
PAPER_VALIDATED -> SHADOW_VALIDATED
PAPER_VALIDATED -> BLOCKED
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> LIVE_READY
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> BLOCKED
LIVE_READY -> LIVE_ACTIVE
LIVE_READY -> BLOCKED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> DEGRADED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> RETIRED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> BLOCKED
DEGRADED -> PAPER_VALIDATING
DEGRADED -> RETIRED
BLOCKED -> CANDIDATE only after explicit unblock evidence
RETIRED -> CANDIDATE only as new strategy_build_id or new parameter_set
```

forbidden jeoni:

```text
CANDIDATE -> LIVE_READY
REPLAY_TESTING -> LIVE_ACTIVE
PAPER_VALIDATING -> LIVE_ACTIVE
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> LIVE_ACTIVE without LIVE_READY
BLOCKED -> LIVE_ACTIVE
RETIRED -> LIVE_ACTIVE
```

Order lifecycle normal path:

```text
INTENT_CREATED -> PRECHECKED -> RESERVED -> SENT -> PENDING_CONFIRM -> OPEN
OPEN -> PARTIAL_FILLED
PARTIAL_FILLED -> FILLED
PARTIAL_FILLED -> CANCELED
OPEN -> CANCELED
OPEN -> EXPIRED
SENT -> REJECTED
PENDING_CONFIRM -> REST_RECONCILED
PENDING_CONFIRM -> RECONCILE_REQUIRED
REST_RECONCILED -> OPEN
REST_RECONCILED -> FILLED
REST_RECONCILED -> CANCELED
REST_RECONCILED -> REJECTED
REST_RECONCILED -> EXPIRED
```

Order lifecycle forbidden path:

```text
INTENT_CREATED -> SENT without PRECHECKED
PRECHECKED -> SENT without RESERVED
PENDING_CONFIRM -> SENT with new identifier
RECONCILE_REQUIRED -> SENT with new identifier
FILLED -> OPEN
CANCELED -> FILLED without reconciliation evidence
REJECTED -> FILLED
```

Engine state principle:

```text
BOOTSTRAP_READ_ONLY in start
startup_probe PASS before RUNNING forbidden
live reconciliation PASS before RUNNING forbidden
hard truth missingif TRADE_DISABLED or SAFE_MODE
resource criticalif RESOURCE_LIMITED or SAFE_MODE
When the kill switch triggers, use KILL_SWITCH_TRIGGERED.
KILL_SWITCH_TRIGGERED in RUNNING directly boggwi forbidden
RUNNING boggwi at cause resolution, reconciliation, health check, evidence required
```

## 12. decision arbiter and conflict priority

all trade related input one of FinalDecision as resolves.

Global priority:

```text
P0 manual emergency stop, kill switch, legal or exchange-enforced block
P1 hard truth availability, schema integrity, ledger durability
P2 exchange constraints, market type constraints, API policy, symbol rules
P3 account reconciliation, balance truth, position truth, open order truth
P4 portfolio risk, strategy risk, exposure, MDD, loss limit
P5 market regime, volatility, liquidity, data quality
P6 strategy lifecycle, strategy score, LIVE_READY scope
P7 execution quality, fee, slippage, market impact, latency
P8 user dashboard display and convenience
```

Decision path:

```text
hard truth check
resource health check
exchange health check
market data freshness check
exchange and symbol rule check
account reconciliation check
strategy signal normalization
market regime filter
risk veto
portfolio and exposure check
allocator arbitration
execution quality check
final decision
single execution path
ledger and evidence recording
```

upper priority lower priority iginda. same-rank judgment not allowedif NO_TRADEda.

## 13. execution and order idempotency

```text
one writer or equivalent serialized transaction path
reserve budget before external order submission
no network I/O inside database transaction
commit local reservation before external submit
use client_order_id or intent_id for idempotency
ambiguous submit result -> do not send new order with new identifier
ambiguous submit result -> reconcile using same identifier first
exchange order exists but local commit failed -> stop or reconcile before new orders
fill events deduplicated
ledger mismatch blocks new orders
```

Order submit must pass through FinalDecision, risk veto false, hard truth complete, exchange rule check, account reconciliation fresh, sizing approved, idempotency key exists, ledger writer available, and live final guard if mode LIVE.

## 14. adapter contract

Strategies must not call exchange APIs directly.

Every exchange adapter must provide or emulate:

```text
MarketDataAdapter
AccountAdapter
OrderAdapter
PositionAdapter
FeeAdapter
SlippageAdapter
SymbolRulesAdapter
RiskAdapter
WebSocketAdapter
RateLimitAdapter
ErrorNormalizer
HealthAdapter
ReconciliationAdapter
```

Upbit KRW spot requirements:

```text
KRW spot long-oriented structure
minimum order amount validation
tick size and price normalization
fee calculation
KRW and coin free and locked balance tracking
public and private stream separation
rate limit throttling
order error normalization
candle no-trade versus missing-candle distinction
live blocked unless official current rules are verified
```

Binance spot requirements:

```text
base and quote free and locked balances
min notional, tick size, step size, min quantity
maker and taker fees, VIP tier, BNB discount when applicable
timestamp, recvWindow, signature, server time drift handling
user stream reconnect and gap recovery
partial and multiple fill ledger accuracy
no futures margin, liquidation, or reduce-only logic in spot adapter
```

Binance futures requirements:

```text
long and short position modeling
hedge mode and one-way mode distinction
isolated and cross margin distinction
leverage, margin ratio, liquidation price, mark price, funding fee
reduce-only, stop market, take profit, trailing stop support where used
listenKey or user data stream renewal and recovery
realized and unrealized PnL separation
ADL risk when applicable
liquidation risk reduction before expansion
no spot balance model misuse
```

If official API information is not verified, adapter state is not live-ready.

## 15. strategy unit, lifecycle, level mapping

LIVE_READY applies to the full unit.

```text
strategy_id
strategy_build_id
parameter_set
parameter_hash
exchange
market_type
regime_scope
risk_profile
```

Strategy level:

```text
Strategy Level 0: signal candidate only
Strategy Level 1: input data, TTL, reason code exist
Strategy Level 2: regime, liquidity, spread, depth filter exist
Strategy Level 3: cost-adjusted edge, risk veto, sizing trace exist
Strategy Level 4: replay, paper, shadow evidence exist
Strategy Level 5: LIVE_READY snapshot scope matches
Strategy Level 6: live performance-based scale-down, degradation, retirement, candidate reevaluation possible
```

Entry and exit separate maturity has.

```text
paper candidate -> entry Level 1 anomaly
operational paper -> entry Level 2 anomaly, exit Level 2 anomaly
LIVE_READY candidate -> entry Level 4 anomaly, exit Level 4 anomaly
live new entry -> entry Level 5 anomaly, exit Level 4 anomaly, live final guard pass
production autonomous live -> Level 6 goal
```

Entry level highado exit level if low live new entry is allowed not.

## 16. market regime, edge, sizing

Market regime:

```text
DOWNTREND
RANGE
UPTREND
BREAKDOWN
HIGH_VOLATILITY
LOW_LIQUIDITY
UNCERTAIN
```

Regime judgment single metric one as createmyeon must not. minimum input trend, volatility, liquidity, spread, volume, drawdown, market breadth when available, higher timeframe context, data qualityda.

Net edge:

```text
net_edge_bps =
expected_move_bps
- expected_fee_bps
- expected_spread_cost_bps
- expected_slippage_bps
- expected_impact_bps
- expected_latency_cost_bps
- expected_funding_cost_bps when applicable
```

Edge component missingif NO_TRADEda.

Sizing:

```text
approved_notional = min(
  strategy_risk_budget_notional,
  profile_max_notional,
  symbol_exposure_cap,
  portfolio_exposure_cap,
  liquidity_depth_cap,
  volatility_adjusted_cap,
  stop_distance_risk_cap,
  first_order_cap when applicable,
  live_burn_in_cap when applicable
)
```

Minimum order condition satisfy if not order does not. Stop distance missing or if invalid new entry is forbidden.

Risk profiles:

```text
CONSERVATIVE
BALANCED
GROWTH
AGGRESSIVE_SANDBOX
```

Risk profile strategy unit of ilbuda. LIVE_READY same risk profile at aboutseoman yuhyohada.

Default threshold profitability guarantee is not. implementation bieo exists when deterministic baseline jegongha bosu standard. more conservative exchange rule, LIVE_READY snapshot, operator policy, risk evidence if present, it wins.

| field | CONSERVATIVE | BALANCED | GROWTH | AGGRESSIVE_SANDBOX |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| first_order_cap_pct_of_equity | 0.10 | 0.25 | 0.50 | 0.05 |
| live_burn_in_cap_pct_of_equity | 0.25 | 0.50 | 1.00 | 0.10 |
| max_symbol_exposure_pct | 1.00 | 2.50 | 5.00 | 0.50 |
| max_strategy_exposure_pct | 2.00 | 5.00 | 10.00 | 1.00 |
| max_exchange_exposure_pct | 5.00 | 15.00 | 30.00 | 2.00 |
| max_daily_loss_pct | 0.50 | 1.00 | 2.00 | 0.25 |
| max_weekly_loss_pct | 1.50 | 3.00 | 5.00 | 0.75 |
| max_monthly_loss_pct | 3.00 | 6.00 | 10.00 | 1.50 |
| max_mdd_freeze_pct | 5.00 | 10.00 | 15.00 | 3.00 |
| minimum_required_edge_bps | 20 | 15 | 12 | 25 |
| max_expected_slippage_bps | 10 | 15 | 20 | 8 |
| max_latency_sec_for_signal | 5 | 8 | 10 | 3 |
| reconciliation_max_age_sec_if_live | 30 | 45 | 60 | 15 |

AGGRESSIVE_SANDBOX must not become the default profile and must not share capital limits with core operating capital.

## 20. live final guard

Before submitting any live order, the following items must be checked again.

```text
mode == LIVE
exchange verified
market_type verified
ACTIVE snapshot valid
FinalDecision exists
FinalDecision not stale
risk veto false
hard truth complete
data freshness pass
reconciliation fresh
protection ready
emergency flatten available or safe alternative documented
watchdog active
idempotency key exists
ledger writer available
live_order_ready true
```

If any item fails, the order must not be submitted.

local_state_only protection in the status live new entry is allowed not.

allowed:

```text
existing position reduction
existing position exit
open order cancel
reconciliation
safe mode
emergency flatten preparation
```

Forbidden:

```text
new live entry
add position
pyramiding
size expansion
risk profile upgrade
```

## 23. validator and TTL

Minimum validators:

```text
schema_validator
state_transition_validator
strategy_decision_validator
risk_sizing_validator
exchange_adapter_validator
numeric_determinism_validator
path_namespace_validator
dashboard_source_validator
ledger_reconciliation_validator
live_ready_snapshot_validator
security_validator
resource_limit_validator
stage_gate_validator
artifact_hygiene_validator
bundle_identity_validator
official_api_verification_validator
operator_control_validator
```

Result states:

```text
PASS
FAIL
BLOCKED
UNTESTED
STALE
SKIPPED_NOT_APPLICABLE
TIMEOUT
```

TTL baseline:

```text
schema, registry, source identity -> until changed
official API verification -> max 30 days or invalidation trigger
reconciliation if live -> max 30 to 60 seconds by risk profile
private stream health -> max 30 seconds if required
symbol rules -> max 24 hours or exchange change trigger
fee snapshot -> max 24 hours or account tier change trigger
resource health -> max 60 seconds
LIVE_READY snapshot -> explicit expires_at_utc required
operator approval -> explicit expires_at_utc or one session
manual order test -> exchange and market_type scoped, expires on adapter/API change
```

Validator not run means UNTESTED, not READY.

Bundles must be separated.

source bundle
release bundle
evidence bundle
diagnostic bundle

src/
tests/
docs/
contracts/
config examples
pyproject.toml
requirements files
README
TRADER_1.md
AGENTS.md
root launchers

```text
system/
export/
release/
logs/
__pycache__/
.pytest_cache/
*.pyc
*.pyo
*.sqlite
*.db
*.jsonl
*.log
*.tmp
*.bak
runtime journal
large raw data
local private path artifact
credential-bearing file
```

Release bundle must include release_manifest.json, source_tree_hash, root_source_tree_hash, release_source_tree_hash, scoped_exclusions_with_reason, authority_sha256, registry_hash, schema_bundle_hash, validator_bundle_hash, readiness_surface.json.

Unexplained root/release source drift blocks release readiness and live readiness.

Dashboard is an operating interface, not a truth engine.

current normalinga
paperin liveinga
which exchange and market type which type
live_order_readyin aninga
don beolgo issneunga
why an deuleoeacho issneunga
why holding position at deuleogassneunga
user gidarilji, meomculji, jocbelowlji

exchange

unrealized PnL

Dashboard failure does not become trading truth. Engine/dashboard mismatch means engine truth wins and dashboard shows mismatch warning.

## 26. operator control hardening

Allowed controls:

```text
manual_stop
manual_resume_read_only
manual_ack_trade_disabled
manual_unlock_held_market_event
manual_retry_reconcile
manual_safe_mode
manual_disable_strategy
manual_reduce_position
manual_exit_all_positions
```

manual control cannot bypass risk veto, kill switch, ledger durability, reconciliation required, hard truth missing, symbol rule, legal or exchange policy block.

Stlong actions such as manual_exit_all_positions require operator identity, action id, reason, scope, preview if possible, confirmation, FinalDecision, adapter path, ledger record, reconciliation after action, audit record.

## 27. security, operations, backup, accounting, regulation

Security:

```text
API keys not committed
API keys not logged
withdrawal permission rejected
minimal permission
IP restriction where available
secret masking
key rotation support
compromise revocation procedure
private payload masking
```

Operations monitor CPU, memory, disk, inode, network, DB state, event latency, queue backlog, REST health, WebSocket health, private stream health, rate limit pressure, watchdog heartbeat.

Backup ledger, config, evidence, strategy state, parameter snapshot, performance records, LIVE_READY snapshot, registry, manifest.

Separate realized PnL, unrealized PnL, fee, funding fee, slippage cost, deposit, withdrawal, transfer, FX effect. Deposit and withdrawal must not be treated as trading PnL. Tax reporting depends on jurisdiction and date; final filing requires professional review.

Breaking changes in API schema, rate limit, order policy, symbol rule, min order, leverage limit, delisting, halt, maintenance, deposit/withdrawal status, tax/reporting duty can block affected live paths.

## 28. completion language

Do not claim these unless evidence exists.

```text
profitable
live ready
fully safe
production ready
API verified
```

Allowed claims when true:

```text
implemented scaffold
paper path ready for local test
validator added
live path blocked by design
adapter mock added
preflight blocks unverified live
```

Precise statuses:

```text
READY
BLOCKED
PARTIAL
UNTESTED
NO_TRADE
SAFE_MODE
READ_ONLY
RECONCILE_REQUIRED
REQUIRES_OFFICIAL_API_VERIFICATION
PAPER_ONLY
SHADOW_ONLY
PASS_WITH_LIMITATION
```

PASS_WITH_LIMITATION is not live readiness.

## 29. implementation completion criteria

TRADER_1 is implementation-complete only when all are true.

```text
root launchers are exactly four
paper and live are physically separated
live cannot order without valid LIVE_READY and preflight
all orders pass FinalDecision
all orders have idempotency key
ledger write failure blocks live
hard truth missing blocks new entry
all no-trade records have closed reason code
all entries have structured entry evidence
summary.json is dashboard source only
exchange, market_type, mode data are separated
adapter interfaces and exchange-specific constraints are implemented
Binance futures liquidation risk is modeled
risk veto cannot be bypassed
kill switch works
private stream failure has conservative policy
ambiguous order outcome uses same identifier reconciliation
stage gates and validators are connected to execution blocking
dashboard shows status, PnL, MDD, no-trade reason, entry reason, live readiness
user does not choose parameters or evidence files manually
full audit has zero blocking defects
source/release/evidence/diagnostic bundles are separated and hygienic
```

## 30. one-line operating rule

```text
When uncertain, do not open new live risk. Preserve or reduce risk, reconcile state, use paper, shadow, read-only, safe mode, or blocked status, show one clear reason, record the decision, and add a validator if recurrence is possible.
```

## 5. MVP and Level boundary

### 5.1 MVP principle

MVP final scope reductiondoes not. MVP implementation sequence jelimited to safety property and validation possibility first hwagboha stage boundaryda.

### 5.2 MVP ladder

```text
MVP-0 Contract baseline
  output artifact: canonical registry coan, authority hash, root launcher policy, bundle policy
  allowed: document sort, schema coan, validator scaffold
  forbidden: order execution, live readiness claim

MVP-1 Safe boot skeleton
  output artifact: ne gae root launcher, config validation, namespace manager, startup_probe, heartbeat, summary shell
  allowed: read-only dashboard, paper scaffold
  forbidden: live order, strategy profitability claim

MVP-2 Upbit paper dry-run
  output artifact: Upbit paper adapter, fee/slippage/symbol rule model, no-trade reason, ledger/WAL skeleton
  allowed: paper-only simulated execution
  forbidden: live key load, live order path

MVP-3 Operational Upbit paper
  output artifact: dashboard first view, entry/no-entry evidence, replay consistency, paper/shadow separation, resource guard
  allowed: long-term paper evidence cugjeog, strategy candidate scoring
  forbidden: LIVE_READY claim without evidence

MVP-4 Upbit live review
  output artifact: official API verification, read-only account sync, private stream or reconciliation evidence, live preflight report
  allowed: live read-only review, live_order_ready=false
  forbidden: live new order

MVP-5 Upbit limited live
  output artifact: valid LIVE_READY snapshot, operator approval, manual order test evidence, small burn-in policy, emergency flatten evidence
  allowed: limit live, small live burn-in, automatic reduction
  forbidden: automatic daegyumo expansion, unvalidated hot-swap

MVP-6 Multi-exchange paper
  output artifact: Binance spot/futures paper scaffold, official rule verification, futures risk model scaffold
  allowed: Binance read-only/paper/shadow
  forbidden: Binance live new order

MVP-7 Binance limited live
  output artifact: Binance spot and futures private evidence, futures liquidation/funding/reduce-only gate, separate LIVE_READY snapshots
  allowed: limit live only after all gates
  forbidden: futures leverage expansion without burn-in evidence
```

### 5.3 System level mapping

```text
Level 0: execution possible
Level 1: paper dry-run possible
Level 2: operational form paper possible
Level 3: live review possible
Level 4: limit live possible
Level 5: paper none live-safe bootstrap possible
Level 6: production autonomous live possible
```

MVP-1 Level 0, MVP-2 Level 1, MVP-3 Level 2, MVP-4 Level 3, MVP-5 Level 4, MVP-7 ihu ilbu pathman Level 5 candidate becomes. Level 6 long-term operation evidence required final mogpyoda.

## 11. state machine contract

### 11.1 StrategyLifecycle transition

allowed path is as follows.

```text
CANDIDATE -> REPLAY_TESTING
REPLAY_TESTING -> REPLAY_VALIDATED
REPLAY_TESTING -> BLOCKED
REPLAY_TESTING -> RETIRED
REPLAY_VALIDATED -> PAPER_VALIDATING
PAPER_VALIDATING -> PAPER_VALIDATED
PAPER_VALIDATING -> BLOCKED
PAPER_VALIDATING -> RETIRED
PAPER_VALIDATED -> SHADOW_VALIDATED
PAPER_VALIDATED -> BLOCKED
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> LIVE_READY
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> BLOCKED
LIVE_READY -> LIVE_ACTIVE
LIVE_READY -> BLOCKED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> DEGRADED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> RETIRED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> BLOCKED
DEGRADED -> PAPER_VALIDATING
DEGRADED -> RETIRED
BLOCKED -> CANDIDATE only after explicit unblock evidence
RETIRED -> CANDIDATE only as new strategy_build_id or new parameter_set
```

forbidden path is as follows.

```text
CANDIDATE -> LIVE_READY
REPLAY_TESTING -> LIVE_ACTIVE
PAPER_VALIDATING -> LIVE_ACTIVE
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> LIVE_ACTIVE without LIVE_READY
BLOCKED -> LIVE_ACTIVE
RETIRED -> LIVE_ACTIVE
```

### 11.2 Strategy execution maturity

```text
Strategy Level 0: signal candidates only existence
Strategy Level 1: input data, TTL, reason code existence
Strategy Level 2: regime, liquidity, spread, depth filter existence
Strategy Level 3: cost deducted edge, risk veto, sizing trace existence
Strategy Level 4: replay, paper, shadow evidence existence
Strategy Level 5: LIVE_READY snapshot scope and ilci
Strategy Level 6: live performance-based automatic reduction, degradation, retirement, and candidate re-evaluation are possible.
```

allowed standard is as follows.

```text
paper candidate -> Strategy Level 1 anomaly
operational form paper -> Strategy Level 2 anomaly
LIVE_READY candidate -> Strategy Level 4 anomaly
live new entry -> Strategy Level 5 anomaly
production autonomous live -> Strategy Level 6 goal
```

entry and exit separate maturity has. entry level highado exit level if low live new entry is allowed not.

### 11.3 OrderLifecycle transition

normal path is as follows.

```text
INTENT_CREATED -> PRECHECKED -> RESERVED -> SENT -> PENDING_CONFIRM -> OPEN
OPEN -> PARTIAL_FILLED
PARTIAL_FILLED -> FILLED
PARTIAL_FILLED -> CANCELED
OPEN -> CANCELED
OPEN -> EXPIRED
SENT -> REJECTED
PENDING_CONFIRM -> REST_RECONCILED
PENDING_CONFIRM -> RECONCILE_REQUIRED
REST_RECONCILED -> OPEN
REST_RECONCILED -> FILLED
REST_RECONCILED -> CANCELED
REST_RECONCILED -> REJECTED
REST_RECONCILED -> EXPIRED
```

forbidden path is as follows.

```text
INTENT_CREATED -> SENT without PRECHECKED
PRECHECKED -> SENT without RESERVED
PENDING_CONFIRM -> SENT with new identifier
RECONCILE_REQUIRED -> SENT with new identifier
FILLED -> OPEN
CANCELED -> FILLED without reconciliation evidence
REJECTED -> FILLED
```

### 11.4 EngineState transition

```text
BOOTSTRAP_READ_ONLY in start
startup_probe PASS before RUNNING forbidden
live reconciliation PASS before RUNNING forbidden
hard truth missing -> TRADE_DISABLED or SAFE_MODE
resource critical -> RESOURCE_LIMITED or SAFE_MODE
kill switch -> KILL_SWITCH_TRIGGERED
KILL_SWITCH_TRIGGERED -> RUNNING directly boggwi forbidden
RUNNING boggwi -> cause resolution, reconciliation, health check, evidence required
```

## 12. Decision Arbiter and conflict resolution

all strategy signal central Decision Arbiter PASS is required. strategy propose and, risk and arbiter decides and, execution FinalDecisionman must execute be performed.

priority is as follows.

```text
P0 manual emergency stop, kill switch, legal or exchange-enforced block
P1 hard truth availability, schema integrity, ledger durability
P2 exchange constraints, market type constraints, API policy, symbol rules
P3 account reconciliation, balance truth, position truth, open order truth
P4 portfolio risk, strategy risk, exposure, MDD, loss limit
P5 market regime, volatility, liquidity, data quality
P6 strategy lifecycle, strategy score, LIVE_READY scope
P7 execution quality, fee, slippage, market impact, latency
P8 user dashboard display and convenience
```

mandatory decision path is as follows.

```text
hard truth check
resource health check
exchange health check
market data freshness check
exchange and symbol rule check
account reconciliation check
strategy signal normalization
market regime filter
risk veto
portfolio and exposure check
allocator arbitration
execution quality check
final decision
single execution path
ledger and evidence recording
```

Tie breaker is as follows.

```text
more small risk
more small exposure
more high data reliability
more high reproducibility
more lower cost
more na fill quality
more gin validation period
more manh yuhyo trade can
more lower correlationdo
more recent valid LIVE_READY snapshot
```
````````````````
