````````````````text
## 13. execution and order safety

### 13.1 single reducer writer

order intent, balance reservation, order submit result, fill application, position update single writer or equivalent atomic event reducer through handle as.

rule is as follows.

```text
same status multiple writer independentjeog as modify forbidden
status change transaction an in performance
network I/O DB transaction an in performance forbidden
commit the reservation row before external order submission
external order result application separate transaction
submit success after local commit failure when new order block after reconciliation
ambiguous in outcome new order id generation forbidden
```

### 13.2 idempotent submit path

```text
all order idempotency key or client_order_id required
transport timeout -> same identifier as status lookup
exchange unknown -> same identifier as reconciliation
local pending confirm -> new order forbidden
duplicate event -> dedup after 1hoe application
```

### 13.3 live final guard

Before submitting any live order, the following items must be checked again.

```text
mode == LIVE
exchange verified
market_type verified
ACTIVE snapshot valid
FinalDecision exists
FinalDecision not stale
risk veto false
hard truth complete
data freshness pass
reconciliation fresh
protection ready
emergency flatten available
watchdog active
idempotency key exists
ledger writer available
```

If any item fails, the order must not be submitted.

### 13.4 local_state_only protection

local_state_only protection in the status live new entry is allowed not.

allowed action is as follows.

```text
existing position reduction
existing position exit
open order cancel
reconciliation
safe mode
emergency flatten preparation
```

forbidden action is as follows.

```text
new live entry
add position
pyramiding
size expansion
risk profile upgrade
```

## 16. Market regime and universe

Regime enum is as follows.

```text
DOWNTREND
RANGE
UPTREND
BREAKDOWN
HIGH_VOLATILITY
LOW_LIQUIDITY
UNCERTAIN
```

Regime judgment single metric one as if performed must not. minimum input is as follows.

```text
trend
volatility
liquidity
spread
volume
drawdown
market breadth when available
higher timeframe context
data quality
```

Regime rule is as follows.

```text
DOWNTREND -> spot long entry restricted unless validated exception exists
RANGE -> mean-revert or VWAP candidates may be considered
UPTREND -> pullback, breakout, momentum candidates may be considered
BREAKDOWN -> block new entries or enter extreme conservative mode
HIGH_VOLATILITY -> reduce size, restrict entries, or block entries
LOW_LIQUIDITY -> block new entries
UNCERTAIN -> no aggressive entry
```

Universe selection must consider liquidity, spread, volatility, recent trend, depth, execution feasibility, symbol rules, strategy fit, and market type constraints. Exclusion reasons must be structured.

### 17.1 risk profile

CONSERVATIVE
BALANCED
GROWTH
AGGRESSIVE_SANDBOX

### 17.2 deterministic default threshold

The top active risk default table is the single standard. Lower tables are explanatory detailed requirements; if a conflict exists, the top active table is followed.

the following values implementation determinism for conservative defaultvalueida. profitability bochaptervalue animyeo, more conservative exchange rule, LIVE_READY snapshot, risk evidence if present, it wins.

| item | CONSERVATIVE | BALANCED | GROWTH | AGGRESSIVE_SANDBOX |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| first_order_cap_pct_of_equity | 0.25 | 0.50 | 1.00 | 0.25 |
| live_burn_in_cap_pct_of_equity | 1.00 | 2.00 | 5.00 | 1.00 isolated |
| max_symbol_exposure_pct | 2.00 | 5.00 | 10.00 | 2.00 isolated |
| max_strategy_exposure_pct | 3.00 | 8.00 | 15.00 | 3.00 isolated |
| max_exchange_exposure_pct | 10.00 | 20.00 | 40.00 | 5.00 isolated |
| max_total_live_exposure_pct | 15.00 | 30.00 | 60.00 | 5.00 isolated |
| max_daily_loss_pct | 0.50 | 1.00 | 2.00 | 0.50 isolated |
| max_weekly_loss_pct | 1.50 | 3.00 | 5.00 | 1.00 isolated |
| max_monthly_loss_pct | 3.00 | 6.00 | 10.00 | 2.00 isolated |
| max_mdd_freeze_pct | 5.00 | 10.00 | 15.00 | 5.00 isolated |
| max_expected_slippage_bps | 20 | 35 | 50 | 20 |
| reconciliation_max_age_sec_if_live | 30 | 20 | 10 | 30 |
| private_ws_stale_sec_if_required | 15 | 10 | 5 | 15 |

Profile upgrade related revalidation and evidence must exist must be performed.

### 17.3 sizing formula

```text
approved_notional =
min(
  strategy_risk_budget_notional,
  profile_max_notional,
  symbol_exposure_cap,
  portfolio_exposure_cap,
  liquidity_depth_cap,
  volatility_adjusted_cap,
  stop_distance_risk_cap,
  first_order_cap when applicable,
  live_burn_in_cap when applicable
)
```

If the minimum order condition is not satisfied, no order is submitted. If the stop distance is missing or invalid, new entry is forbidden. Confidence score may reduce size or exclude a candidate, but it cannot compensate for missing hard truth.

## 18. Edge and execution quality

Net edge minimum following structure as calculate.

```text
net_edge_bps =
expected_move_bps
- expected_fee_bps
- expected_spread_cost_bps
- expected_slippage_bps
- expected_impact_bps
- expected_latency_cost_bps
- expected_funding_cost_bps when applicable
```

rule is as follows.

```text
net_edge_bps <= minimum_required_edge_bps -> NO_TRADE
edge component missing -> NO_TRADE
fee unknown -> NO_TRADE
slippage unknown -> NO_TRADE
impact unknown on thin market -> NO_TRADE
futures funding unknown when material -> NO_TRADE
```

Execution quality following must be traceable be performed.

```text
fee model accuracy
slippage model accuracy
market impact
partial fill accuracy
multiple fill handling
order timeout
cancel, requote, abandon policy
latency budget
fill quality drift
paper/live parity
```

P1_RB: paper shadow parallel research, score calibration
P1_RC: LIVE_READY candidate validation, replay, walk-forward, paper burn-in
P1: user cinhwa dashboard, launcher UX, operation stabilization
P2: Binance extension, futures, advanced optimization
```

## 32. Forbidden implementation rules

```text
cross mode raw join
cross exchange raw join
validation support artifact runtime truth as daece
evidence none acceptance claim
generic startup failed sentence only display
manual metadata generation
identity compatibility im of normalization
dependency cycle
gate metric binding chain bagg in recalculate
dashboard ledger directly interpretation
strategy exchange API directly call
paper broker live at use
live key paper launcher at rodeu
unknown enum OTHER as handle and continue execution
hard truth omission soft fallback as daece

release_ready live_order_readyceoreom display

```

## 33. Scenario rulebook

```text
hard truth missing -> NO_TRADE or SAFE_MODE, reason HARD_TRUTH_MISSING
strategy conflict -> central arbiter creates one FinalDecision, tie NO_TRADE
risk conflict -> risk veto wins, reason RISK_VETO
market regime mismatch -> no aggressive entry, reason REGIME_MISMATCH
exchange state mismatch -> stop new orders and reconcile
ambiguous order result -> same identifier reconciliation only
ledger conflict -> ledger and exchange reconciliation win
dashboard conflict -> dashboard shows mismatch, engine truth wins
disk full -> block live orders, reason STORAGE_DURABILITY_FAILURE
private websocket unhealthy -> block live if private stream required or use defined conservative reconciliation fallback
futures liquidation risk high -> reduce, close, or block expansion
unknown API rule -> paper/read-only only, live blocked
unknown strategy profitability -> candidate/paper/shadow only
source identity mismatch -> release/live blocked
bundle hygiene fail -> release/live blocked
```

## 34. Completion language

following expression evidence none is forbidden be done.

```text
profitable
live ready
fully safe
production ready
API verified
```

allowed expression is as follows.

```text
implemented scaffold
paper path ready for local test
validator added
live path blocked by design
adapter mock added
preflight blocks unverified live
PAPER_ONLY
READ_ONLY
BLOCKED
UNTESTED
PASS_WITH_LIMITATION
```

## 35. final operation principle

```text
Implement autonomously.
When uncertain, choose no trade, safe mode, reconciliation, or blocked status over risky progress.
Do not delete user requirements.
Do not weaken safety for profitability.
Do not open live by assumption.
Keep the user flow simple.
Make every blocker explainable.
Make every stage claim evidence-backed.
```

## 1. final goal and scope

### 1.1 final goal

TRADER_1 is not a simple automated trading bot; it must be live-operation-oriented trading infrastructure that deploys only validated strategies to live trading and automatically reduces or retires unprofitable strategies.

final user experience is as follows.

```text
user turn on, observe, ggeunda.
system validate and, improve and, order and, reduce, scale up, stop.
```

### 1.2 support scope

this document following scope must include be done.

1. Upbit KRW spot
2. Binance spot
3. Binance USD-M futures
4. replay
5. paper
6. shadow
7. live
8. LIVE_READY snapshot basis live transition
9. small live live burn-in
10. gradual capital expansion
11. automatic reduction, degradation, and retirement
12. dashboard UX
13. security, backup, accounting, tax, regulation, operation monitoring
14. repeated full audit and validator basis block

### 1.3 profitability at about clear limit

document profitability cuguha structure must define. doman profit bochapterdoes not.

profitability judgment following evidenceroman possible.

1. replay result
2. walk forward result
3. out of sample result
4. paper result
5. shadow result
6. small live live burn in result
7. cost deducted after long-term rolling performance

strategy name, baegtest short-term return, recent paper profitman as live expansion if allowed must not.

## 2. top-level immutable principle

 chapter of principle all lower contracttakes priority over.

### 2.1 safety principle

1. do not trade when unknown.
2. do not trade without hard truth.
3. if state is unclear, go to safe mode.
4. If the ledger cannot be recorded, live orders must never be sent.
5. if exchange state and internal state disagree, new entry is forbidden.
6. kill switch failurehageona inactive statusif live blockbecomes.
7. risk veto strategy, user convenience, profit opportunityboda always must have priority be done.
8. user of manual gaeibdo risk veto cannot bypass.

### 2.2 consistency principle

1. order, fill, balance, position, PnL of execution truth hanayeoya must be performed.
2. strategy order and does not proposal only must be performed.
3. order single FinalDecision PASS is required.
4. FinalDecision none OrderIntent invalid.
5. same order retry same idempotency key or client_order_idroman must perform be done.
6. ambiguous transport in outcome new order create and does not reconciliation must have priority be done.
7. summary.json dashboard serving truthiji ledger truth is not.
8. reportna dashboard data runtime ledger substitute cannot.

### 2.3 user experience principle

1. user paper launcher, LIVE launcher, dashboardman concern sseunda.
2. user parameter, hash, evidence file, adapter status directly selects not.
3. LIVE launcher final valid LIVE_READY snapshot automatic must apply be done.
4. LIVE execution if impossible one-line reason first boyeojunda.
5. dashboard first screen core statusman boyeojunda.
6. detail parameter and raw log jeobhin area at set.
7. no-entry reason and entry reason always display must-be-possible.

### 2.4 separation principle

1. paper and live physicaljeog as separationbecomes.
2. The paper launcher cannot call the live order API.
3. LIVE launcher paper broker usehal cannot.
4. shadow for research data cugjeog juceimyeo fill juce is not.
5. Upbit, Binance spot, Binance futures data separationbecomes.
6. mode, exchange, market_type, session_id none record invalid.
7. paper, shadow, live raw data directly if joined must not.
8. comparison if required comparison evidence pack tongthroughman must perform be done.

### 6.4 fallback rule

fallback following sequence follows.

unknown field classification -> hard missing as handling
```

## 7. closed priority and conflict resolution contract

### 7.1 single FinalDecision principle

all trade related input one of FinalDecision as ggeutnaya must be performed.

FinalDecision none following action is forbidden.

```text
order generation
order jeonsong
order retry
position expansion
strategy live activation
capital expansion
```

### 7.2 priority system

all conflict following sequence as must resolve be performed.

```text
P0 manual urgent stop, kill switch, legal or exchange gangje block
P1 hard truth availability, schema integrity, ledger durability
P2 exchange constraint, market type type constraint, API policy, symbol rule
P3 account reconciliation, balance, position, open order truth
P4 portfolio risk, strategy risk, exposure, MDD, loss limit
P5 market regime, volatility, liquidity, data quality
P6 strategy lifecycle, strategy score, LIVE_READY scope
P7 execution quality, fee, slippage, market impact, latency
P8 user dashboard display and convenience
```

upper priority lower priority always iginda.

### 7.3 tie breaker

same priority nae in if conflict following sequence must apply be done.

```text
more small risk
more small exposure
more high data reliability
more high reproducibility
more lower cost
more na fill quality
more gin validation period
more manh yuhyo trade can
more lower correlationdo
more recent valid LIVE_READY snapshot
```

geuraedo tieif new entry is forbidden.

KILL_SWITCH_TRIGGERED

## 9. state machine contract

### 9.1 strategy lifecycle status jeoni

allowed strategy status before is as follows.

```text
CANDIDATE -> REPLAY_TESTING
REPLAY_TESTING -> REPLAY_VALIDATED
REPLAY_TESTING -> BLOCKED
REPLAY_TESTING -> RETIRED
REPLAY_VALIDATED -> PAPER_VALIDATING
PAPER_VALIDATING -> PAPER_VALIDATED
PAPER_VALIDATING -> BLOCKED
PAPER_VALIDATING -> RETIRED
PAPER_VALIDATED -> SHADOW_VALIDATED
PAPER_VALIDATED -> BLOCKED
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> LIVE_READY
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> BLOCKED
LIVE_READY -> LIVE_ACTIVE
LIVE_READY -> BLOCKED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> DEGRADED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> RETIRED
LIVE_ACTIVE -> BLOCKED
DEGRADED -> PAPER_VALIDATING
DEGRADED -> RETIRED
BLOCKED -> CANDIDATE only after explicit unblock evidence
RETIRED -> CANDIDATE only as new strategy_build_id or new parameter_set
```

forbidden before is as follows.

```text
CANDIDATE -> LIVE_READY
REPLAY_TESTING -> LIVE_ACTIVE
PAPER_VALIDATING -> LIVE_ACTIVE
SHADOW_VALIDATED -> LIVE_ACTIVE without LIVE_READY
BLOCKED -> LIVE_ACTIVE
RETIRED -> LIVE_ACTIVE
```

### 9.2 live transition status flow

live transition following flow follows.

```text
REPLAY_VALIDATED
-> PAPER_VALIDATING
-> PAPER_VALIDATED
-> SHADOW_VALIDATED
-> LIVE_READY
-> USER_APPROVED_LIVE
-> SMALL_LIVE_BURN_IN
-> LIVE_ACTIVE
```

this document in USER_APPROVED_LIVE separate strategy lifecycle enum not live transition evidence of approval status must manage be done.

### 9.3 order lifecycle status jeoni

order lifecycle of closed status is as follows.

```text
INTENT_CREATED
PRECHECKED
RESERVED
SENT
PENDING_CONFIRM
OPEN
PARTIAL_FILLED
FILLED
CANCELED
REJECTED
EXPIRED
REST_RECONCILED
RECONCILE_REQUIRED
```

normal progress path is as follows.

```text
INTENT_CREATED -> PRECHECKED -> RESERVED -> SENT -> PENDING_CONFIRM -> OPEN
OPEN -> PARTIAL_FILLED
PARTIAL_FILLED -> FILLED
PARTIAL_FILLED -> CANCELED
OPEN -> CANCELED
OPEN -> EXPIRED
SENT -> REJECTED
PENDING_CONFIRM -> REST_RECONCILED
PENDING_CONFIRM -> RECONCILE_REQUIRED
REST_RECONCILED -> OPEN
REST_RECONCILED -> FILLED
REST_RECONCILED -> CANCELED
REST_RECONCILED -> REJECTED
REST_RECONCILED -> EXPIRED
```

forbidden path is as follows.

```text
INTENT_CREATED -> SENT without PRECHECKED
PRECHECKED -> SENT without RESERVED
PENDING_CONFIRM -> SENT with new identifier
RECONCILE_REQUIRED -> SENT with new identifier
FILLED -> OPEN
CANCELED -> FILLED without reconciliation evidence
REJECTED -> FILLED
```

### 9.4 engine state jeoni

engine state following principle follows.

1. BOOTSTRAP_READ_ONLY in must start be performed.
2. startup_probe PASS before RUNNING as gal cannot.
3. live reconciliation PASS before RUNNING becomes cannot.
4. hard truth missingif TRADE_DISABLED or SAFE_MODE as ganda.
5. resource limit criticalif RESOURCE_LIMITED or SAFE_MODE as ganda.
6. When the kill switch triggers, the engine moves to KILL_SWITCH_TRIGGERED.
7. KILL_SWITCH_TRIGGERED in RUNNING as directly boggwbelowl cannot.
8. RUNNING boggwi at cause resolution, reconciliation, health check, evidence is required.

## 28. scenario rulebook

following situation mandatory defined action as ggeutnaya must be performed.

### 28.1 hard truth missing

```text
action: NO_TRADE or SAFE_MODE
record: HARD_TRUTH_MISSING
dashboard: mandatory information omission as trade stop
```

### 28.2 strategy conflict

```text
action: allocator single decision
dongryul: NO_TRADE
record: strategy conflict evidence
```

### 28.3 risk conflict

```text
action: risk veto apply
record: RISK_VETO
```

### 28.4 market regime mismatch

```text
action: NO_TRADE or size reduction
record: REGIME_MISMATCH
```

### 28.5 exchange state mismatch

```text
action: RECONCILE_REQUIRED
new entry: forbidden
record: BALANCE_MISMATCH or RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED
```

### 28.6 ambiguous order result

```text
action: same identifier reconciliation
new order: forbidden
record: PENDING_CONFIRM_EXISTS
```

### 28.7 dashboard and ledger conflict

```text
action: ledger priority
dashboard: ACTION_REQUIRED
trade: required when block
```

### 28.8 disk full

```text
action: live order block
record: STORAGE_DURABILITY_FAILURE
dashboard: disk insufficient as trade stop
```

### 28.9 private websocket unhealthy

```text
action: new order block or bosu mode
record: PRIVATE_WS_UNHEALTHY
```

### 28.10 futures liquidation risk

```text
action: reduce only reduction or exit
new expansion: forbidden
record: liquidation risk evidence
```

### 79.3 LIVE execution when immediate live-trading principle

The live launcher is not a procedure for starting long validation from scratch. It must automatically read the already generated current valid LIVE_READY snapshot, quickly verify only the current safety state, and then decide.

```text
LIVE_READY valid + current safety status pass -> immediate limit live live-trading entry
LIVE_READY missing/invalid or current safety status fail -> immediate block
```

current safety status check following item must include be done.

```text

balance sync

position sync

emergency flatten availability

```

### 79.4 speed contract

Speed must not be gained by skipping validation. Validation is performed beforehand, and at live launch the precomputed snapshot and health state must be verified quickly.

implementation goal is as follows.

```text
warm start
precomputed readiness state
incremental update
O(1) at eachgaun live gate boolean evaluation
startup among long-term validation work forbidden
long-term analysis background or internal service as separation
```

When live launcher conditions PASS, the launcher must be ready for immediate trading. If conditions are not met, display a one-line blocking reason immediately instead of a long explanation.

### 83A.6 regime judgment advancement contract

regime judgment single metric as performs not.

minimum input is as follows.

```text
trend
volatility
liquidity
spread
volume
drawdown
market breadth when available
higher timeframe context
benchmark context when available
data quality
```

canonical regime is as follows.

```text
UPTREND
RANGE
DOWNTREND
BREAKDOWN
HIGH_VOLATILITY
LOW_LIQUIDITY
UNCERTAIN
```

regime judgment level is as follows.

```text
Regime Level 0: regime absence or UNKNOWNman existence
Regime Level 1: trend and volatility basis classification
Regime Level 2: liquidity, spread, volume include
Regime Level 3: higher timeframe and confidence include
Regime Level 4: by strategy suitability score and reason code include
Regime Level 5: live gate and sizing at directly connection
Regime Level 6: live performance and and regime miss basis as automatic jaeevaluation
```

live new entry at Regime Level 5 is required.

Rules:

```text
UNCERTAIN -> no aggressive entry
LOW_LIQUIDITY -> no new entry
HIGH_VOLATILITY -> reduce size or no trade
BREAKDOWN -> no spot long entry
DOWNTREND -> spot long restricted
RANGE -> range or VWAP reversion candidates only
UPTREND -> pullback, breakout, momentum candidates allowed
```

### 83A.7 edge calculation contract

edge cost deducted after must judge. cost deducted before expected value live entry basis becomes cannot.

default structure is as follows.

```text
net_edge_bps =
expected_move_bps
- expected_fee_bps
- expected_spread_cost_bps
- expected_slippage_bps
- expected_impact_bps
- expected_latency_cost_bps
- expected_funding_cost_bps when applicable
```

mandatory component:

```text
expected_move_bps
expected_fee_bps
expected_spread_cost_bps
expected_slippage_bps
expected_impact_bps
expected_latency_cost_bps
minimum_required_edge_bps
```

in futures following must add be performed.

```text
expected_funding_cost_bps
liquidation_risk_penalty_bps
margin_usage_penalty_bps
```

Rules:

```text
net_edge_bps <= minimum_required_edge_bps -> NO_TRADE
expected_fee_bps unknown -> NO_TRADE
expected_slippage_bps unknown -> NO_TRADE
expected_impact_bps unknown on thin market -> NO_TRADE
expected_latency_cost_bps unknown in fast strategy -> NO_TRADE
funding cost material but unknown -> NO_TRADE
```

edge calculation result FinalDecision input_hash at must include must be performed.

### 83A.8 sizing sansig contract

sizing over aggressiveness survivability and fill possibility must have priority be done.

default structure is as follows.

```text
approved_notional =
min(

### 5. live gate improvement plan

#### 5.1 core principle

the live gate must remain narrower and clearer than the current gate.

The following statuses must be separated.

1. release ready
2. paper ready
3. shadow ready
4. replay ready
5. live review ready
6. live order ready

Meaning:

1. release ready: code, configuration, document, output artifact paekijing prepared status
2. paper ready: paper execution and paper order evaluation possible status
3. shadow ready: shadow validation loop possible status
4. replay ready: replay validation possible status
5. live review ready: operator live transition geomto starthal can exist status
6. live order ready: the status that actually allows live order submission

1. release ready trueyeodo live order ready falseil can must exist must be performed.
2. live review ready trueyeodo live order ready falseil can must exist must be performed.

### 89.4 rolling performance evaluation window

strategy performance and single period evaluationgyun as judgmentdoes not. minimum following window together with must use be done.

```text
short_window: recent performance deteriorates and sudden failure detection
medium_window: ilban operation performance evaluation
long_window: long-term stability evaluation
regime_window: per regime performance evaluation
symbol_window: symbol or per contract performance and jibjungdo evaluation
adapter_window: exchange and market type per type fill quality evaluation
live_burn_in_window: small live live stage of actual ceresult settlement quality evaluation
```

each window minimum following metric calculate.

```text
net_ev_after_cost
profit_factor
max_drawdown
hit_rate
payoff_ratio
closed_trade_count
fill_quality_score
paper_live_gap
slippage_error
fee_error
latency_error
regime_fit_score
recent_degradation_score
```

rule following and gatda.

```text
short_window rapid automatic expansion blocks.
medium_window not met strategy reduction or deferral is a reason.
long_window not met strategy retirement or revalidation is a reason.
regime_window not met affected regime scope in strategy must deactivate be performed.
symbol_window loss jibjung symbol cap or symbol block is a reason.
adapter_window fill quality not met affected exchange/market_type live expansion block is a reason.
```

## B.5 default strategy family minimum condition

### B.5.1 open_reset_micro

```text
allowed_regime: UPTREND, RANGE, HIGH_VOLATILITY only when risk is reduced
entry requires:
fresh market data
spread pass
depth pass
reset window or volatility reset
momentum confirmation
taker flow or equivalent pressure confirmation when available
signal TTL
FOMO distance guard
net edge positive after costs
risk distance known
sizing trace

exit advice:
momentum weakens
taker flow weakens
spread widens
no progress within time window
reset effect expires
common hard exit first
```

### B.5.2 breakout_retest

```text
allowed_regime: UPTREND, RANGE only when breakout structure is validated
entry requires:
breakout reference level
confirmed breakout or accepted retest
false breakout filter
volume or liquidity confirmation
invalidated level
signal TTL
net edge positive after costs
risk distance known
sizing trace

exit advice:
breakout level lost
retest failed
follow-through absent
breakout candle invalidated
impact or spread worsens after entry
common hard exit first
```

### B.5.3 trend_pullback

```text
allowed_regime: UPTREND
entry requires:
trend regime pass
higher timeframe not hostile
pullback reference such as EMA, VWAP, structure level, or equivalent
higher low or structure recovery evidence
spread pass
depth pass
risk distance known
net edge positive after costs
sizing trace

exit advice:
trend structure deteriorates
EMA or VWAP structure fails
higher low breaks
trend breadth weakens
trailing protection tightens on exhaustion
common hard exit first
```

### B.5.4 range_reversion_vwap

```text
allowed_regime: RANGE
entry requires:
range regime pass
trend breakdown absent
distance from VWAP or range boundary measured
reversion trigger
spread pass
depth pass
thesis timeout defined
net edge positive after costs
risk distance known
sizing trace

exit advice:
VWAP reached
range midline reached
range upper boundary reached when applicable
range structure breaks
mean reversion thesis expires
common hard exit first
```

## B.6 strategy maturity rule

```text
paper candidate requires entry level >= 1 and exit level >= 1
operational paper requires entry level >= 2 and exit level >= 2
LIVE_READY candidate requires entry level >= 4 and exit level >= 4
live new entry requires entry level >= 5 and exit level >= 5
production autonomous live targets entry level >= 6 and exit level >= 6
```

## B.7 live strategy blocker rule

if any of the following is true live new entry is forbidden.

```text
entry maturity below Level 5
exit maturity below Level 5
edge model incomplete
sizing trace missing
regime confidence too low
strategy unit scope mismatch
ACTIVE snapshot invalid
strategy threshold not validated
parameter_hash mismatch
risk_profile mismatch
strategy_build_id mismatch
shadow evidence missing
paper evidence missing
replay evidence missing
```

## B.8 strategy validation tests

each strategy implementation minimum following test has.

```text
strategy unit identity test
entry maturity level test
exit maturity level test
regime suitability test
edge component completeness test
net edge positive gate test
sizing cap min selection test
stop distance missing no-trade test
FOMO distance guard test
hard exit priority test
strategy-specific exit advice test
FinalDecision without direct order test
LIVE_READY scope strategy unit test
strategy threshold not live evidence test
```

## C.7 MVP-5 Upbit limited live

is allowed only for exact snapshot scope.

```text
valid LIVE_READY snapshot
operator approval
manual order test evidence
read-only burn-in PASS
small live burn-in
first_order_cap
emergency flatten evidence
same identifier reconciliation
live final guard
```

is forbidden be done.

```text
broad scale-up
Binance futures live
unvalidated hot swap
risk profile upgrade without evidence
capital expansion without burn-in evidence
```

Completion condition.

```text
exact scope live_order_ready=true
exact scope live_order_allowed=true
all blocking validators PASS
live blocked negative tests PASS
no HIGH or CRITICAL contract_gap open
emergency protection PASS
ledger reconciliation PASS
```

## C.8 MVP-6 Multi-exchange paper

is allowed.

```text
Binance spot paper scaffold
Binance futures paper scaffold
futures simulator
futures margin and liquidation model scaffold
exchange namespace split
market_type namespace split
cross-exchange dashboard summary
```

is forbidden be done.

```text
Binance live
readiness transfer from Upbit to Binance
readiness transfer from spot to futures
futures leverage live expansion
```

Completion condition.

```text
Binance paper validators PASS
spot/futures namespace separation PASS
futures liquidation model scaffold PASS
Binance live_order_ready=false
Binance live_order_allowed=false
```

## C.9 MVP-7 Binance limited live

is allowed only for exact exchange and market_type scope.

```text
Binance spot limited live when exact spot LIVE_READY exists
Binance futures limited live when exact futures LIVE_READY exists
separate official API verification
separate manual order test
futures reduce-only path
futures funding model
futures liquidation risk validator
```

is forbidden be done.

```text
readiness transfer across market_type
futures live as implicit default
leverage expansion without futures burn-in evidence
spot balance model in futures adapter
```

Completion condition.

```text
exact Binance market_type live_order_ready=true
exact Binance market_type live_order_allowed=true
futures risk validator PASS if FUTURES_USDT_M
official API verification PASS and fresh
manual order test PASS when required
all blocking validators PASS
```

 This appendix is the standard format for recording every patch result in the same format. It specifies the AGENTS.md patch result rule more concretely.

  "patch_class": "SCHEMA_PATCH",
  "patch_summary": "string",

  "affected_files": [],

  "affected_market_type": null,
  "affected_mode": null,
  "removed_requirements": [],
  "merged_requirements": [],
  "deferred_requirements": [],
  "new_registry_items": [],
  "new_or_changed_schema_ids": [],
  "validators_required": [],
  "validators_run": [
    {
      "command": "string",
      "status": "PASS|FAIL|BLOCKED|UNTESTED|STALE|SKIPPED_NOT_APPLICABLE|TIMEOUT",
      "evidence_path": "string|null"
    }
  ],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [],
  "tests_run": [
    {
      "command": "string",
      "status": "PASS|FAIL|BLOCKED|UNTESTED|STALE|SKIPPED_NOT_APPLICABLE|TIMEOUT",
      "evidence_path": "string|null"
    }
  ],
  "live_order_ready_before": false,
  "live_order_ready_after": false,
  "live_order_allowed_before": false,
  "live_order_allowed_after": false,
  "remaining_blockers": [],
  "new_contract_gaps": [],

  "evidence_manifest_path": "string|null",
  "operator_visible_status": "string",
  "next_allowed_stage": "string|null"
}
```

## F.2 Patch result immutable rule

```text
removed_requirements always []ieoya must be performed.
validator not run UNTESTEDda.
UNTESTED READY is not.
TIMEOUT PASS is not.
STALE live readiness at usehal cannot.
live_order_allowed_after=true LIVE_ENABLING_PATCHeseoman possible.

# hardening appendix H. Live blocked negative test matrix

document status: supplemental safety test matrix

 This appendix fixes, as a matrix, the conditions under which the live order adapter must not be called.

## H.1 Matrix schema

```json
{
  "case_id": "string",
  "condition": "string",
  "mode": "LIVE",
  "exchange": "UPBIT|BINANCE|null",
  "market_type": "KRW_SPOT|SPOT|FUTURES_USDT_M|null",
  "expected_engine_state": "BLOCKED|SAFE_MODE|TRADE_DISABLED|RECONCILE_REQUIRED|KILL_SWITCH_TRIGGERED",
  "expected_final_decision": "BLOCKED|NO_TRADE|SAFE_MODE|RECONCILE_REQUIRED|TRADE_DISABLED|KILL_SWITCH",
  "expected_order_adapter_called": false,
  "expected_blocker_code": "string",
  "required_evidence": "validator_result|test_result|evidence_manifest|contract_gap"
}
```

## H.2 Required cases

```text
LIVE_BLOCKED_001 | LIVE_READY missing | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | LIVE_READY_MISSING
LIVE_BLOCKED_002 | LIVE_READY invalid | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | LIVE_READY_MISSING
LIVE_BLOCKED_003 | official API verification missing | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | API_UNVERIFIED
LIVE_BLOCKED_004 | official API verification stale | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | OFFICIAL_API_VERIFICATION_EXPIRED
LIVE_BLOCKED_005 | manual order test missing when required | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | MANUAL_ORDER_TEST_MISSING
LIVE_BLOCKED_006 | operator approval missing when required | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | OPERATOR_APPROVAL_MISSING
LIVE_BLOCKED_007 | local_state_only protection active | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | LIVE_FINAL_GUARD_FAILED
LIVE_BLOCKED_008 | stale orderbook | BLOCKED | NO_TRADE | false | STALE_ORDERBOOK
LIVE_BLOCKED_009 | stale ticker | BLOCKED | NO_TRADE | false | STALE_TICKER
LIVE_BLOCKED_010 | stale trade tape | BLOCKED | NO_TRADE | false | STALE_TRADE_TAPE
LIVE_BLOCKED_011 | reconciliation stale | RECONCILE_REQUIRED | RECONCILE_REQUIRED | false | RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED
LIVE_BLOCKED_012 | symbol rule unknown | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | SYMBOL_RULE_UNVERIFIED
LIVE_BLOCKED_013 | fee model unknown | BLOCKED | NO_TRADE | false | FEE_MODEL_UNVERIFIED
LIVE_BLOCKED_014 | slippage unknown | BLOCKED | NO_TRADE | false | EXPECTED_SLIPPAGE_EXCEEDED
LIVE_BLOCKED_015 | risk veto active | BLOCKED | NO_TRADE | false | RISK_VETO
LIVE_BLOCKED_016 | kill switch active | KILL_SWITCH_TRIGGERED | KILL_SWITCH | false | KILL_SWITCH_ACTIVE
LIVE_BLOCKED_017 | ledger writer unavailable | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | LEDGER_UNAVAILABLE
LIVE_BLOCKED_018 | idempotency key missing | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | LIVE_FINAL_GUARD_FAILED
LIVE_BLOCKED_019 | emergency flatten unavailable | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | EMERGENCY_FLATTEN_UNAVAILABLE
LIVE_BLOCKED_020 | source identity mismatch | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | SOURCE_IDENTITY_MISMATCH
LIVE_BLOCKED_021 | bundle hygiene fail | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | BUNDLE_HYGIENE_FAIL
LIVE_BLOCKED_022 | HIGH contract gap open | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | CONTRACT_GAP_HIGH
LIVE_BLOCKED_023 | CRITICAL contract gap open | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | CONTRACT_GAP_CRITICAL
LIVE_BLOCKED_024 | entry maturity below Level 5 | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | STRATEGY_NOT_ELIGIBLE
LIVE_BLOCKED_025 | exit maturity below Level 5 | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | STRATEGY_NOT_ELIGIBLE
LIVE_BLOCKED_026 | edge model incomplete | BLOCKED | NO_TRADE | false | MIN_EDGE_FAIL
LIVE_BLOCKED_027 | sizing trace missing | BLOCKED | NO_TRADE | false | HARD_TRUTH_MISSING
LIVE_BLOCKED_028 | ACTIVE snapshot invalid | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | SNAPSHOT_SCOPE_MISMATCH
LIVE_BLOCKED_029 | final guard disabled | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | LIVE_FINAL_GUARD_FAILED
LIVE_BLOCKED_030 | paper launcher attempts live order API | BLOCKED | BLOCKED | false | TRADE_DISABLED
```

## H.3 Matrix pass rule

```text
all required case in expected_order_adapter_called=must be false must be performed.
If any live order adapter is called, live safety is FAIL.
If live blocked tests are missing, live safety claims are forbidden.
```

# hardening appendix I. user-facing text standard

document status: supplemental operator UX text contract

 appendix dashboard and launcher to the user displayhal first line wording must standardize be performed. internal reason code preserve and, user one-line reason first bonda.

## I.1 user display default rule

```text
The first line must include mode, trading status, and the primary blocker.
Standalone READY display is forbidden.
release_ready or bundle_ready live_order_readyceoreom display not.
Do not display only an internal error; display an operational reason that the user can understand.
```

## I.2 status wording mapping

```text
LIVE_READY_MISSING -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - LIVE_READY snapshot missing
SNAPSHOT_SCOPE_MISMATCH -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - LIVE_READY scope mismatch
API_UNVERIFIED -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - exchange official API validation required
OFFICIAL_API_VERIFICATION_EXPIRED -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - exchange official API validation expiry
MANUAL_ORDER_TEST_MISSING -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - manual order test evidence required
OPERATOR_APPROVAL_MISSING -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - operator approval required
READ_ONLY_BURN_IN_MISSING -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - read-only burn-in evidence required
EMERGENCY_FLATTEN_UNAVAILABLE -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - emergency flatten preparation required
RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - account and internal status synchronization required
BALANCE_MISMATCH -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - balance mismatch check required
SYMBOL_RULE_UNVERIFIED -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - symbol rule validation required
FEE_MODEL_UNVERIFIED -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - fee model validation required
STALE_ORDERBOOK -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - orderbook data delay
STALE_TICKER -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - ticker data delay
STALE_TRADE_TAPE -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - trade tape data delay
RISK_VETO -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - risk veto active
KILL_SWITCH_ACTIVE -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - kill switch active
LEDGER_UNAVAILABLE -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - ledger record not allowed
SOURCE_IDENTITY_MISMATCH -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - source identity mismatch
BUNDLE_HYGIENE_FAIL -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - bundle hygiene fail
CONTRACT_GAP_HIGH -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - HIGH contract gap open
CONTRACT_GAP_CRITICAL -> LIVE TRADING: BLOCKED - CRITICAL contract gap open
PAPER_READY -> PAPER TRADING: READY - live order not allowed
READ_ONLY_READY -> READ ONLY: READY - data sujibman possible
LIVE_REVIEW_READY -> LIVE TRADING: REVIEW ONLY - live order not allowed
SMALL_LIVE_BURN_IN_READY -> LIVE TRADING: SMALL BURN-IN - exact scope limit live
LIVE_ACTIVE_READY -> LIVE TRADING: ACTIVE - exact scope live active
```

## I.3 forbidden wording

```text
READY
LIVE READY
geo of ready
no issue
ama possible
startup failed
internal error
unknown problem
release ready therefore live ready
```

## I.4 wording use rule

```text
user-facing text dashboard serving truthda.
user-facing text trading truth is not.
Trading decisions must be determined by the ledger, reconciliation, FinalDecision, and live final guard.
If dashboard and engine status differ, engine truth takes priority and the dashboard must display a mismatch warning.
```
````````````````
